s;\n1379: \n1380:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n1381: stat_prefix: foo\n1382: matcher:\n1383:   on_no_match:\n1384:     action:\n1385:       name: route\n1386:       typed_config:\n1387:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1388:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1389:   )EOF\"));\n1390: \n1391:   EXPECT_EQ(nullptr, config_->hashPolicy());\n1392: }\n1393: \n1394: // Expect correct hash is created if hash_policy with source_ip is mentioned.\n1395: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, HashWithSourceIp) {\n1396:   InSequence s;\n1397: \n1398:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n1399: stat_prefix: foo\n1400: matcher:\n1401:   on_no_match:\n1402:     action:\n1403:       name: route\n1404:       typed_config:\n1405:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1406:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1407: hash_policies:\n1408: - source_ip: true\n1409:   )EOF\"));\n1410: \n1411:   auto host = createHost(upstream_address_);\n1412:   auto generated_hash = HashUtil::xxHash64(\"10.0.0.1\");\n1413:   EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_,\n1414:               chooseHost(_))\n1415:       .WillOnce(Invoke([host, generated_hash](\n1416:                            Upstream::LoadBalancerContext* context) -> Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr {\n1417:         auto hash = context->computeHashKey();\n1418:         EXPECT_TRUE(hash.has_value());\n1419:         EXPECT_EQ(generated_hash, hash.value());\n1420:         return host;\n1421:       }));\n1422:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n1423:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n1424:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n1425:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world\");\n1426: }\n1427: \n1428: // Expect null hash value if hash_policy is not mentioned.\n1429: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, NullHashWithoutHashPolicy) {\n1430:   InSequence s;\n1431: \n1432:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n1433: stat_prefix: foo\n1434: matcher:\n1435:   on_no_match:\n1436:     action:\n1437:       name: route\n1438:       typed_config:\n1439:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1440:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1441:   )EOF\"));\n1442: \n1443:   auto host = createHost(upstream_address_);\n1444:   EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_,\n1445:               chooseHost(_))\n1446:       .WillOnce(\n1447:           Invoke([host](Upstream::LoadBalancerContext* context) -> Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr {\n1448:             auto hash = context->computeHashKey();\n1449:             EXPECT_FALSE(hash.has_value());\n1450:             return host;\n1451:           }));\n1452:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n1453:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n1454:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n1455:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world\");\n1456: }\n1457: \n1458: // Make sure hash policy with key is created.\n1459: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, HashPolicyWithKey) {\n1460:   InSequence s;\n1461: \n1462:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n1463: stat_prefix: foo\n1464: matcher:\n1465:   on_no_match:\n1466:     action:\n1467:       name: route\n1468:       typed_config:\n1469:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1470:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1471: hash_policies:\n1472: - key: \"key\"\n1473:   )EOF\"));\n1474: \n1475:   EXPECT_NE(nullptr, config_->hashPolicy());\n1476: }\n1477: \n1478: // Make sure validation fails if key is an empty string.\n1479: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, ValidateHashPolicyWithKey) {\n1480:   InSequence s;\n1481:   auto config = R\"EOF(\n1482: stat_prefix: foo\n1483: matcher:\n1484:  on_no_match:\n1485:     action:\n1486:       name: route\n1487:       typed_config:\n1488:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1489:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1490: hash_policies:\n1491: - key: \"\"\n1492:   )EOF\";\n1493: \n1494:   EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(setup(readConfig(config)), EnvoyException,\n1495:                           \"caused by HashPolicyValidationError\\\\.Key\");\n1496: }\n1497: \n1498: // Expect correct hash is created if hash_policy with key is mentioned.\n1499: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, HashWithKey) {\n1500:   InSequence s;\n1501: \n1502:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n1503: stat_prefix: foo\n1504: matcher:\n1505:   on_no_match:\n1506:     action:\n1507:       name: route\n1508:       typed_config:\n1509:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1510:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1511: hash_policies:\n1512: - key: \"key\"\n1513:   )EOF\"));\n1514: \n1515:   auto host = createHost(upstream_address_);\n1516:   auto generated_hash = HashUtil::xxHash64(\"key\");\n1517:   EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_,\n1518:               chooseHost(_))\n1519:       .WillOnce(Invoke([host, generated_hash](\n1520:                            Upstream::LoadBalancerContext* context) -> Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr {\n1521:         auto hash = context->computeHashKey();\n1522:         EXPECT_TRUE(hash.has_value());\n1523:         EXPECT_EQ(generated_hash, hash.value());\n1524:         return host;\n1525:       }));\n1526:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n1527:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n1528:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n1529:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world\");\n1530: }\n1531: \n1532: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, EnrichAccessLogOnSessionComplete) {\n1533:   InSequence s;\n1534: \n1535:   const std::string session_access_log_format =\n1536:       \"%FILTER_STATE(test.udp_session.drainer.on_session_complete)%\";\n1537: \n1538:   setup(accessLogConfig(R\"EOF(\n1539: stat_prefix: foo\n1540: matcher:\n1541:   on_no_match:\n1542:     action:\n1543:       name: route\n1544:       typed_config:\n1545:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1546:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1547: session_filters:\n1548: - name: foo\n1549:   typed_config:\n1550:     '@type': type.googleapis.com/test.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.session_filters.DrainerUdpSessionReadFilterConfig\n1551:     downstream_bytes_to_drain: 0\n1552:     stop_iteration_on_new_session: false\n1553:     stop_iteration_on_first_read: false\n1554:     continue_filter_chain: false\n1555:   )EOF\",\n1556:                         session_access_log_format, \"\"));\n1557: \n1558:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n1559:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n1560:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n1561:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n1562:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n1563: \n1564:   test_sessions_[0].idle_timer_->invokeCallback();\n1565:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n1566:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n1567: \n1568:   filter_.reset();\n1569:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.size(), 1);\n1570:   EXPECT_THAT(output_.front(), testing::HasSubstr(\"session_complete\"));\n1571: }\n1572: \n1573: class HttpUpstreamImplTest : public testing::Test {\n1574: public:\n1575:   struct HeaderToAdd {\n1576:     std::string key_;\n1577:     std::string value_;\n1578:   };\n1579: \n1580:   Http::TestRequestHeaderMapImpl\n1581:   expectedHeaders(bool is_ssl = false, bool use_post = false,\n1582:                   absl::optional<std::string> opt_authority = absl::nullopt,\n1583:                   absl::optional<std::string> opt_path = absl::nullopt,\n1584:                   absl::optional<HeaderToAdd> header_to_add = absl::nullopt) {\n1585:     // In case connect-udp is used, Envoy expect the H2 headers to be normalized with H1,\n1586:     // so expect that the request headers here match H1 headers, even though\n1587:     // eventually H2 headers will be sent. When the headers are normalized to H1, the method\n1588:     // is replaced with GET, a header with the 'upgrade' key is added with 'connect-udp'\n1589:     // value and a header with the 'connection' key is added with 'Upgrade' value.\n1590:     std::string scheme = is_ssl ? \"https\" : \"http\";\n1591:     std::string authority =\n1592:         opt_authority.has_value() ? opt_authority.value() : \"default.host.com:10\";\n1593:     std::string method = use_post ? \"POST\" : \"GET\";\n1594:     std::string path =\n1595:         opt_path.has_value() ? opt_path.value() : \"/.well-known/masque/udp/default.target.host/20/\";\n1596: \n1597:     auto headers = Http::TestRequestHeaderMapImpl{\n1598:         {\":scheme\", scheme}, {\":authority\", authority}, {\":method\", method}, {\":path\", path}};\n1599: \n1600:     if (!use_post) {\n1601:       headers.addCopy(\"capsule-protocol\", \"?1\");\n1602:       headers.addCopy(\"upgrade\", \"connect-udp\");\n1603:       headers.addCopy(\"connection\", \"Upgrade\");\n1604:     }\n1605: \n1606:     if (header_to_add) {\n1607:       headers.addCopy(header_to_add.value().key_, header_to_add.value().value_);\n1608:     }\n1609: \n1610:     return headers;\n1611:   }\n1612: \n1613:   void setAndExpectRequestEncoder(Http::TestRequestHeaderMapImpl expected_headers,\n1614:                                   bool is_ssl = false) {\n1615:     EXPECT_CALL(request_encoder_.stream_, addCallbacks(_));\n1616:     EXPECT_CALL(request_encoder_, encodeHeaders(_, _))\n1617:         .WillOnce(Invoke([expected_headers](const Http::RequestHeaderMap& headers,\n1618:                                             bool end_stream) -> Http::Status {\n1619:           EXPECT_THAT(&headers, HeaderMapEqualIgnoreOrder(&expected_headers));\n1620:           EXPECT_FALSE(end_stream);\n1621:           return absl::OkStatus();\n1622:         }));\n1623: \n1624:     upstream_->setRequestEncoder(request_encoder_, is_ssl);\n1625: \n1626:     // Verify that resetEncoder is called only once.\n1627:     EXPECT_CALL(request_encoder_.stream_, removeCallbacks(_));\n1628:   }\n1629: \n1630:   void filterStateOverride(absl::optional<uint32_t> proxy_port = absl::nullopt,\n1631:                            absl::optional<uint32_t> target_port = absl::nullopt) {\n1632:     if (proxy_port) {\n1633:       stream_info_.filterState()->setData(\n1634:           \"udp.connect.proxy_port\",\n1635:           std::make_shared<StreamInfo::UInt32AccessorImpl>(proxy_port.value()),\n1636:           Envoy::StreamInfo::FilterState::StateType::Mutable);\n1637:     }\n1638: \n1639:     if (target_port) {\n1640:       stream_info_.filterState()->setData(\n1641:           \"udp.connect.target_port\",\n1642:           std::make_shared<StreamInfo::UInt32AccessorImpl>(target_port.value()),\n1643:           Envoy::StreamInfo::FilterState::StateType::Mutable);\n1644:     }\n1645:   }\n1646: \n1647:   void setup(absl::optional<HeaderToAdd> header_to_add = absl::nullopt) {\n1648:     Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::core::v3::HeaderValueOption> headers_to_add;\n1649:     if (header_to_add) {\n1650:       envoy::config::core::v3::HeaderValueOption* header = headers_to_add.Add();\n1651:       header->mutable_header()->set_key(header_to_add.value().key_);\n1652:       header->mutable_header()->set_value(header_to_add.value().value_);\n1653:     }\n1654: \n1655:     header_evaluator_ = Envoy::Router::HeaderParser::configure(headers_to_add);\n1656:     config_ = std::make_unique<NiceMock<MockUdpTunnelingConfig>>(*header_evaluator_);\n1657:     upstream_ = std::make_unique<HttpUpstreamImpl>(callbacks_, *config_, stream_info_);\n1658:     upstream_->setTunnelCreationCallbacks(creation_callbacks_);\n1659:   }\n1660: \n1661:   NiceMock<MockUpstreamTunnelCallbacks> callbacks_;\n1662:   NiceMock<StreamInfo::MockStreamInfo> stream_info_;\n1663:   NiceMock<Http::MockRequestEncoder> request_encoder_;\n1664:   NiceMock<MockTunnelCreationCallbacks> creation_callbacks_;\n1665:   std::unique_ptr<NiceMock<MockUdpTunnelingConfig>> config_;\n1666:   std::unique_ptr<Http::HeaderEvaluator> header_evaluator_;\n1667:   std::unique_ptr<HttpUpstreamImpl> upstream_;\n1668: };\n1669: \n1670: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, EncodeData) {\n1671:   setup();\n1672:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n1673: \n1674:   EXPECT_CALL(request_encoder_, encodeData(_, false));\n1675:   Buffer::OwnedImpl data;\n1676:   upstream_->encodeData(data);\n1677: }\n1678: \n1679: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, WatermarksCallBack) {\n1680:   setup();\n1681: \n1682:   EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, onAboveWriteBufferHighWatermark());\n1683:   upstream_->onAboveWriteBufferHighWatermark();\n1684:   EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, onBelowWriteBufferLowWatermark());\n1685:   upstream_->onBelowWriteBufferLowWatermark();\n1686: }\n1687: \n1688: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, OnResetStream) {\n1689:   setup();\n1690:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n1691: \n1692:   // If the creation callbacks are active will resetting the stream, it means that response\n1693:   // headers were not received, so it's expected to be a failure.\n1694:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamFailure());\n1695:   upstream_->onResetStream(Http::StreamResetReason::ConnectionTimeout, \"reason\");\n1696: }\n1697: \n1698: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, LocalCloseByDownstreamResetsStream) {\n1699:   setup();\n1700:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n1701: \n1702:   // If the creation callbacks are active will resetting the stream, it means that response\n1703:   // headers were not received, so it's expected to be a failure.\n1704:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamFailure());\n1705:   EXPECT_CALL(request_encoder_.stream_, resetStream(Http::StreamResetReason::LocalReset));\n1706:   upstream_->onDownstreamEvent(Network::ConnectionEvent::LocalClose);\n1707: }\n1708: \n1709: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, RemoteCloseByDownstreamResetsStream) {\n1710:   setup();\n1711:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n1712: \n1713:   // If the creation callbacks are active will resetting the stream, it means that response\n1714:   // headers were not received, so it's expected to be a failure.\n1715:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamFailure());\n1716:   EXPECT_CALL(request_encoder_.stream_, resetStream(Http::StreamResetReason::LocalReset));\n1717:   upstream_->onDownstreamEvent(Network::ConnectionEvent::RemoteClose);\n1718: }\n1719: \n1720: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, NullOperationFunctions) {\n1721:   setup();\n1722: \n1723:   // Calling functions that implemented by no-op for coverage.\n1724:   upstream_->responseDecoder().decodeMetadata(nullptr);\n1725:   upstream_->responseDecoder().decode1xxHeaders(nullptr);\n1726:   std::array<char, 1024> buffer;\n1727:   OutputBufferStream ostream{buffer.data(), buffer.size()};\n1728:   upstream_->responseDecoder().dumpState(ostream, 1);\n1729: }\n1730: \n1731: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, FailureResponseHeadersNot200Status) {\n1732:   setup();\n1733:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n1734: \n1735:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamFailure());\n1736: \n1737:   Http::ResponseHeaderMapPtr response_headers(\n1738:       new Http::TestResponseHeaderMapImpl{{\":status\", \"500\"}, {\"Capsule-Protocol\", \"?1\"}});\n1739:   upstream_->responseDecoder().decodeHeaders(std::move(response_headers), /*end_stream=*/false);\n1740: }\n1741: \n1742: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, FailureResponseHeadersEndStream) {\n1743:   setup();\n1744:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n1745: \n1746:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamFailure());\n1747: \n1748:   Http::ResponseHeaderMapPtr response_headers(\n1749:       new Http::TestResponseHeaderMapImpl{{\":status\", \"101\"}, {\"upgrade\", \"connect-udp\"}});\n1750:   upstream_->responseDecoder().decodeHeaders(std::move(response_headers), /*end_stream=*/true);\n1751: }\n1752: \n1753: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, SuccessResponseHeaders) {\n1754:   setup();\n1755:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n1756: \n1757:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamFailure()).Times(0);\n1758:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamSuccess(_));\n1759: \n1760:   Http::ResponseHeaderMapPtr response_headers(\n1761:       new Http::TestResponseHeaderMapImpl{{\":status\", \"101\"}, {\"upgrade\", \"connect-udp\"}});\n1762:   upstream_->responseDecoder().decodeHeaders(std::move(response_headers), /*end_stream=*/false);\n1763: }\n1764: \n1765: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, DecodeData) {\n1766:   setup();\n1767:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n1768: \n1769:   Buffer::OwnedImpl data;\n1770: \n1771:   // Second decodeData call will reset the stream, because it is end of stream.\n1772:   // Since response headers were not received it's considered as a failure.\n1773:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamFailure());\n1774:   EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, onUpstreamData(_, _))\n1775:       .WillOnce(Invoke([](Buffer::Instance&, bool end_stream) { EXPECT_FALSE(end_stream); }))\n1776:       .WillOnce(Invoke([](Buffer::Instance&, bool end_stream) { EXPECT_TRUE(end_stream); }));\n1777: \n1778:   upstream_->responseDecoder().decodeData(data, /*end_stream=*/false);\n1779:   upstream_->responseDecoder().decodeData(data, /*end_stream=*/true);\n1780: }\n1781: \n1782: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, DecodeDataAfterSuccessHeaders) {\n1783:   setup();\n1784:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n1785: \n1786:   Buffer::OwnedImpl data;\n1787:   Http::ResponseHeaderMapPtr response_headers(\n1788:       new Http::TestResponseHeaderMapImpl{{\":status\", \"101\"}, {\"upgrade\", \"connect-udp\"}});\n1789: \n1790:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamFailure()).Times(0);\n1791:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamSuccess(_));\n1792:   EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, onUpstreamData(_, _))\n1793:       .WillOnce(Invoke([](Buffer::Instance&, bool end_stream) { EXPECT_FALSE(end_stream); }))\n1794:       .WillOnce(Invoke([](Buffer::Instance&, bool end_stream) { EXPECT_TRUE(end_stream); }));\n1795: \n1796:   upstream_->responseDecoder().decodeHeaders(std::move(response_headers), /*end_stream=*/false);\n1797:   upstream_->responseDecoder().decodeData(data, /*end_stream=*/false);\n1798:   upstream_->responseDecoder().decodeData(data, /*end_stream=*/true);\n1799: }\n1800: \n1801: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, DecodeTrailers) {\n1802:   setup();\n1803:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n1804: \n1805:   // Decode trailers should reset the stream.\n1806:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamFailure());\n1807:   upstream_->responseDecoder().decodeTrailers(nullptr);\n1808: }\n1809: \n1810: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, DecodeTrailersAfterSuccessHeaders) {\n1811:   setup();\n1812:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n1813: \n1814:   Http::ResponseHeaderMapPtr response_headers(\n1815:       new Http::TestResponseHeaderMapImpl{{\":status\", \"101\"}, {\"upgrade\", \"connect-udp\"}});\n1816: \n1817:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamFailure()).Times(0);\n1818:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamSuccess(_));\n1819: \n1820:   upstream_->responseDecoder().decodeHeaders(std::move(response_headers), /*end_stream=*/false);\n1821:   upstream_->responseDecoder().decodeTrailers(nullptr);\n1822: }\n1823: \n1824: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, EncodeHeaders) {\n1825:   HeaderToAdd header{\"test_key\", \"test_val\"};\n1826:   absl::optional<uint32_t> port;\n1827:   bool is_ssl = false;\n1828: \n1829:   setup(header);\n1830: \n1831:   EXPECT_CALL(*config_, proxyHost(_)).WillRepeatedly(Return(\"proxy.host\"));\n1832:   EXPECT_CALL(*config_, proxyPort()).WillRepeatedly(ReturnRef(port));\n1833:   EXPECT_CALL(*config_, targetHost(_)).WillRepeatedly(Return(\"target.host\"));\n1834:   EXPECT_CALL(*config_, defaultTargetPort()).WillRepeatedly(Return(200));\n1835: \n1836:   auto expected_headers = expectedHeaders(\n1837:       is_ssl, /*use_post=*/false, /*opt_authority=*/\"proxy.host\",\n1838:       /*opt_path=*/\"/.well-known/masque/udp/target.host/200/\", /*header_to_add=*/header);\n1839: \n1840:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expected_headers, is_ssl);\n1841: }\n1842: \n1843: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, EncodeHeadersWithPost) {\n1844:   std::string post_path = \"/post/path\";\n1845:   absl::optional<uint32_t> port = 100;\n1846:   bool is_ssl = true;\n1847: \n1848:   setup();\n1849: \n1850:   EXPECT_CALL(*config_, proxyHost(_)).WillRepeatedly(Return(\"proxy.host\"));\n1851:   EXPECT_CALL(*config_, proxyPort()).WillRepeatedly(ReturnRef(port));\n1852:   EXPECT_CALL(*config_, usePost()).WillRepeatedly(Return(true));\n1853:   EXPECT_CALL(*config_, postPath()).WillRepeatedly(ReturnRef(post_path));\n1854: \n1855:   auto expected_headers =\n1856:       expectedHeaders(is_ssl, /*use_post=*/true, /*opt_authority=*/\"proxy.host:100\",\n1857:                       /*opt_path=*/post_path, /*header_to_add=*/absl::nullopt);\n1858: \n1859:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expected_headers, is_ssl);\n1860: }\n1861: \n1862: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, EncodeHeadersWithFilterStateOverrides) {\n1863:   HeaderToAdd header{\"test_key\", \"test_val\"};\n1864:   bool is_ssl = false;\n1865: \n1866:   setup(header);\n1867:   filterStateOverride(30, 60);\n1868: \n1869:   EXPECT_CALL(*config_, proxyHost(_)).WillRepeatedly(Return(\"proxy.host\"));\n1870:   EXPECT_CALL(*config_, targetHost(_)).WillRepeatedly(Return(\"target.host\"));\n1871: \n1872:   // Filter state override has precedence, so they are not called.\n1873:   EXPECT_CALL(*config_, proxyPort()).Times(0);\n1874:   EXPECT_CALL(*config_, defaultTargetPort()).Times(0);\n1875: \n1876:   auto expected_headers = expectedHeaders(\n1877:       is_ssl, /*use_post=*/false, /*opt_authority=*/\"proxy.host:30\",\n1878:       /*opt_path=*/\"/.well-known/masque/udp/target.host/60/\", /*header_to_add=*/header);\n1879: \n1880:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expected_headers, is_ssl);\n1881: }\n1882: \n1883: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, TargetHostPercentEncoding) {\n1884:   bool is_ssl = false;\n1885:   setup();\n1886: \n1887:   EXPECT_CALL(*config_, proxyHost(_)).WillRepeatedly(Return(\"proxy.host\"));\n1888:   EXPECT_CALL(*config_, targetHost(_)).WillRepeatedly(Return(\"2001:db8::42\"));\n1889: \n1890:   auto expected_headers =\n1891:       expectedHeaders(is_ssl, /*use_post=*/false, /*opt_authority=*/\"proxy.host:10\",\n1892:                       /*opt_path=*/\"/.well-known/masque/udp/2001%3Adb8%3A%3A42/20/\");\n1893: \n1894:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expected_headers, is_ssl);\n1895: }\n1896: \n1897: class TunnelingConnectionPoolImplTest : public testing::Test {\n1898: public:\n1899:   void setup() {\n1900:     Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::core::v3::HeaderValueOption> headers_to_add;\n1901:     header_evaluator_ = Envoy::Router::HeaderParser::configure(headers_to_add);\n1902:     config_ = std::make_unique<NiceMock<MockUdpTunnelingConfig>>(*header_evaluator_);\n1903:     stream_info_.downstream_connection_info_provider_->setConnectionID(0);\n1904:     session_access_logs_ = std::make_unique<std::vector<AccessLog::InstanceSharedPtr>>();\n1905:     pool_ = std::make_unique<TunnelingConnectionPoolImpl>(\n1906:         cluster_, &context_, *config_, callbacks_, stream_info_, false, *session_access_logs_);\n1907:   }\n1908: \n1909:   void createNewStream() { pool_->newStream(stream_callbacks_); }\n1910: \n1911:   NiceMock<Upstream::MockThreadLocalCluster> cluster_;\n1912:   NiceMock<Upstream::MockLoadBalancerContext> context_;\n1913:   std::unique_ptr<Http::HeaderEvaluator> header_evaluator_;\n1914:   std::unique_ptr<NiceMock<MockUdpTunnelingConfig>> config_;\n1915:   NiceMock<MockUpstreamTunnelCallbacks> callbacks_;\n1916:   NiceMock<StreamInfo::MockStreamInfo> stream_info_;\n1917:   std::unique_ptr<std::vector<AccessLog::InstanceSharedPtr>> session_access_logs_;\n1918:   NiceMock<MockHttpStreamCallbacks> stream_callbacks_;\n1919:   NiceMock<Http::MockRequestEncoder> request_encoder_;\n1920:   std::shared_ptr<NiceMock<Upstream::MockHostDescription>> upstream_host_{\n1921:       new NiceMock<Upstream::MockHostDescription>()};\n1922:   std::unique_ptr<TunnelingConnectionPoolImpl> pool_;\n1923: };\n1924: \n1925: TEST_F(TunnelingConnectionPoolImplTest, ValidPool) {\n1926:   setup();\n1927:   EXPECT_TRUE(pool_->valid());\n1928: }\n1929: \n1930: TEST_F(TunnelingConnectionPoolImplTest, InvalidPool) {\n1931:   EXPECT_CALL(cluster_, httpConnPool(_, _, _)).WillOnce(Return(absl::nullopt));\n1932:   setup();\n1933:   EXPECT_FALSE(pool_->valid());\n1934: }\n1935: \n1936: TEST_F(TunnelingConnectionPoolImplTest, OnNewStream) {\n1937:   setup();\n1938:   EXPECT_CALL(cluster_.conn_pool_, newStream(_, _, _));\n1939:   createNewStream();\n1940: }\n1941: \n1942: TEST_F(TunnelingConnectionPoolImplTest, PoolFailure) {\n1943:   setup();\n1944:   createNewStream();\n1945:   EXPECT_CALL(stream_callbacks_, onStreamFailure(_, _, _));\n1946: \n1947:   std::string upstream_host_name = \"upstream_host_test\";\n1948:   EXPECT_CALL(*upstream_host_, hostname()).WillOnce(ReturnRef(upstream_host_name));\n1949:   pool_->onPoolFailure(Http::ConnectionPool::PoolFailureReason::Timeout, \"reason\", upstream_host_);\n1950:   EXPECT_EQ(stream_info_.upstreamInfo()->upstreamHost()->hostname(), upstream_host_name);\n1951:   EXPECT_EQ(stream_info_.upstreamInfo()->upstreamTransportFailureReason(), \"reason\");\n1952: }\n1953: \n1954: TEST_F(TunnelingConnectionPoolImplTest, PoolReady) {\n1955:   setup();\n1956:   createNewStream();\n1957:   EXPECT_CALL(request_encoder_.stream_, addCallbacks(_));\n1958: \n1959:   std::string upstream_host_name = \"upstream_host_test\";\n1960:   EXPECT_CALL(*upstream_host_, hostname()).WillOnce(ReturnRef(upstream_host_name));\n1961:   pool_->onPoolReady(request_encoder_, upstream_host_, stream_info_, absl::nullopt);\n1962:   EXPECT_EQ(stream_info_.upstreamInfo()->upstreamHost()->hostname(), upstream_host_name);\n1963: }\n1964: \n1965: TEST_F(TunnelingConnectionPoolImplTest, OnStreamFailure) {\n1966:   setup();\n1967:   createNewStream();\n1968:   EXPECT_CALL(stream_callbacks_,\n1969:               onStreamFailure(ConnectionPool::PoolFailureReason::RemoteConnectionFailure, \"\", _));\n1970:   pool_->onStreamFailure();\n1971: }\n1972: \n1973: TEST_F(TunnelingConnectionPoolImplTest, OnStreamSuccess) {\n1974:   setup();\n1975:   createNewStream();\n1976:   EXPECT_CALL(stream_callbacks_, onStreamReady(_, _, _, _, _));\n1977:   pool_->onStreamSuccess(request_encoder_);\n1978: }\n1979: \n1980: TEST_F(TunnelingConnectionPoolImplTest, FactoryTest) {\n1981:   setup();\n1982: \n1983:   TunnelingConnectionPoolFactory factory;\n1984:   auto valid_pool = factory.createConnPool(cluster_, &context_, *config_, callbacks_, stream_info_,\n1985:                                            false, *session_access_logs_);\n1986:   EXPECT_FALSE(valid_pool == nullptr);\n1987: \n1988:   EXPECT_CALL(cluster_, httpConnPool(_, _, _)).WillOnce(Return(absl::nullopt));\n1989:   auto invalid_pool = factory.createConnPool(cluster_, &context_, *config_, callbacks_,\n1990:                                              stream_info_, false, *session_access_logs_);\n1991:   EXPECT_TRUE(invalid_pool == nullptr);\n1992: }\n1993: \n1994: TEST(TunnelingConfigImplTest, DefaultConfigs) {\n1995:   NiceMock<Server::Configuration::MockFactoryContext> context;\n1996:   TunnelingConfig proto_config;\n1997:   proto_config.set_use_post(true);\n1998:   TunnelingConfigImpl config(proto_config, context);\n1999: \n2000:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config.maxConnectAttempts());\n2001:   EXPECT_EQ(1024, config.maxBufferedDatagrams());\n2002:   EXPECT_EQ(16384, config.maxBufferedBytes());\n2003: }\n2004: \n2005: TEST(TunnelingConfigImplTest, DefaultPostPath) {\n2006:   NiceMock<Server::Configuration::MockFactoryContext> context;\n2007:   TunnelingConfig proto_config;\n2008:   proto_config.set_use_post(true);\n2009:   TunnelingConfigImpl config(proto_config, context);\n2010: \n2011:   EXPECT_EQ(\"/\", config.postPath());\n2012: }\n2013: \n2014: TEST(TunnelingConfigImplTest, PostPathWithoutPostMethod) {\n2015:   NiceMock<Server::Configuration::MockFactoryContext> context;\n2016:   TunnelingConfig proto_config;\n2017:   proto_config.set_post_path(\"/path\");\n2018:   EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(TunnelingConfigImpl(proto_config, context), EnvoyException,\n2019:                             \"Can't set a post path when POST method isn't used\");\n2020: }\n2021: \n2022: TEST(TunnelingConfigImplTest, PostWithInvalidPath) {\n2023:   NiceMock<Server::Configuration::MockFactoryContext> context;\n2024:   TunnelingConfig proto_config;\n2025:   proto_config.set_use_post(true);\n2026:   proto_config.set_post_path(\"path\");\n2027:   EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(TunnelingConfigImpl(proto_config, context), EnvoyException,\n2028:                             \"Path must start with '/'\");\n2029: }\n2030: \n2031: TEST(TunnelingConfigImplTest, ValidProxyPort) {\n2032:   NiceMock<Server::Configuration::MockFactoryContext> context;\n2033:   TunnelingConfig proto_config;\n2034:   proto_config.mutable_proxy_port()->set_value(443);\n2035:   TunnelingConfigImpl config(proto_config, context);\n2036:   EXPECT_EQ(443, config.proxyPort());\n2037: }\n2038: \n2039: TEST(TunnelingConfigImplTest, ProxyPortOutOfRange) {\n2040:   NiceMock<Server::Configuration::MockFactoryContext> context;\n2041: \n2042:   {\n2043:     TunnelingConfig proto_config;\n2044:     proto_config.mutable_proxy_port()->set_value(0);\n2045:     EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(TunnelingConfigImpl(proto_config, context), EnvoyException,\n2046:                               \"Port value not in range\");\n2047:   }\n2048:   {\n2049:     TunnelingConfig proto_config;\n2050:     proto_config.mutable_proxy_port()->set_value(65536);\n2051:     EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(TunnelingConfigImpl(proto_config, context), EnvoyException,\n2052:                               \"Port value not in range\");\n2053:   }\n2054: }\n2055: \n2056: TEST(TunnelingConfigImplTest, InvalidHeadersToAdd) {\n2057:   NiceMock<Server::Configuration::MockFactoryContext> context;\n2058: \n2059:   {\n2060:     TunnelingConfig proto_config;\n2061:     auto* header_to_add = proto_config.add_headers_to_add();\n2062:     auto* header = header_to_add->mutable_header();\n2063:     // Can't add pseudo header.\n2064:     header->set_key(\":method\");\n2065:     header->set_value(\"GET\");\n2066:     EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(TunnelingConfigImpl(proto_config, context), EnvoyException,\n2067:                               \":-prefixed or host headers may not be modified\");\n2068:   }\n2069: \n2070:   {\n2071:     TunnelingConfig proto_config;\n2072:     auto* header_to_add = proto_config.add_headers_to_add();\n2073:     auto* header = header_to_add->mutable_header();\n2074:     // Can't modify host.\n2075:     header->set_key(\"host\");\n2076:     header->set_value(\"example.net:80\");\n2077:     EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(TunnelingConfigImpl(proto_config, context), EnvoyException,\n2078:                               \":-prefixed or host headers may not be modified\");\n2079:   }\n2080: }\n2081: \n2082: TEST(TunnelingConfigImplTest, HeadersToAdd) {\n2083:   NiceMock<Server::Configuration::MockFactoryContext> context;\n2084:   NiceMock<StreamInfo::MockStreamInfo> stream_info;\n2085: \n2086:   stream_info.filterState()->setData(\n2087:       \"test_key\", std::make_shared<Envoy::Router::StringAccessorImpl>(\"test_val\"),\n2088:       Envoy::StreamInfo::FilterState::StateType::Mutable);\n2089: \n2090:   TunnelingConfig proto_config;\n2091:   auto* header_to_add = proto_config.add_headers_to_add();\n2092:   auto* header = header_to_add->mutable_header();\n2093:   header->set_key(\"test_key\");\n2094:   header->set_value(\"%FILTER_STATE(test_key:PLAIN)%\");\n2095:   TunnelingConfigImpl config(proto_config, context);\n2096: \n2097:   auto headers = Http::TestRequestHeaderMapImpl{{\":scheme\", \"http\"}, {\":authority\", \"host.com\"}};\n2098:   config.headerEvaluator().evaluateHeaders(headers, {}, stream_info);\n2099:   EXPECT_EQ(\"test_val\", headers.get_(\"test_key\"));\n2100: }\n2101: \n2102: TEST(TunnelingConfigImplTest, ProxyHostFromFilterState) {\n2103:   NiceMock<Server::Configuration::MockFactoryContext> context;\n2104:   NiceMock<StreamInfo::MockStreamInfo> stream_info;\n2105: \n2106:   stream_info.filterState()->setData(\n2107:       \"test-proxy-host\", std::make_shared<Envoy::Router::StringAccessorImpl>(\"test.host.com\"),\n2108:       Envoy::StreamInfo::FilterState::StateType::Mutable);\n2109: \n2110:   TunnelingConfig proto_config;\n2111:   proto_config.set_proxy_host(\"%FILTER_STATE(test-proxy-host:PLAIN)%\");\n2112:   TunnelingConfigImpl config(proto_config, context);\n2113: \n2114:   EXPECT_EQ(\"test.host.com\", config.proxyHost(stream_info));\n2115: }\n2116: \n2117: TEST(TunnelingConfigImplTest, TargetHostFromFilterState) {\n2118:   NiceMock<Server::Configuration::MockFactoryContext> context;\n2119:   NiceMock<StreamInfo::MockStreamInfo> stream_info;\n2120: \n2121:   stream_info.filterState()->setData(\n2122:       \"test-proxy-host\", std::make_shared<Envoy::Router::StringAccessorImpl>(\"test.host.com\"),\n2123:       Envoy::StreamInfo::FilterState::StateType::Mutable);\n2124: \n2125:   TunnelingConfig proto_config;\n2126:   proto_config.set_target_host(\"%FILTER_STATE(test-proxy-host:PLAIN)%\");\n2127:   TunnelingConfigImpl config(proto_config, context);\n2128: \n2129:   EXPECT_EQ(\"test.host.com\", config.targetHost(stream_info));\n2130: }\n2131: \n2132: TEST(TunnelingConfigImplTest, BufferingState) {\n2133:   NiceMock<Server::Configuration::MockFactoryContext> context;\n2134: \n2135:   {\n2136:     TunnelingConfig proto_config;\n2137:     TunnelingConfigImpl config(proto_config, context);\n2138:     // Buffering should be disabled by default.\n2139:     EXPECT_FALSE(config.bufferEnabled());\n2140:   }\n2141: \n2142:   {\n2143:     TunnelingConfig proto_config;\n2144:     proto_config.mutable_buffer_options(); // Will set buffering.\n2145:     TunnelingConfigImpl config(proto_config, context);\n2146:     EXPECT_TRUE(config.bufferEnabled());\n2147:   }\n2148: }\n2149: \n2150: } // namespace\n2151: } // namespace UdpProxy\n2152: } // local_ip = nullptr,\\n104:                                bool expect_connect = false, int connect_sys_errno = 0) {\\n105:       EXPECT_CALL(*idle_timer_, enableTimer(parent_.config_->sessionTimeout(), nullptr));\\n106:       if (expect_connect) {\\n107:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, connect(_))\\n108:             .WillOnce(Invoke([connect_sys_errno]() -> Api::SysCallIntResult {\\n109:               if (!connect_sys_errno) {\\n110:                 return Api::SysCallIntResult{0, 0};\\n111:               } else {\\n112:                 return Api::SysCallIntResult{-1, connect_sys_errno};\\n113:               }\\n114:             }));\\n115:       } else {\\n116:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, connect(_)).Times(0);\\n117:       }\\n118:       if (!connect_sys_errno) {\\n119:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, sendmsg(_, 1, 0, _, _))\\n120:             .WillOnce(Invoke(\\n121:                 [this, data, local_ip, sys_errno](\\n122:                     const Buffer::RawSlice* slices, uint64_t, int,\\n123:                     const Network::Address::Ip* self_ip,\\n124:                     const Network::Address::Instance& peer_address) -> Api::IoCallUint64Result {\\n125:                   EXPECT_EQ(data, absl::string_view(static_cast<const char*>(slices[0].mem_),\\n126:                                                     slices[0].len_));\\n127:                   EXPECT_EQ(peer_address, *upstream_address_);\\n128:                   if (local_ip == nullptr) {\\n129:                     EXPECT_EQ(nullptr, self_ip);\\n130:                   } else {\\n131:                     EXPECT_EQ(self_ip->addressAsString(), local_ip->addressAsString());\\n132:                   }\\n133:                   // For suppression of clang-tidy NewDeleteLeaks rule, don't use the ternary\\n134:                   // operator.\\n135:                   if (sys_errno == 0) {\\n136:                     return makeNoError(data.size());\\n137:                   } else {\\n138:                     return makeError(sys_errno);\\n139:                   }\\n140:                 }));\\n141:       }\\n142:     }\\n143: \\n144:     void recvDataFromUpstream(const std::string& data, int recv_sys_errno = 0,\\n145:                               int send_sys_errno = 0) {\\n146:       EXPECT_CALL(*idle_timer_, enableTimer(parent_.config_->sessionTimeout(), nullptr));\\n147: \\n148:       if (parent_.expect_gro_) {\\n149:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, supportsUdpGro());\\n150:       }\\n151:       EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, supportsMmsg()).Times(1u);\\n152:       // Return the datagram.\\n153:       EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, recvmsg(_, 1, _, _))\\n154:           .WillOnce(\\n155:               Invoke([this, data, recv_sys_errno](\\n156:                          Buffer::RawSlice* slices, const uint64_t, uint32_t,\\n157:                          Network::IoHandle::RecvMsgOutput& output) -> Api::IoCallUint64Result {\\n158:                 if (recv_sys_errno != 0) {\\n159:                   return makeError(recv_sys_errno);\\n160:                 } else {\\n161:                   ASSERT(data.size() <= slices[0].len_);\\n162:                   memcpy(slices[0].mem_, data.data(), data.size());\\n163:                   output.msg_[0].peer_address_ = upstream_address_;\\n164:                   return makeNoError(data.size());\\n165:                 }\\n166:               }));\\n167:       if (recv_sys_errno == 0) {\\n168:         // Send the datagram downstream.\\n169:         EXPECT_CALL(parent_.callbacks_.udp_listener_, send(_))\\n170:             .WillOnce(Invoke([data, send_sys_errno](\\n171:                                  const Network::UdpSendData& send_data) -> Api::IoCallUint64Result {\\n172:               // TODO(mattklein123): Verify peer/local address.\\n173:               EXPECT_EQ(send_data.buffer_.toString(), data);\\n174:               if (send_sys_errno == 0) {\\n175:                 send_data.buffer_.drain(send_data.buffer_.length());\\n176:                 return makeNoError(data.size());\\n177:               } else {\\n178:                 return makeError(send_sys_errno);\\n179:               }\\n180:             }));\\n181:         // Return an EAGAIN result.\\n182:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, recvmsg(_, 1, _, _))\\n183:             .WillOnce(Return(ByMove(\\n184:                 Api::IoCallUint64Result(0, Network::IoSocketError::getIoSocketEagainError()))));\\n185:       }\\n186: \\n187:       // Kick off the receive.\\n188:       file_event_cb_(Event::FileReadyType::Read);\\n189:     }\\n190: \\n191:     UdpProxyFilterTest& parent_;\\n192:     const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr upstream_address_;\\n193:     Event::MockTimer* idle_timer_{};\\n194:     NiceMock<Network::MockSocket>* socket_;\\n195:     std::map<int, std::map<int, int>> sock_opts_;\\n196:     Event::FileReadyCb config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n891:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n892: \n893:   factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.cluster_\n894:       .priority_set_.runUpdateCallbacks(0, {},\n895:                                         {factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_\n896:                                              .thread_local_cluster_.lb_.host_});\n897:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n898:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n899: \n900:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n901: ",

17. mcp__sourcegraph__sg_read_file @ -
Input
{
  "endLine": 100,
  "path": "changelogs/current.yaml",
  "repo": "github.com/sg-evals/envoy--1ae957c1",
  "startLine": 1
}
Output
{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: date: Pending\\n2: \\n3: behavior_changes:\\n4: # *Changes that are expected to cause an incompatibility if applicable; deployment changes are likely required*\\n5: - area: thread_local\\n6:   change: |\\n7:     Changes the behavior of the ``SlotImpl`` class destructor. With this change the destructor can be called on any thread.\\n8:     This behavior can be reverted by setting the runtime flag ``envoy.reloadable_features.allow_slot_destroy_on_worker_threads``\\n9:     to false.\\n10: \\n11: minor_behavior_changes:\\n12: # *Changes that may cause incompatibilities for some users, but should not for most*\\n13: - area: tracers\\n14:   change: |\\n15:     Set status code for OpenTelemetry tracers (previously unset).\\n16: - area: xds\\n17:   change: |\\n18:     Updated xDS-TP path naming to better comply with RFC-3986. Encoded resource paths can now include an a colon ``:``,\\n19:     instead of ``%3A``. This behavior can be reverted by setting the runtime flag\\n20:     ``envoy.reloadable_features.xdstp_path_avoid_colon_encoding`` to ``false``.\\n21: - area: udp\\n22:   change: |\\n23:     Change GRO read buffer to 64kB to avoid MSG_TRUNC. And change the way to limit the number of packets processed per event\\n24:     loop to work with GRO. This behavior can be reverted by setting runtime guard\\n25:     ``envoy.reloadable_features.udp_socket_apply_aggregated_read_limit`` to false.\\n26: - area: statistics\\n27:   change: |\\n28:     Hot restart statistics like hot_restart_epoch are only set when hot restart is enabled.\\n29: \\n30: bug_fixes:\\n31: # *Changes expected to improve the state of the world and are unlikely to have negative effects*\\n32: - area: outlier detection\\n33:   change: |\\n34:     Fixed :ref:`successful_active_health_check_uneject_host\\n35:     <envoy_v3_api_field_config.cluster.v3.OutlierDetection.successful_active_health_check_uneject_host>`.\\n36:     Before, a failed health check could uneject the host if the ``FAILED_ACTIVE_HC`` health flag had not been set.\\n37: - area: tls\\n38:   change: |\\n39:     Fix a RELEASE_ASSERT when using :ref:`auto_sni <envoy_v3_api_field_config.core.v3.UpstreamHttpProtocolOptions.auto_sni>`\\n40:     if the downstream request ``:authority`` was longer than 255 characters.\\n41: - area: http\\n42:   change: |\\n43:     Fix a crash when reloading the HTTP Connection Manager via ECDS.\\n44: - area: cares\\n45:   change: |\\n46:     Upgraded c-ares library to 1.20.1 and added fix to c-ares DNS implementation to additionally check for ``ARES_EREFUSED``,\\n47:     ``ARES_ESERVFAIL``and ``ARES_ENOTIMP`` status. Without this fix, ``DestroyChannelOnRefused`` and\\n48:     ``CustomResolverValidAfterChannelDestruction`` unit test will break.\\n49: - area: ext_authz\\n50:   change: |\\n51:     Handle ``append_action`` from :ref:`external authorization service <envoy_v3_api_msg_service.auth.v3.CheckResponse>`\\n52:     that was ignored.\\n53: \\n54: removed_config_or_runtime:\\n55: # *Normally occurs at the end of the* :ref:`deprecation period <deprecated>`\\n56: - area: http\\n57:   change: |\\n58:     Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.use_cluster_cache_for_alt_protocols_filter`` runtime flag and lagacy code paths.\\n59: - area: http\\n60:   change: |\\n61:     Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.proxy_status_upstream_request_timeout`` runtime flag and lagacy code paths.\\n62: - area: http\\n63:   change: |\\n64:     Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.handle_uppercase_scheme`` runtime flag and legacy code paths.\\n65: - area: tcp\\n66:   change: |\\n67:     Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.detect_and_raise_rst_tcp_connection`` runtime flag and legacy code paths.\\n68: - area: http\\n69:   change: |\\n70:     Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.lowercase_scheme`` runtime flag and lagacy code paths.\\n71: - area: upstream\\n72:   change: |\\n73:     Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.convert_legacy_lb_config`` runtime flag and lagacy code paths.\\n74: - area: router\\n75:   change: |\\n76:     Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.copy_response_code_to_downstream_stream_info`` runtime flag and legacy code paths.\\n77: \\n78: new_features:\\n79: - area: matching\\n80:   change: |\\n81:     Added :ref:`Filter State Input <envoy_v3_api_msg_extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.FilterStateInput>`\\n82:     for matching http input based on filter state objects.\\n83: - area: cares\\n84:   change: |\\n85:     Added :ref:`udp_max_queries<envoy_v3_api_field_extensions.network.dns_resolver.cares.v3.CaresDnsResolverConfig.udp_max_queries>`\\n86:     option to limit the number of UDP queries.\\n87: - area: http\\n88:   change: |\\n89:     Added :ref:`disable_shadow_host_suffix_append\\n90:     <envoy_v3_api_field_config.route.v3.RouteAction.RequestMirrorPolicy.disable_shadow_host_suffix_append>`\\n91:     in :ref:`request_mirror_policies <envoy_v3_api_field_config.route.v3.RouteAction.request_mirror_policies>`\\n92:     for disabling appending of the ``-shadow`` suffix to the shadowed host/authority header.\\n93: \\n94: deprecated:\\n95: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/envoy--1ae957c1@a0d69a14ad2283d6c8f001dc8b5cccc8cb09078e/-/blob/changelogs/current.yaml%3FL1-100\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: date: Pending\n2: \n3: behavior_changes:\n4: # *Changes that are expected to cause an incompatibility if applicable; deployment changes are likely required*\n5: - area: thread_local\n6:   change: |\n7:     Changes the behavior of the ``SlotImpl`` class destructor. With this change the destructor can be called on any thread.\n8:     This behavior can be reverted by setting the runtime flag ``envoy.reloadable_features.allow_slot_destroy_on_worker_threads``\n9:     to false.\n10: \n11: minor_behavior_changes:\n12: # *Changes that may cause incompatibilities for some users, but should not for most*\n13: - area: tracers\n14:   change: |\n15:     Set status code for OpenTelemetry tracers (previously unset).\n16: - area: xds\n17:   change: |\n18:     Updated xDS-TP path naming to better comply with RFC-3986. Encoded resource paths can now include an a colon ``:``,\n19:     instead of ``%3A``. This behavior can be reverted by setting the runtime flag\n20:     ``envoy.reloadable_features.xdstp_path_avoid_colon_encoding`` to ``false``.\n21: - area: udp\n22:   change: |\n23:     Change GRO read buffer to 64kB to avoid MSG_TRUNC. And change the way to limit the number of packets processed per event\n24:     loop to work with GRO. This behavior can be reverted by setting runtime guard\n25:     ``envoy.reloadable_features.udp_socket_apply_aggregated_read_limit`` to false.\n26: - area: statistics\n27:   change: |\n28:     Hot restart statistics like hot_restart_epoch are only set when hot restart is enabled.\n29: \n30: bug_fixes:\n31: # *Changes expected to improve the state of the world and are unlikely to have negative effects*\n32: - area: outlier detection\n33:   change: |\n34:     Fixed :ref:`successful_active_health_check_uneject_host\n35:     <envoy_v3_api_field_config.cluster.v3.OutlierDetection.successful_active_health_check_uneject_host>`.\n36:     Before, a failed health check could uneject the host if the ``FAILED_ACTIVE_HC`` health flag had not been set.\n37: - area: tls\n38:   change: |\n39:     Fix a RELEASE_ASSERT when using :ref:`auto_sni <envoy_v3_api_field_config.core.v3.UpstreamHttpProtocolOptions.auto_sni>`\n40:     if the downstream request ``:authority`` was longer than 255 characters.\n41: - area: http\n42:   change: |\n43:     Fix a crash when reloading the HTTP Connection Manager via ECDS.\n44: - area: cares\n45:   change: |\n46:     Upgraded c-ares library to 1.20.1 and added fix to c-ares DNS implementation to additionally check for ``ARES_EREFUSED``,\n47:     ``ARES_ESERVFAIL``and ``ARES_ENOTIMP`` status. Without this fix, ``DestroyChannelOnRefused`` and\n48:     ``CustomResolverValidAfterChannelDestruction`` unit test will break.\n49: - area: ext_authz\n50:   change: |\n51:     Handle ``append_action`` from :ref:`external authorization service <envoy_v3_api_msg_service.auth.v3.CheckResponse>`\n52:     that was ignored.\n53: \n54: removed_config_or_runtime:\n55: # *Normally occurs at the end of the* :ref:`deprecation period <deprecated>`\n56: - area: http\n57:   change: |\n58:     Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.use_cluster_cache_for_alt_protocols_filter`` runtime flag and lagacy code paths.\n59: - area: http\n60:   change: |\n61:     Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.proxy_status_upstream_request_timeout`` runtime flag and lagacy code paths.\n62: - area: http\n63:   change: |\n64:     Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.handle_uppercase_scheme`` runtime flag and legacy code paths.\n65: - area: tcp\n66:   change: |\n67:     Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.detect_and_raise_rst_tcp_connection`` runtime flag and legacy code paths.\n68: - area: http\n69:   change: |\n70:     Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.lowercase_scheme`` runtime flag and lagacy code paths.\n71: - area: upstream\n72:   change: |\n73:     Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.convert_legacy_lb_config`` runtime flag and lagacy code paths.\n74: - area: router\n75:   change: |\n76:     Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.copy_response_code_to_downstream_stream_info`` runtime flag and legacy code paths.\n77: \n78: new_features:\n79: - area: matching\n80:   change: |\n81:     Added :ref:`Filter State Input <envoy_v3_api_msg_extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.FilterStateInput>`\n82:     for matching http input based on filter state objects.\n83: - area: cares\n84:   change: |\n85:     Added :ref:`udp_max_queries<envoy_v3_api_field_extensions.network.dns_resolver.cares.v3.CaresDnsResolverConfig.udp_max_queries>`\n86:     option to limit the number of UDP queries.\n87: - area: http\n88:   change: |\n89:     Added :ref:`disable_shadow_host_suffix_append\n90:     <envoy_v3_api_field_config.route.v3.RouteAction.RequestMirrorPolicy.disable_shadow_host_suffix_append>`\n91:     in :ref:`request_mirror_policies <envoy_v3_api_field_config.route.v3.RouteAction.request_mirror_policies>`\n92:     for disabling appending of the ``-shadow`` suffix to the shadowed host/authority header.\n93: \n94: deprecated:\n95: ",

{\\n11: namespace UdpProxy {\\n12: \\n13: UdpProxyFilter::UdpProxyFilter(Network::UdpReadFilterCallbacks& callbacks,\\n14:                                const UdpProxyFilterConfigSharedPtr& config)\\n15:     : UdpListenerReadFilter(callbacks), config_(config),\\n16:       cluster_update_callbacks_(\\n17:           config->clusterManager().addThreadLocalClusterUpdateCallbacks(*this)) {\\n18:   for (const auto& entry : config_->allClusterNames()) {\\n19:     Upstream::ThreadLocalCluster* cluster = config->clusterManager().getThreadLocalCluster(entry);\\n20:     if (cluster != nullptr) {\\n21:       Upstream::ThreadLocalClusterCommand command = [&cluster]() -> Upstream::ThreadLocalCluster& {\\n22:         return *cluster;\\n23:       };\\n24:       onClusterAddOrUpdate(cluster->info()->name(), command);\\n25:     }\\n26:   }\\n27: \\n28:   if (!config_->proxyAccessLogs().empty()) {\\n29:     udp_proxy_stats_.emplace(StreamInfo::StreamInfoImpl(\\n30:         config_->timeSource(), nullptr, StreamInfo::FilterState::LifeSpan::Connection));\\n31:   }\\n32: }\\n33: \\n34: UdpProxyFilter::~UdpProxyFilter() {\\n35:   if (!config_->proxyAccessLogs().empty()) {\\n36:     fillProxyStreamInfo();\\n37:     for (const auto& access_log : config_->proxyAccessLogs()) {\\n38:       access_log->log({}, udp_proxy_stats_.value());\\n39:     }\\n40:   }\\n41: }\\n42: \\n43: void UdpProxyFilter::onClusterAddOrUpdate(absl::string_view cluster_name,\\n44:                                           Upstream::ThreadLocalClusterCommand& get_cluster) {\\n45:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"udp proxy: attaching to cluster {}\\\", cluster_name);\\n46: \\n47:   auto& cluster = get_cluster();\\n48:   ASSERT((!cluster_infos_.contains(cluster_name)) ||\\n49:          &cluster_infos_[cluster_name]->cluster_ != &cluster);\\n50: \\n51:   if (config_->usingPerPacketLoadBalancing()) {\\n52:     cluster_infos_.emplace(cluster_name,\\n53:                            std::make_unique<PerPacketLoadBalancingClusterInfo>(*this, cluster));\\n54:   } else {\\n55:     cluster_infos_.emplace(cluster_name,\\n56:                            std::make_unique<StickySessionClusterInfo>(*this, cluster));\\n57:   }\\n58: }\\n59: \\n60: void UdpProxyFilter::onClusterRemoval(const std::string& cluster) {\\n61:   if (!cluster_infos_.contains(cluster)) {\\n62:     return;\\n63:   }\\n64: \\n65:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"udp proxy: detaching from cluster {}\\\", cluster);\\n66:   cluster_infos_.erase(cluster);\\n67: }\\n68: \\n69: Network::FilterStatus UdpProxyFilter::onData(Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\\n70:   const std::string& route = config_->route(*data.addresses_.local_, *data.addresses_.peer_);\\n71:   if (!cluster_infos_.contains(route)) {\\n72:     config_->stats().downstream_sess_no_route_.inc();\\n73:     return Network::FilterStatus::StopIteration;\\n74:   }\\n75: \\n76:   return cluster_infos_[route]->onData(data);\\n77: }\\n78: \\n79: Network::FilterStatus UdpProxyFilter::onReceiveError(Api::IoError::IoErrorCode) {\\n80:   config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_errors_.inc();\\n81: \\n82:   return Network::FilterStatus::StopIteration;\\n83: }\\n84: \\n85: UdpProxyFilter::ClusterInfo::ClusterInfo(UdpProxyFilter& filter,\\n86:                                          Upstream::ThreadLocalCluster& cluster,\\n87:                                          SessionStorageType&& sessions)\\n88:     : filter_(filter), cluster_(cluster),\\n89:       cluster_stats_(generateStats(cluster.info()->statsScope())), sessions_(std::move(sessions)),\\n90:       member_update_cb_handle_(cluster.prioritySet().addMemberUpdateCb(\\n91:           [this](const Upstream::HostVector&, const Upstream::HostVector& hosts_removed) {\\n92:             for (const auto& host : hosts_removed) {\\n93:               // This is similar to removeSession() but slightly different due to removeSession()\\n94:               // also handling deletion of the host to session map entry if there are no sessions\\n95:               // left. It would be nice to unify the logic but that can be cleaned up later.\\n96:               auto host_sessions_it = host_to_sessions_.find(host.get());\\n97:               if (host_sessions_it != host_to_sessions_.end()) {\\n98:                 for (auto& session : host_sessions_it->second) {\\n99:                   session->onSessionComplete();\\n100:                   ASSERT(sessions_.count(session) == 1);\\n101:                   sessions_.erase(session);\\n102:                 }\\n103:                 host_to_sessions_.erase(host_sessions_it);\\n104:               }\\n105:             }\\n106:           })) {}\\n107: \\n108: UdpProxyFilter::ClusterInfo::~ClusterInfo() {\\n109:   // Sanity check the session accounting. This is not as fast as a straight teardown, but this is\\n110:   // not a performance critical path.\\n111:   while (!sessions_.empty()) {\\n112:     removeSession(sessions_.begin()->get());\\n113:   }\\n114:   ASSERT(host_to_sessions_.empty());\\n115: }\\n116: \\n117: void UdpProxyFilter::ClusterInfo::removeSession(ActiveSession* session) {\\n118:   if (session->host().has_value()) {\\n119:     // First remove from the host to sessions map, in case the host was resolved.\\n120:     ASSERT(host_to_sessions_[&session->host().value().get()].count(session) == 1);\\n121:     auto host_sessions_it = host_to_sessions_.find(&session->host().value().get());\\n122:     host_sessions_it->second.erase(session);\\n123:     if (host_sessions_it->second.empty()) {\\n124:       host_to_sessions_.erase(host_sessions_it);\\n125:     }\\n126:   }\\n127: \\n128:   session->onSessionComplete();\\n129: \\n130:   // Now remove it from the primary map.\\n131:   ASSERT(sessions_.count(session) == 1);\\n132:   sessions_.erase(session);\\n133: }\\n134: \\n135: UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession*\\n136: UdpProxyFilter::ClusterInfo::createSession(Network::UdpRecvData::LocalPeerAddresses&& addresses,\\n137:                                            const Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr& optional_host,\\n138:                                            bool defer_socket_creation) {\\n139:   if (!cluster_.info()\\n140:            ->resourceManager(Upstream::ResourcePriority::Default)\\n141:            .connections()\\n142:            .canCreate()) {\\n143:     ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"cannot create new connection.\\\");\\n144:     cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_overflow_.inc();\\n145:     return nullptr;\\n146:   }\\n147: \\n148:   if (defer_socket_creation) {\\n149:     ASSERT(!optional_host);\\n150:     return createSessionWithOptionalHost(std::move(addresses), nullptr);\\n151:   }\\n152: \\n153:   if (optional_host) {\\n154:     return createSessionWithOptionalHost(std::move(addresses), optional_host);\\n155:   }\\n156: \\n157:   auto host = chooseHost(addresses.peer_, nullptr);\\n158:   if (host == nullptr) {\\n159:     ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"cannot find any valid host.\\\");\\n160:     cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_none_healthy_.inc();\\n161:     return nullptr;\\n162:   }\\n163: \\n164:   return createSessionWithOptionalHost(std::move(addresses), host);\\n165: }\\n166: \\n167: UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession* UdpProxyFilter::ClusterInfo::createSessionWithOptionalHost(\\n168:     Network::UdpRecvData::LocalPeerAddresses&& addresses,\\n169:     const Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr& host) {\\n170:   ActiveSessionPtr new_session;\\n171:   if (filter_.config_->tunnelingConfig()) {\\n172:     ASSERT(!host);\\n173:     new_session = std::make_unique<TunnelingActiveSession>(*this, std::move(addresses));\\n174:   } else {\\n175:     new_session = std::make_unique<UdpActiveSession>(*this, std::move(addresses), host);\\n176:   }\\n177: \\n178:   new_session->createFilterChain();\\n179:   if (new_session->onNewSession()) {\\n180:     auto new_session_ptr = new_session.get();\\n181:     sessions_.emplace(std::move(new_session));\\n182:     return new_session_ptr;\\n183:   }\\n184: \\n185:   new_session->onSessionComplete();\\n186:   return nullptr;\\n187: }\\n188: \\n189: Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr UdpProxyFilter::ClusterInfo::chooseHost(\\n190:     const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& peer_address,\\n191:     const StreamInfo::StreamInfo* stream_info) const {\\n192:   UdpLoadBalancerContext context(filter_.config_->hashPolicy(), peer_address, stream_info);\\n193:   Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr host = cluster_.loadBalancer().chooseHost(&context);\\n194:   return host;\\n195: }\\n196: \\n197: UdpProxyFilter::StickySessionClusterInfo::StickySessionClusterInfo(\\n198:     UdpProxyFilter& filter, Upstream::ThreadLocalCluster& cluster)\\n199:     : ClusterInfo(filter, cluster,\\n200:                   SessionStorageType(1, HeterogeneousActiveSessionHash(false),\\n201:                                      HeterogeneousActiveSessionEqual(false))) {}\\n202: \\n203: Network::FilterStatus UdpProxyFilter::StickySessionClusterInfo::onData(Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\\n204:   bool defer_socket = filter_.config_->hasSessionFilters() || filter_.config_->tunnelingConfig();\\n205:   const auto active_session_it = sessions_.find(data.addresses_);\\n206:   ActiveSession* active_session;\\n207:   if (active_session_it == sessions_.end()) {\\n208:     active_session = createSession(std::move(data.addresses_), nullptr, defer_socket);\\n209:     if (active_session == nullptr) {\\n210:       return Network::FilterStatus::StopIteration;\\n211:     }\\n212:   } else {\\n213:     active_session = active_session_it->get();\\n214:     // We defer the socket creation when the session includes filters, so the filters can be\\n215:     // iterated before choosing the host, to allow dynamically choosing upstream host. Due to this,\\n216:     // we can't perform health checks during a session.\\n217:     // TODO(ohadvano): add similar functionality that is performed after session filter chain\\n218:     // iteration to signal filters about the unhealthy host, or replace the host during the session.\\n219:     if (!defer_socket &&\\n220:         active_session->host().value().get().coarseHealth() == Upstream::Host::Health::Unhealthy) {\\n221:       // If a host becomes unhealthy, we optimally would like to replace it with a new session\\n222:       // to a healthy host. We may eventually want to make this behavior configurable, but for now\\n223:       // this will be the universal behavior.\\n224:       auto host = chooseHost(data.addresses_.peer_, nullptr);\\n225:       if (host != nullptr && host->coarseHealth() != Upstream::Host::Health::Unhealthy &&\\n226:           host.get() != &active_session->host().value().get()) {\\n227:         ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"upstream session unhealthy, recreating the session\\\");\\n228:         removeSession(active_session);\\n229:         active_session = createSession(std::move(data.addresses_), host, false);\\n230:       } else {\\n231:         // In this case we could not get a better host, so just keep using the current session.\\n232:         ENVOY_LOG(trace, \\\"upstream session unhealthy, but unable to get a better host\\\");\\n233:       }\\n234:     }\\n235:   }\\n236: \\n237:   active_session->onData(data);\\n238: \\n239:   return Network::FilterStatus::StopIteration;\\n240: }\\n241: \\n242: UdpProxyFilter::PerPacketLoadBalancingClusterInfo::PerPacketLoadBalancingClusterInfo(\\n243:     UdpProxyFilter& filter, Upstream::ThreadLocalCluster& cluster)\\n244:     : ClusterInfo(filter, cluster,\\n245:                   SessionStorageType(1, HeterogeneousActiveSessionHash(true),\\n246:                                      HeterogeneousActiveSessionEqual(true))) {}\\n247: \\n248: Network::FilterStatus\\n249: UdpProxyFilter::PerPacketLoadBalancingClusterInfo::onData(Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\\n250:   auto host = chooseHost(data.addresses_.peer_, nullptr);\\n251:   if (host == nullptr) {\\n252:     ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"cannot find any valid host.\\\");\\n253:     cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_none_healthy_.inc();\\n254:     return Network::FilterStatus::StopIteration;\\n255:   }\\n256: \\n257:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"selected {} host as upstream.\\\", host->address()->asStringView());\\n258: \\n259:   LocalPeerHostAddresses key{data.addresses_, *host};\\n260:   const auto active_session_it = sessions_.find(key);\\n261:   ActiveSession* active_session;\\n262:   if (active_session_it == sessions_.end()) {\\n263:     active_session = createSession(std::move(data.addresses_), host, false);\\n264:     if (active_session == nullptr) {\\n265:       return Network::FilterStatus::StopIteration;\\n266:     }\\n267:   } else {\\n268:     active_session = active_session_it->get();\\n269:     ENVOY_LOG(trace, \\\"found already existing session on host {}.\\\",\\n270:               active_session->host().value().get().address()->asStringView());\\n271:   }\\n272: \\n273:   active_session->onData(data);\\n274: \\n275:   return Network::FilterStatus::StopIteration;\\n276: }\\n277: \\n278: std::atomic<uint64_t> UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::next_global_session_id_;\\n279: \\n280: UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::ActiveSession(ClusterInfo& cluster,\\n281:                                              Network::UdpRecvData::LocalPeerAddresses&& addresses,\\n282:                                              const Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr& host)\\n283:     : cluster_(cluster), addresses_(std::move(addresses)), host_(host),\\n284:       session_id_(next_global_session_id_++),\\n285:       idle_timer_(cluster.filter_.read_callbacks_->udpListener().dispatcher().createTimer(\\n286:           [this] { onIdleTimer(); })),\\n287:       udp_session_info_(StreamInfo::StreamInfoImpl(cluster_.filter_.config_->timeSource(),\\n288:                                                    createDownstreamConnectionInfoProvider(),\\n289:                                                    StreamInfo::FilterState::LifeSpan::Connection)) {\\n290:   udp_session_info_.setUpstreamInfo(std::make_shared<StreamInfo::UpstreamInfoImpl>());\\n291:   cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.inc();\\n292:   cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.inc();\\n293:   cluster_.cluster_.info()\\n294:       ->resourceManager(Upstream::ResourcePriority::Default)\\n295:       .connections()\\n296:       .inc();\\n297: }\\n298: \\n299: UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::UdpActiveSession(\\n300:     ClusterInfo& cluster, Network::UdpRecvData::LocalPeerAddresses&& addresses,\\n301:     const Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr& host)\\n302:     : ActiveSession(cluster, std::move(addresses), std::move(host)),\\n303:       use_original_src_ip_(cluster.filter_.config_->usingOriginalSrcIp()) {}\\n304: \\n305: UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::~ActiveSession() {\\n306:   ENVOY_BUG(on_session_complete_called_, \\\"onSessionComplete() not called\\\");\\n307: }\\n308: \\n309: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onSessionComplete() {\\n310:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"deleting the session: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\\\",\\n311:             addresses_.peer_->asStringView(), addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\\n312:             host_ != nullptr ? host_->address()->asStringView() : \\\"unknown\\\");\\n313: \\n314:   cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.dec();\\n315:   cluster_.cluster_.info()\\n316:       ->resourceManager(Upstream::ResourcePriority::Default)\\n317:       .connections()\\n318:       .dec();\\n319: \\n320:   disableAccessLogFlushTimer();\\n321: \\n322:   for (auto& active_read_filter : read_filters_) {\\n323:     active_read_filter->read_filter_->onSessionComplete();\\n324:   }\\n325: \\n326:   for (auto& active_write_filter : write_filters_) {\\n327:     active_write_filter->write_filter_->onSessionComplete();\\n328:   }\\n329: \\n330:   if (!cluster_.filter_.config_->sessionAccessLogs().empty()) {\\n331:     fillSessionStreamInfo();\\n332:     const Formatter::HttpFormatterContext log_context{\\n333:         nullptr, nullptr, nullptr, {}, AccessLog::AccessLogType::UdpSessionEnd};\\n334:     for (const auto& access_log : cluster_.filter_.config_->sessionAccessLogs()) {\\n335:       access_log->log(log_context, udp_session_info_);\\n336:     }\\n337:   }\\n338: \\n339:   on_session_complete_called_ = true;\\n340: }\\n341: \\n342: std::shared_ptr<Network::ConnectionInfoSetterImpl>\\n343: UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::createDownstreamConnectionInfoProvider() {\\n344:   auto downstream_connection_info_provider =\\n345:       std::make_shared<Network::ConnectionInfoSetterImpl>(addresses_.local_, addresses_.peer_);\\n346:   downstream_connection_info_provider->setConnectionID(session_id_);\\n347:   return downstream_connection_info_provider;\\n348: }\\n349: \\n350: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::fillSessionStreamInfo() {\\n351:   ProtobufWkt::Struct stats_obj;\\n352:   auto& fields_map = *stats_obj.mutable_fields();\\n353:   fields_map[\\\"cluster_name\\\"] = ValueUtil::stringValue(cluster_.cluster_.info()->name());\\n354:   fields_map[\\\"bytes_sent\\\"] = ValueUtil::numberValue(session_stats_.downstream_sess_tx_bytes_);\\n355:   fields_map[\\\"bytes_received\\\"] = ValueUtil::numberValue(session_stats_.downstream_sess_rx_bytes_);\\n356:   fields_map[\\\"errors_sent\\\"] = ValueUtil::numberValue(session_stats_.downstream_sess_tx_errors_);\\n357:   fields_map[\\\"datagrams_sent\\\"] =\\n358:       ValueUtil::numberValue(session_stats_.downstream_sess_tx_datagrams_);\\n359:   fields_map[\\\"datagrams_received\\\"] =\\n360:       ValueUtil::numberValue(session_stats_.downstream_sess_rx_datagrams_);\\n361: \\n362:   udp_session_info_.setDynamicMetadata(\\\"udp.proxy.session\\\", stats_obj);\\n363: }\\n364: \\n365: void UdpProxyFilter::fillProxyStreamInfo() {\\n366:   ProtobufWkt::Struct stats_obj;\\n367:   auto& fields_map = *stats_obj.mutable_fields();\\n368:   fields_map[\\\"bytes_sent\\\"] =\\n369:       ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_bytes_.value());\\n370:   fields_map[\\\"bytes_received\\\"] =\\n371:       ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_bytes_.value());\\n372:   fields_map[\\\"errors_sent\\\"] =\\n373:       ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_errors_.value());\\n374:   fields_map[\\\"errors_received\\\"] =\\n375:       ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_errors_.value());\\n376:   fields_map[\\\"datagrams_sent\\\"] =\\n377:       ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_datagrams_.value());\\n378:   fields_map[\\\"datagrams_received\\\"] =\\n379:       ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_datagrams_.value());\\n380:   fields_map[\\\"no_route\\\"] =\\n381:       ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_no_route_.value());\\n382:   fields_map[\\\"session_total\\\"] =\\n383:       ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\\n384:   fields_map[\\\"idle_timeout\\\"] = ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().idle_timeout_.value());\\n385: \\n386:   udp_proxy_stats_.value().setDynamicMetadata(\\\"udp.proxy.proxy\\\", stats_obj);\\n387: }\\n388: \\n389: void UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::onIdleTimer() {\\n390:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"session idle timeout: downstream={} local={}\\\", addresses_.peer_->asStringView(),\\n391:             addresses_.local_->asStringView());\\n392:   cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().idle_timeout_.inc();\\n393:   cluster_.removeSession(this);\\n394: }\\n395: \\n396: void UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::onReadReady() {\\n397:   resetIdleTimer();\\n398: \\n399:   // TODO(mattklein123): We should not be passing *addresses_.local_ to this function as we are\\n400:   //                     not trying to populate the local address for received packets.\\n401:   uint32_t packets_dropped = 0;\\n402:   const Api::IoErrorPtr result = Network::Utility::readPacketsFromSocket(\\n403:       udp_socket_->ioHandle(), *addresses_.local_, *this, cluster_.filter_.config_->timeSource(),\\n404:       cluster_.filter_.config_->upstreamSocketConfig().prefer_gro_, /*allow_mmsg=*/true,\\n405:       packets_dropped);\\n406:   if (result == nullptr) {\\n407:     udp_socket_->ioHandle().activateFileEvents(Event::FileReadyType::Read);\\n408:     return;\\n409:   }\\n410:   if (result->getErrorCode() != Api::IoError::IoErrorCode::Again) {\\n411:     cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_rx_errors_.inc();\\n412:   }\\n413:   // Flush out buffered data at the end of IO event.\\n414:   cluster_.filter_.read_callbacks_->udpListener().flush();\\n415: }\\n416: \\n417: bool UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onNewSession() {\\n418:   if (cluster_.filter_.config_->accessLogFlushInterval().has_value() &&\\n419:       !cluster_.filter_.config_->sessionAccessLogs().empty()) {\\n420:     access_log_flush_timer_ =\\n421:         cluster_.filter_.read_callbacks_->udpListener().dispatcher().createTimer(\\n422:             [this] { onAccessLogFlushInterval(); });\\n423:     rearmAccessLogFlushTimer();\\n424:   }\\n425: \\n426:   // Set UUID for the session. This is used for logging and tracing.\\n427:   udp_session_info_.setStreamIdProvider(std::make_shared<StreamInfo::StreamIdProviderImpl>(\\n428:       cluster_.filter_.config_->randomGenerator().uuid()));\\n429: \\n430:   for (auto& active_read_filter : read_filters_) {\\n431:     if (active_read_filter->initialized_) {\\n432:       // The filter may call continueFilterChain() in onNewSession(), causing next\\n433:       // filters to iterate onNewSession(), so check that it was not called before.\\n434:       continue;\\n435:     }\\n436: \\n437:     active_read_filter->initialized_ = true;\\n438:     auto status = active_read_filter->read_filter_->onNewSession();\\n439:     if (status == ReadFilterStatus::StopIteration) {\\n440:       return true;\\n441:     }\\n442:   }\\n443: \\n444:   return createUpstream();\\n445: }\\n446: \\n447: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onData(Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\\n448:   ENVOY_LOG(trace, \\\"received {} byte datagram from downstream: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\\\",\\n449:             data.buffer_->length(), addresses_.peer_->asStringView(),\\n450:             addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\\n451:             host_ != nullptr ? host_->address()->asStringView() : \\\"unknown\\\");\\n452: \\n453:   const uint64_t rx_buffer_length = data.buffer_->length();\\n454:   cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_bytes_.add(rx_buffer_length);\\n455:   session_stats_.downstream_sess_rx_bytes_ += rx_buffer_length;\\n456:   cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_datagrams_.inc();\\n457:   ++session_stats_.downstream_sess_rx_datagrams_;\\n458:   resetIdleTimer();\\n459: \\n460:   for (auto& active_read_filter : read_filters_) {\\n461:     auto status = active_read_filter->read_filter_->onData(data);\\n462:     if (status == ReadFilterStatus::StopIteration) {\\n463:       return;\\n464:     }\\n465:   }\\n466: \\n467:   writeUpstream(data);\\n468: }\\n469: \\n470: void UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::writeUpstream(Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\\n471:   if (!udp_socket_) {\\n472:     ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"cannot write upstream because the socket was not created.\\\");\\n473:     return;\\n474:   }\\n475: \\n476:   // NOTE: On the first write, a local ephemeral port is bound, and thus this write can fail due to\\n477:   //       port exhaustion. To avoid exhaustion, UDP sockets will be connected and associated with\\n478:   //       a 4-tuple including the local IP, and the UDP port may be reused for multiple\\n479:   //       connections unless use_original_src_ip_ is set. When use_original_src_ip_ is set, the\\n480:   //       socket should not be connected since the source IP will be changed.\\n481:   // NOTE: We do not specify the local IP to use for the sendmsg call if use_original_src_ip_ is not\\n482:   //       set. We allow the OS to select the right IP based on outbound routing rules if\\n483:   //       use_original_src_ip_ is not set, else use downstream peer IP as local IP.\\n484:   if (!connected_ && !use_original_src_ip_) {\\n485:     Api::SysCallIntResult rc = udp_socket_->ioHandle().connect(host_->address());\\n486:     if (SOCKET_FAILURE(rc.return_value_)) {\\n487:       ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"cannot connect: ({}) {}\\\", rc.errno_, errorDetails(rc.errno_));\\n488:       cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tx_errors_.inc();\\n489:       return;\\n490:     }\\n491: \\n492:     connected_ = true;\\n493:   }\\n494: \\n495:   ASSERT((connected_ || use_original_src_ip_) && udp_socket_ && host_);\\n496: \\n497:   const uint64_t tx_buffer_length = data.buffer_->length();\\n498:   ENVOY_LOG(trace, \\\"writing {} byte datagram upstream: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\\\",\\n499:             tx_buffer_length, addresses_.peer_->asStringView(), addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\\n500:             host_->address()->asStringView());\\n501: \\n502:   const Network::Address::Ip* local_ip = use_original_src_ip_ ? addresses_.peer_->ip() : nullptr;\\n503:   Api::IoCallUint64Result rc = Network::Utility::writeToSocket(\\n504:       udp_socket_->ioHandle(), *data.buffer_, local_ip, *host_->address());\\n505: \\n506:   if (!rc.ok()) {\\n507:     cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tx_errors_.inc();\\n508:   } else {\\n509:     cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tx_datagrams_.inc();\\n510:     cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_tx_bytes_total_.add(tx_buffer_length);\\n511:   }\\n512: }\\n513: \\n514: bool UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onContinueFilterChain(ActiveReadFilter* filter) {\\n515:   ASSERT(filter != nullptr);\\n516: \\n517:   std::list<ActiveReadFilterPtr>::iterator entry = std::next(filter->entry());\\n518:   for (; entry != read_filters_.end(); entry++) {\\n519:     if (!(*entry)->read_filter_ || (*entry)->initialized_) {\\n520:       continue;\\n521:     }\\n522: \\n523:     (*entry)->initialized_ = true;\\n524:     auto status = (*entry)->read_filter_->onNewSession();\\n525:     if (status == ReadFilterStatus::StopIteration) {\\n526:       return true;\\n527:     }\\n528:   }\\n529: \\n530:   if (!createUpstream()) {\\n531:     cluster_.removeSession(this);\\n532:     return false;\\n533:   }\\n534: \\n535:   return true;\\n536: }\\n537: \\n538: bool UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::createUpstream() {\\n539:   if (udp_socket_) {\\n540:     // A session filter may call on continueFilterChain(), after already creating the socket,\\n541:     // so we first check that the socket was not created already.\\n542:     return true;\\n543:   }\\n544: \\n545:   if (!host_) {\\n546:     host_ = cluster_.chooseHost(addresses_.peer_, &udp_session_info_);\\n547:     if (host_ == nullptr) {\\n548:       ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"cannot find any valid host.\\\");\\n549:       cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_none_healthy_.inc();\\n550:       return false;\\n551:     }\\n552:   }\\n553: \\n554:   udp_session_info_.upstreamInfo()->setUpstreamHost(host_);\\n555:   cluster_.addSession(host_.get(), this);\\n556:   createUdpSocket(host_);\\n557:   return true;\\n558: }\\n559: \\n560: void UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::createUdpSocket(const Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr& host) {\\n561:   // NOTE: The socket call can only fail due to memory/fd exhaustion. No local ephemeral port\\n562:   //       is bound until the first packet is sent to the upstream host.\\n563:   udp_socket_ = cluster_.filter_.createUdpSocket(host);\\n564:   udp_socket_->ioHandle().initializeFileEvent(\\n565:       cluster_.filter_.read_callbacks_->udpListener().dispatcher(),\\n566:       [this](uint32_t) { onReadReady(); }, Event::PlatformDefaultTriggerType,\\n567:       Event::FileReadyType::Read);\\n568: \\n569:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"creating new session: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\\\",\\n570:             addresses_.peer_->asStringView(), addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\\n571:             host->address()->asStringView());\\n572: \\n573:   if (use_original_src_ip_) {\\n574:     const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr socket_options =\\n575:         Network::SocketOptionFactory::buildIpTransparentOptions();\\n576:     const bool ok = Network::Socket::applyOptions(\\n577:         socket_options, *udp_socket_, envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption::STATE_PREBIND);\\n578: \\n579:     RELEASE_ASSERT(ok, \\\"Should never occur!\\\");\\n580:     ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"The original src is enabled for address {}.\\\",\\n581:               addresses_.peer_->asStringView());\\n582:   }\\n583: \\n584:   // TODO(mattklein123): Enable dropped packets socket option. In general the Socket abstraction\\n585:   // does not work well right now for client sockets. It's too heavy weight and is aimed at listener\\n586:   // sockets. We need to figure out how to either refactor Socket into something that works better\\n587:   // for this use case or allow the socket option abstractions to work directly against an IO\\n588:   // handle.\\n589: }\\n590: \\n591: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onInjectReadDatagramToFilterChain(ActiveReadFilter* filter,\\n592:
