    Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\\n593:   ASSERT(filter != nullptr);\\n594: \\n595:   std::list<ActiveReadFilterPtr>::iterator entry = std::next(filter->entry());\\n596:   for (; entry != read_filters_.end(); entry++) {\\n597:     if (!(*entry)->read_filter_) {\\n598:       continue;\\n599:     }\\n600: \\n601:     auto status = (*entry)->read_filter_->onData(data);\\n602:     if (status == ReadFilterStatus::StopIteration) {\\n603:       return;\\n604:     }\\n605:   }\\n606: \\n607:   writeUpstream(data);\\n608: }\\n609: \\n610: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onInjectWriteDatagramToFilterChain(ActiveWriteFilter* filter,\\n611:                                                                        Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\\n612:   ASSERT(filter != nullptr);\\n613: \\n614:   std::list<ActiveWriteFilterPtr>::iterator entry = std::next(filter->entry());\\n615:   for (; entry != write_filters_.end(); entry++) {\\n616:     if (!(*entry)->write_filter_) {\\n617:       continue;\\n618:     }\\n619: \\n620:     auto status = (*entry)->write_filter_->onWrite(data);\\n621:     if (status == WriteFilterStatus::StopIteration) {\\n622:       return;\\n623:     }\\n624:   }\\n625: \\n626:   writeDownstream(data);\\n627: }\\n628: \\n629: void UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::processPacket(\\n630:     Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr local_address,\\n631:     Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr peer_address, Buffer::InstancePtr buffer,\\n632:     MonotonicTime receive_time, uint8_t tos) {\\n633:   const uint64_t rx_buffer_length = buffer->length();\\n634:   ENVOY_LOG(trace, \\\"received {} byte datagram from upstream: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\\\",\\n635:             rx_buffer_length, addresses_.peer_->asStringView(), addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\\n636:             host_ != nullptr ? host_->address()->asStringView() : \\\"unknown\\\");\\n637: \\n638:   cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_rx_datagrams_.inc();\\n639:   cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_rx_bytes_total_.add(rx_buffer_length);\\n640: \\n641:   Network::UdpRecvData recv_data{\\n642:       {std::move(local_address), std::move(peer_address)}, std::move(buffer), receive_time, tos};\\n643:   processUpstreamDatagram(recv_data);\\n644: }\\n645: \\n646: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::resetIdleTimer() {\\n647:   if (idle_timer_ == nullptr) {\\n648:     return;\\n649:   }\\n650: \\n651:   idle_timer_->enableTimer(cluster_.filter_.config_->sessionTimeout());\\n652: }\\n653: \\n654: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::processUpstreamDatagram(Network::UdpRecvData& recv_data) {\\n655:   for (auto& active_write_filter : write_filters_) {\\n656:     auto status = active_write_filter->write_filter_->onWrite(recv_data);\\n657:     if (status == WriteFilterStatus::StopIteration) {\\n658:       return;\\n659:     }\\n660:   }\\n661: \\n662:   writeDownstream(recv_data);\\n663: }\\n664: \\n665: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::writeDownstream(Network::UdpRecvData& recv_data) {\\n666:   const uint64_t tx_buffer_length = recv_data.buffer_->length();\\n667:   ENVOY_LOG(trace, \\\"writing {} byte datagram downstream: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\\\",\\n668:             tx_buffer_length, addresses_.peer_->asStringView(), addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\\n669:             host_ != nullptr ? host_->address()->asStringView() : \\\"unknown\\\");\\n670: \\n671:   Network::UdpSendData data{addresses_.local_->ip(), *addresses_.peer_, *recv_data.buffer_};\\n672:   const Api::IoCallUint64Result rc = cluster_.filter_.read_callbacks_->udpListener().send(data);\\n673:   if (!rc.ok()) {\\n674:     cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_errors_.inc();\\n675:     ++session_stats_.downstream_sess_tx_errors_;\\n676:   } else {\\n677:     cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_bytes_.add(tx_buffer_length);\\n678:     session_stats_.downstream_sess_tx_bytes_ += tx_buffer_length;\\n679:     cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_datagrams_.inc();\\n680:     ++session_stats_.downstream_sess_tx_datagrams_;\\n681:   }\\n682: }\\n683: \\n684: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onAccessLogFlushInterval() {\\n685:   fillSessionStreamInfo();\\n686:   const Formatter::HttpFormatterContext log_context{\\n687:       nullptr, nullptr, nullptr, {}, AccessLog::AccessLogType::UdpPeriodic};\\n688:   for (const auto& access_log : cluster_.filter_.config_->sessionAccessLogs()) {\\n689:     access_log->log(log_context, udp_session_info_);\\n690:   }\\n691: \\n692:   rearmAccessLogFlushTimer();\\n693: }\\n694: \\n695: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::rearmAccessLogFlushTimer() {\\n696:   if (access_log_flush_timer_ != nullptr) {\\n697:     ASSERT(cluster_.filter_.config_->accessLogFlushInterval().has_value());\\n698:     access_log_flush_timer_->enableTimer(\\n699:         cluster_.filter_.config_->accessLogFlushInterval().value());\\n700:   }\\n701: }\\n702: \\n703: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::disableAccessLogFlushTimer() {\\n704:   if (access_log_flush_timer_ != nullptr) {\\n705:     access_log_flush_timer_->disableTimer();\\n706:     access_log_flush_timer_.reset();\\n707:   }\\n708: }\\n709: \\n710: void HttpUpstreamImpl::encodeData(Buffer::Instance& data) {\\n711:   if (!request_encoder_) {\\n712:     return;\\n713:   }\\n714: \\n715:   request_encoder_->encodeData(data, false);\\n716: }\\n717: \\n718: void HttpUpstreamImpl::setRequestEncoder(Http::RequestEncoder& request_encoder, bool is_ssl) {\\n719:   request_encoder_ = &request_encoder;\\n720:   request_encoder_->getStream().addCallbacks(*this);\\n721: \\n722:   const std::string& scheme =\\n723:       is_ssl ? Http::Headers::get().SchemeValues.Https : Http::Headers::get().SchemeValues.Http;\\n724: \\n725:   std::string host = tunnel_config_.proxyHost(downstream_info_);\\n726:   const auto* dynamic_port =\\n727:       downstream_info_.filterState()->getDataReadOnly<StreamInfo::UInt32Accessor>(\\n728:           \\\"udp.connect.proxy_port\\\");\\n729:   if (dynamic_port != nullptr && dynamic_port->value() > 0 && dynamic_port->value() <= 65535) {\\n730:     absl::StrAppend(&host, \\\":\\\", std::to_string(dynamic_port->value()));\\n731:   } else if (tunnel_config_.proxyPort().has_value()) {\\n732:     absl::StrAppend(&host, \\\":\\\", std::to_string(tunnel_config_.proxyPort().value()));\\n733:   }\\n734: \\n735:   auto headers = Http::RequestHeaderMapImpl::create();\\n736:   headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Scheme, scheme);\\n737:   headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Host, host);\\n738: \\n739:   if (tunnel_config_.usePost()) {\\n740:     headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Method, \\\"POST\\\");\\n741:     headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Path, tunnel_config_.postPath());\\n742:   } else {\\n743:     // The Envoy HTTP/2 and HTTP/3 clients expect the request header map to be in the form of HTTP/1\\n744:     // upgrade to issue an extended CONNECT request.\\n745:     headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Method, \\\"GET\\\");\\n746:     headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Connection, \\\"Upgrade\\\");\\n747:     headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Upgrade, \\\"connect-udp\\\");\\n748:     headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().CapsuleProtocol, \\\"?1\\\");\\n749:     const std::string target_tunnel_path = resolveTargetTunnelPath();\\n750:     headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Path, target_tunnel_path);\\n751:   }\\n752: \\n753:   tunnel_config_.headerEvaluator().evaluateHeaders(*headers, {downstream_info_.getRequestHeaders()},\\n754:                                                    downstream_info_);\\n755: \\n756:   const auto status = request_encoder_->encodeHeaders(*headers, false);\\n757:   // Encoding can only fail on missing required request headers.\\n758:   ASSERT(status.ok());\\n759: }\\n760: \\n761: const std::string HttpUpstreamImpl::resolveTargetTunnelPath() {\\n762:   std::string target_host = tunnel_config_.targetHost(downstream_info_);\\n763:   target_host = Http::Utility::PercentEncoding::encode(target_host, \\\":\\\");\\n764: \\n765:   const auto* dynamic_port =\\n766:       downstream_info_.filterState()->getDataReadOnly<StreamInfo::UInt32Accessor>(\\n767:           \\\"udp.connect.target_port\\\");\\n768: \\n769:   std::string target_port;\\n770:   if (dynamic_port != nullptr && dynamic_port->value() > 0 && dynamic_port->value() <= 65535) {\\n771:     target_port = std::to_string(dynamic_port->value());\\n772:   } else {\\n773:     target_port = std::to_string(tunnel_config_.defaultTargetPort());\\n774:   }\\n775: \\n776:   // TODO(ohadvano): support configurable URI template.\\n777:   return absl::StrCat(\\\"/.well-known/masque/udp/\\\", target_host, \\\"/\\\", target_port, \\\"/\\\");\\n778: }\\n779: \\n780: HttpUpstreamImpl::~HttpUpstreamImpl() { resetEncoder(Network::ConnectionEvent::LocalClose); }\\n781: \\n782: void HttpUpstreamImpl::resetEncoder(Network::ConnectionEvent event, bool by_downstream) {\\n783:   if (!request_encoder_) {\\n784:     return;\\n785:   }\\n786: \\n787:   request_encoder_->getStream().removeCallbacks(*this);\\n788:   if (by_downstream) {\\n789:     request_encoder_->getStream().resetStream(Http::StreamResetReason::LocalReset);\\n790:   }\\n791: \\n792:   request_encoder_ = nullptr;\\n793: \\n794:   // If we did not receive a valid CONNECT response yet we treat this as a pool\\n795:   // failure, otherwise we forward the event downstream.\\n796:   if (tunnel_creation_callbacks_.has_value()) {\\n797:     tunnel_creation_callbacks_.value().get().onStreamFailure();\\n798:     return;\\n799:   }\\n800: \\n801:   if (!by_downstream) {\\n802:     upstream_callbacks_.onUpstreamEvent(event);\\n803:   }\\n804: }\\n805: \\n806: TunnelingConnectionPoolImpl::TunnelingConnectionPoolImpl(\\n807:     Upstream::ThreadLocalCluster& thread_local_cluster, Upstream::LoadBalancerContext* context,\\n808:     const UdpTunnelingConfig& tunnel_config, UpstreamTunnelCallbacks& upstream_callbacks,\\n809:     StreamInfo::StreamInfo& downstream_info, bool flush_access_log_on_tunnel_connected,\\n810:     const std::vector<AccessLog::InstanceSharedPtr>& session_access_logs)\\n811:     : upstream_callbacks_(upstream_callbacks), tunnel_config_(tunnel_config),\\n812:       downstream_info_(downstream_info),\\n813:       flush_access_log_on_tunnel_connected_(flush_access_log_on_tunnel_connected),\\n814:       session_access_logs_(session_access_logs) {\\n815:   // TODO(ohadvano): support upstream HTTP/3.\\n816:   absl::optional<Http::Protocol> protocol = Http::Protocol::Http2;\\n817:   conn_pool_data_ =\\n818:       thread_local_cluster.httpConnPool(Upstream::ResourcePriority::Default, protocol, context);\\n819: }\\n820: \\n821: void TunnelingConnectionPoolImpl::newStream(HttpStreamCallbacks& callbacks) {\\n822:   callbacks_ = &callbacks;\\n823:   upstream_ =\\n824:       std::make_unique<HttpUpstreamImpl>(upstream_callbacks_, tunnel_config_, downstream_info_);\\n825:   Tcp::ConnectionPool::Cancellable* handle =\\n826:       conn_pool_data_.value().newStream(upstream_->responseDecoder(), *this,\\n827:                                         {/*can_send_early_data_=*/false,\\n828:                                          /*can_use_http3_=*/false});\\n829: \\n830:   if (handle != nullptr) {\\n831:     upstream_handle_ = handle;\\n832:   }\\n833: }\\n834: \\n835: void TunnelingConnectionPoolImpl::onPoolFailure(Http::ConnectionPool::PoolFailureReason reason,\\n836:                                                 absl::string_view failure_reason,\\n837:                                                 Upstream::HostDescriptionConstSharedPtr host) {\\n838:   upstream_handle_ = nullptr;\\n839:   callbacks_->onStreamFailure(reason, failure_reason, host);\\n840:   downstream_info_.upstreamInfo()->setUpstreamHost(host);\\n841:   downstream_info_.upstreamInfo()->setUpstreamTransportFailureReason(failure_reason);\\n842: }\\n843: \\n844: void TunnelingConnectionPoolImpl::onPoolReady(Http::RequestEncoder& request_encoder,\\n845:                                               Upstream::HostDescriptionConstSharedPtr upstream_host,\\n846:                                               StreamInfo::StreamInfo& upstream_info,\\n847:                                               absl::optional<Http::Protocol>) {\\n848:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"Upstream connection [C{}] ready, creating tunnel stream\\\",\\n849:             upstream_info.downstreamAddressProvider().connectionID().value());\\n850: \\n851:   upstream_handle_ = nullptr;\\n852:   upstream_host_ = upstream_host;\\n853:   upstream_info_ = &upstream_info;\\n854:   ssl_info_ = upstream_info.downstreamAddressProvider().sslConnection();\\n855: \\n856:   bool is_ssl = upstream_host->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport();\\n857:   upstream_->setRequestEncoder(request_encoder, is_ssl);\\n858:   upstream_->setTunnelCreationCallbacks(*this);\\n859:   downstream_info_.upstreamInfo()->setUpstreamHost(upstream_host);\\n860: \\n861:   if (flush_access_log_on_tunnel_connected_) {\\n862:     const Formatter::HttpFormatterContext log_context{\\n863:         nullptr, nullptr, nullptr, {}, AccessLog::AccessLogType::UdpTunnelUpstreamConnected};\\n864:     for (const auto& access_log : session_access_logs_) {\\n865:       access_log->log(log_context, downstream_info_);\\n866:     }\\n867:   }\\n868: }\\n869: \\n870: TunnelingConnectionPoolPtr TunnelingConnectionPoolFactory::createConnPool(\\n871:     Upstream::ThreadLocalCluster& thread_local_cluster, Upstream::LoadBalancerContext* context,\\n872:     const UdpTunnelingConfig& tunnel_config, UpstreamTunnelCallbacks& upstream_callbacks,\\n873:     StreamInfo::StreamInfo& downstream_info, bool flush_access_log_on_tunnel_connected,\\n874:     const std::vector<AccessLog::InstanceSharedPtr>& session_access_logs) const {\\n875:   auto pool = std::make_unique<TunnelingConnectionPoolImpl>(\\n876:       thread_local_cluster, context, tunnel_config, upstream_callbacks, downstream_info,\\n877:       flush_access_log_on_tunnel_connected, session_access_logs);\\n878:   return (pool->valid() ? std::move(pool) : nullptr);\\n879: }\\n880: \\n881: UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::TunnelingActiveSession(\\n882:     ClusterInfo& cluster, Network::UdpRecvData::LocalPeerAddresses&& addresses)\\n883:     : ActiveSession(cluster, std::move(addresses), nullptr) {}\\n884: \\n885: bool UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::createUpstream() {\\n886:   if (conn_pool_factory_) {\\n887:     // A session filter may call on continueFilterChain(), after already creating the upstream,\\n888:     // so we first check that the factory was not created already.\\n889:     return true;\\n890:   }\\n891: \\n892:   conn_pool_factory_ = std::make_unique<TunnelingConnectionPoolFactory>();\\n893:   load_balancer_context_ = std::make_unique<UdpLoadBalancerContext>(\\n894:       cluster_.filter_.config_->hashPolicy(), addresses_.peer_, &udp_session_info_);\\n895: \\n896:   return establishUpstreamConnection();\\n897: }\\n898: \\n899: bool UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::establishUpstreamConnection() {\\n900:   if (!createConnectionPool()) {\\n901:     ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"failed to create upstream connection pool\\\");\\n902:     cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tunnel_failure_.inc();\\n903:     return false;\\n904:   }\\n905: \\n906:   return true;\\n907: }\\n908: \\n909: bool UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::createConnectionPool() {\\n910:   ASSERT(conn_pool_factory_);\\n911: \\n912:   // Check this here because the TCP conn pool will queue our request waiting for a connection that\\n913:   // will never be released.\\n914:   if (!cluster_.cluster_.info()\\n915:            ->resourceManager(Upstream::ResourcePriority::Default)\\n916:            .connections()\\n917:            .canCreate()) {\\n918:     udp_session_info_.setResponseFlag(StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::UpstreamOverflow);\\n919:     cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_overflow_.inc();\\n920:     return false;\\n921:   }\\n922: \\n923:   if (connect_attempts_ >= cluster_.filter_.config_->tunnelingConfig()->maxConnectAttempts()) {\\n924:     udp_session_info_.setResponseFlag(StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::UpstreamRetryLimitExceeded);\\n925:     cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_connect_attempts_exceeded_.inc();\\n926:     return false;\\n927:   } else if (connect_attempts_ >= 1) {\\n928:     cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_rq_retry_.inc();\\n929:   }\\n930: \\n931:   conn_pool_ = conn_pool_factory_->createConnPool(\\n932:       cluster_.cluster_, load_balancer_context_.get(), *cluster_.filter_.config_->tunnelingConfig(),\\n933:       *this, udp_session_info_, cluster_.filter_.config_->flushAccessLogOnTunnelConnected(),\\n934:       cluster_.filter_.config_->sessionAccessLogs());\\n935: \\n936:   if (conn_pool_) {\\n937:     connecting_ = true;\\n938:     connect_attempts_++;\\n939:     udp_session_info_.setAttemptCount(connect_attempts_);\\n940:     conn_pool_->newStream(*this);\\n941:     return true;\\n942:   }\\n943: \\n944:   udp_session_info_.setResponseFlag(StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::NoHealthyUpstream);\\n945:   return false;\\n946: }\\n947: \\n948: void UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::onStreamFailure(\\n949:     ConnectionPool::PoolFailureReason reason, absl::string_view failure_reason,\\n950:     Upstream::HostDescriptionConstSharedPtr) {\\n951:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"Failed to create upstream stream: {}\\\", failure_reason);\\n952: \\n953:   conn_pool_.reset();\\n954:   upstream_.reset();\\n955: \\n956:   switch (reason) {\\n957:   case ConnectionPool::PoolFailureReason::Overflow:\\n958:   case ConnectionPool::PoolFailureReason::LocalConnectionFailure:\\n959:     onUpstreamEvent(Network::ConnectionEvent::LocalClose);\\n960:     break;\\n961:   case ConnectionPool::PoolFailureReason::Timeout:\\n962:     udp_session_info_.setResponseFlag(StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::UpstreamConnectionFailure);\\n963:     onUpstreamEvent(Network::ConnectionEvent::RemoteClose);\\n964:     break;\\n965:   case ConnectionPool::PoolFailureReason::RemoteConnectionFailure:\\n966:     if (connecting_) {\\n967:       udp_session_info_.setResponseFlag(StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::UpstreamConnectionFailure);\\n968:     }\\n969:     onUpstreamEvent(Network::ConnectionEvent::RemoteClose);\\n970:     break;\\n971:   }\\n972: }\\n973: \\n974: void UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::onStreamReady(StreamInfo::StreamInfo* upstream_info,\\n975:                                                            std::unique_ptr<HttpUpstream>&& upstream,\\n976:                                                            Upstream::HostDescriptionConstSharedPtr&,\\n977:                                                            const Network::ConnectionInfoProvider&,\\n978:                                                            Ssl::ConnectionInfoConstSharedPtr) {\\n979:   // TODO(ohadvano): save the host description to host_ field. This requires refactoring because\\n980:   // currently host_ is of type HostConstSharedPtr and not HostDescriptionConstSharedPtr.\\n981:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"Upstream connection [C{}] attached to session ID [S{}]\\\",\\n982:             upstream_info->downstreamAddressProvider().connectionID().value(), sessionId());\\n983: \\n984:   upstream_ = std::move(upstream);\\n985:   conn_pool_.reset();\\n986:   connecting_ = false;\\n987:   can_send_upstream_ = true;\\n988:   cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tunnel_success_.inc();\\n989:   flushBuffer();\\n990: }\\n991: \\n992: void UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::onUpstreamEvent(Network::ConnectionEvent event) {\\n993:   if (event == Network::ConnectionEvent::Connected ||\\n994:       event == Network::ConnectionEvent::ConnectedZeroRtt) {\\n995:     return;\\n996:   }\\n997: \\n998:   bool connecting = connecting_;\\n999:   connecting_ = false;\\n1000: \\n1001:   if (event == Network::ConnectionEvent::RemoteClose ||\\n1002:       event == Network::ConnectionEvent::LocalClose) {\\n1003:     upstream_.reset();\\n1004: \\n1005:     if (!connecting || !establishUpstreamConnection()) {\\n1006:       cluster_.removeSession(this);\\n1007:     }\\n1008:   }\\n1009: }\\n1010: \\n1011: void UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::onAboveWriteBufferHighWatermark() {\\n1012:   can_send_upstream_ = false;\\n1013: }\\n1014: \\n1015: void UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::onBelowWriteBufferLowWatermark() {\\n1016:   can_send_upstream_ = true;\\n1017:   flushBuffer();\\n1018: }\\n1019: \\n1020: void UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::flushBuffer() {\\n1021:   while (!datagrams_buffer_.empty()) {\\n1022:     BufferedDatagramPtr buffered_datagram = std::move(datagrams_buffer_.front());\\n1023:     datagrams_buffer_.pop();\\n1024:     buffered_bytes_ -= buffered_datagram->buffer_->length();\\n1025:     upstream_->encodeData(*buffered_datagram->buffer_);\\n1026:   }\\n1027: }\\n1028: \\n1029: void UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::maybeBufferDatagram(Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\\n1030:   if (!cluster_.filter_.config_->tunnelingConfig()->bufferEnabled()) {\\n1031:     return;\\n1032:   }\\n1033: \\n1034:   if (datagrams_buffer_.size() ==\\n1035:           cluster_.filter_.config_->tunnelingConfig()->maxBufferedDatagrams() ||\\n1036:       buffered_bytes_ + data.buffer_->length() >\\n1037:           cluster_.filter_.config_->tunnelingConfig()->maxBufferedBytes()) {\\n1038:     cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tunnel_buffer_overflow_.inc();\\n1039:     return;\\n1040:   }\\n1041: \\n1042:   auto buffered_datagram = std::make_unique<Network::UdpRecvData>();\\n1043:   buffered_datagram->addresses_ = {std::move(data.addresses_.local_),\\n1044:                                    std::move(data.addresses_.peer_)};\\n1045:   buffered_datagram->buffer_ = std::move(data.buffer_);\\n1046:   buffered_datagram->receive_time_ = data.receive_time_;\\n1047:   buffered_bytes_ += buffered_datagram->buffer_->length();\\n1048:   datagrams_buffer_.push(std::move(buffered_datagram));\\n1049: }\\n1050: \\n1051: void UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::writeUpstream(Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\\n1052:   if (!upstream_ || !can_send_upstream_) {\\n1053:     maybeBufferDatagram(data);\\n1054:     return;\\n1055:   }\\n1056: \\n1057:   if (upstream_) {\\n1058:     upstream_->encodeData(*data.buffer_);\\n1059:   }\\n1060: }\\n1061: \\n1062: void UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::onUpstreamData(Buffer::Instance& data, bool) {\\n1063:   const uint64_t rx_buffer_length = data.length();\\n1064:   ENVOY_LOG(trace, \\\"received {} byte datagram from upstream: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\\\",\\n1065:             rx_buffer_length, addresses_.peer_->asStringView(), addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\\n1066:             host_ != nullptr ? host_->address()->asStringView() : \\\"unknown\\\");\\n1067: \\n1068:   cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_rx_datagrams_.inc();\\n1069:   cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_rx_bytes_total_.add(rx_buffer_length);\\n1070:   resetIdleTimer();\\n1071: \\n1072:   Network::UdpRecvData recv_data{{addresses_.local_, addresses_.peer_},\\n1073:                                  std::make_unique<Buffer::OwnedImpl>(data),\\n1074:                                  cluster_.filter_.config_->timeSource().monotonicTime()};\\n1075:   processUpstreamDatagram(recv_data);\\n1076: }\\n1077: \\n1078: void UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::onIdleTimer() {\\n1079:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"session idle timeout: downstream={} local={}\\\", addresses_.peer_->asStringView(),\\n1080:             addresses_.local_->asStringView());\\n1081:   udp_session_info_.setResponseFlag(StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::StreamIdleTimeout);\\n1082:   cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().idle_timeout_.inc();\\n1083:   upstream_->onDownstreamEvent(Network::ConnectionEvent::LocalClose);\\n1084:   cluster_.removeSession(this);\\n1085: }\\n1086: \\n1087: } // namespace UdpProxy\\n1088: } // namespace UdpFilters\\n1089: } // namespace Extensions\\n1090: } // namespace Envoy\\n1091: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/envoy--1ae957c1@a0d69a14ad2283d6c8f001dc8b5cccc8cb09078e/-/blob/source/extensions/filters/udp/udp_proxy/udp_proxy_filter.cc%3FL1-1200\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: #include \"source/extensions/filters/udp/udp_proxy/udp_proxy_filter.h\"\n2: \n3: #include \"envoy/network/listener.h\"\n4: \n5: #include \"source/common/buffer/buffer_impl.h\"\n6: #include \"source/common/network/socket_option_factory.h\"\n7: \n8: namespace Envoy {\n9: namespace Extensions {\n10: namespace UdpFilters {\n11: namespace UdpProxy {\n12: \n13: UdpProxyFilter::UdpProxyFilter(Network::UdpReadFilterCallbacks& callbacks,\n14:                                const UdpProxyFilterConfigSharedPtr& config)\n15:     : UdpListenerReadFilter(callbacks), config_(config),\n16:       cluster_update_callbacks_(\n17:           config->clusterManager().addThreadLocalClusterUpdateCallbacks(*this)) {\n18:   for (const auto& entry : config_->allClusterNames()) {\n19:     Upstream::ThreadLocalCluster* cluster = config->clusterManager().getThreadLocalCluster(entry);\n20:     if (cluster != nullptr) {\n21:       Upstream::ThreadLocalClusterCommand command = [&cluster]() -> Upstream::ThreadLocalCluster& {\n22:         return *cluster;\n23:       };\n24:       onClusterAddOrUpdate(cluster->info()->name(), command);\n25:     }\n26:   }\n27: \n28:   if (!config_->proxyAccessLogs().empty()) {\n29:     udp_proxy_stats_.emplace(StreamInfo::StreamInfoImpl(\n30:         config_->timeSource(), nullptr, StreamInfo::FilterState::LifeSpan::Connection));\n31:   }\n32: }\n33: \n34: UdpProxyFilter::~UdpProxyFilter() {\n35:   if (!config_->proxyAccessLogs().empty()) {\n36:     fillProxyStreamInfo();\n37:     for (const auto& access_log : config_->proxyAccessLogs()) {\n38:       access_log->log({}, udp_proxy_stats_.value());\n39:     }\n40:   }\n41: }\n42: \n43: void UdpProxyFilter::onClusterAddOrUpdate(absl::string_view cluster_name,\n44:                                           Upstream::ThreadLocalClusterCommand& get_cluster) {\n45:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"udp proxy: attaching to cluster {}\", cluster_name);\n46: \n47:   auto& cluster = get_cluster();\n48:   ASSERT((!cluster_infos_.contains(cluster_name)) ||\n49:          &cluster_infos_[cluster_name]->cluster_ != &cluster);\n50: \n51:   if (config_->usingPerPacketLoadBalancing()) {\n52:     cluster_infos_.emplace(cluster_name,\n53:                            std::make_unique<PerPacketLoadBalancingClusterInfo>(*this, cluster));\n54:   } else {\n55:     cluster_infos_.emplace(cluster_name,\n56:                            std::make_unique<StickySessionClusterInfo>(*this, cluster));\n57:   }\n58: }\n59: \n60: void UdpProxyFilter::onClusterRemoval(const std::string& cluster) {\n61:   if (!cluster_infos_.contains(cluster)) {\n62:     return;\n63:   }\n64: \n65:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"udp proxy: detaching from cluster {}\", cluster);\n66:   cluster_infos_.erase(cluster);\n67: }\n68: \n69: Network::FilterStatus UdpProxyFilter::onData(Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\n70:   const std::string& route = config_->route(*data.addresses_.local_, *data.addresses_.peer_);\n71:   if (!cluster_infos_.contains(route)) {\n72:     config_->stats().downstream_sess_no_route_.inc();\n73:     return Network::FilterStatus::StopIteration;\n74:   }\n75: \n76:   return cluster_infos_[route]->onData(data);\n77: }\n78: \n79: Network::FilterStatus UdpProxyFilter::onReceiveError(Api::IoError::IoErrorCode) {\n80:   config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_errors_.inc();\n81: \n82:   return Network::FilterStatus::StopIteration;\n83: }\n84: \n85: UdpProxyFilter::ClusterInfo::ClusterInfo(UdpProxyFilter& filter,\n86:                                          Upstream::ThreadLocalCluster& cluster,\n87:                                          SessionStorageType&& sessions)\n88:     : filter_(filter), cluster_(cluster),\n89:       cluster_stats_(generateStats(cluster.info()->statsScope())), sessions_(std::move(sessions)),\n90:       member_update_cb_handle_(cluster.prioritySet().addMemberUpdateCb(\n91:           [this](const Upstream::HostVector&, const Upstream::HostVector& hosts_removed) {\n92:             for (const auto& host : hosts_removed) {\n93:               // This is similar to removeSession() but slightly different due to removeSession()\n94:               // also handling deletion of the host to session map entry if there are no sessions\n95:               // left. It would be nice to unify the logic but that can be cleaned up later.\n96:               auto host_sessions_it = host_to_sessions_.find(host.get());\n97:               if (host_sessions_it != host_to_sessions_.end()) {\n98:                 for (auto& session : host_sessions_it->second) {\n99:                   session->onSessionComplete();\n100:                   ASSERT(sessions_.count(session) == 1);\n101:                   sessions_.erase(session);\n102:                 }\n103:                 host_to_sessions_.erase(host_sessions_it);\n104:               }\n105:             }\n106:           })) {}\n107: \n108: UdpProxyFilter::ClusterInfo::~ClusterInfo() {\n109:   // Sanity check the session accounting. This is not as fast as a straight teardown, but this is\n110:   // not a performance critical path.\n111:   while (!sessions_.empty()) {\n112:     removeSession(sessions_.begin()->get());\n113:   }\n114:   ASSERT(host_to_sessions_.empty());\n115: }\n116: \n117: void UdpProxyFilter::ClusterInfo::removeSession(ActiveSession* session) {\n118:   if (session->host().has_value()) {\n119:     // First remove from the host to sessions map, in case the host was resolved.\n120:     ASSERT(host_to_sessions_[&session->host().value().get()].count(session) == 1);\n121:     auto host_sessions_it = host_to_sessions_.find(&session->host().value().get());\n122:     host_sessions_it->second.erase(session);\n123:     if (host_sessions_it->second.empty()) {\n124:       host_to_sessions_.erase(host_sessions_it);\n125:     }\n126:   }\n127: \n128:   session->onSessionComplete();\n129: \n130:   // Now remove it from the primary map.\n131:   ASSERT(sessions_.count(session) == 1);\n132:   sessions_.erase(session);\n133: }\n134: \n135: UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession*\n136: UdpProxyFilter::ClusterInfo::createSession(Network::UdpRecvData::LocalPeerAddresses&& addresses,\n137:                                            const Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr& optional_host,\n138:                                            bool defer_socket_creation) {\n139:   if (!cluster_.info()\n140:            ->resourceManager(Upstream::ResourcePriority::Default)\n141:            .connections()\n142:            .canCreate()) {\n143:     ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"cannot create new connection.\");\n144:     cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_overflow_.inc();\n145:     return nullptr;\n146:   }\n147: \n148:   if (defer_socket_creation) {\n149:     ASSERT(!optional_host);\n150:     return createSessionWithOptionalHost(std::move(addresses), nullptr);\n151:   }\n152: \n153:   if (optional_host) {\n154:     return createSessionWithOptionalHost(std::move(addresses), optional_host);\n155:   }\n156: \n157:   auto host = chooseHost(addresses.peer_, nullptr);\n158:   if (host == nullptr) {\n159:     ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"cannot find any valid host.\");\n160:     cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_none_healthy_.inc();\n161:     return nullptr;\n162:   }\n163: \n164:   return createSessionWithOptionalHost(std::move(addresses), host);\n165: }\n166: \n167: UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession* UdpProxyFilter::ClusterInfo::createSessionWithOptionalHost(\n168:     Network::UdpRecvData::LocalPeerAddresses&& addresses,\n169:     const Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr& host) {\n170:   ActiveSessionPtr new_session;\n171:   if (filter_.config_->tunnelingConfig()) {\n172:     ASSERT(!host);\n173:     new_session = std::make_unique<TunnelingActiveSession>(*this, std::move(addresses));\n174:   } else {\n175:     new_session = std::make_unique<UdpActiveSession>(*this, std::move(addresses), host);\n176:   }\n177: \n178:   new_session->createFilterChain();\n179:   if (new_session->onNewSession()) {\n180:     auto new_session_ptr = new_session.get();\n181:     sessions_.emplace(std::move(new_session));\n182:     return new_session_ptr;\n183:   }\n184: \n185:   new_session->onSessionComplete();\n186:   return nullptr;\n187: }\n188: \n189: Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr UdpProxyFilter::ClusterInfo::chooseHost(\n190:     const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& peer_address,\n191:     const StreamInfo::StreamInfo* stream_info) const {\n192:   UdpLoadBalancerContext context(filter_.config_->hashPolicy(), peer_address, stream_info);\n193:   Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr host = cluster_.loadBalancer().chooseHost(&context);\n194:   return host;\n195: }\n196: \n197: UdpProxyFilter::StickySessionClusterInfo::StickySessionClusterInfo(\n198:     UdpProxyFilter& filter, Upstream::ThreadLocalCluster& cluster)\n199:     : ClusterInfo(filter, cluster,\n200:                   SessionStorageType(1, HeterogeneousActiveSessionHash(false),\n201:                                      HeterogeneousActiveSessionEqual(false))) {}\n202: \n203: Network::FilterStatus UdpProxyFilter::StickySessionClusterInfo::onData(Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\n204:   bool defer_socket = filter_.config_->hasSessionFilters() || filter_.config_->tunnelingConfig();\n205:   const auto active_session_it = sessions_.find(data.addresses_);\n206:   ActiveSession* active_session;\n207:   if (active_session_it == sessions_.end()) {\n208:     active_session = createSession(std::move(data.addresses_), nullptr, defer_socket);\n209:     if (active_session == nullptr) {\n210:       return Network::FilterStatus::StopIteration;\n211:     }\n212:   } else {\n213:     active_session = active_session_it->get();\n214:     // We defer the socket creation when the session includes filters, so the filters can be\n215:     // iterated before choosing the host, to allow dynamically choosing upstream host. Due to this,\n216:     // we can't perform health checks during a session.\n217:     // TODO(ohadvano): add similar functionality that is performed after session filter chain\n218:     // iteration to signal filters about the unhealthy host, or replace the host during the session.\n219:     if (!defer_socket &&\n220:         active_session->host().value().get().coarseHealth() == Upstream::Host::Health::Unhealthy) {\n221:       // If a host becomes unhealthy, we optimally would like to replace it with a new session\n222:       // to a healthy host. We may eventually want to make this behavior configurable, but for now\n223:       // this will be the universal behavior.\n224:       auto host = chooseHost(data.addresses_.peer_, nullptr);\n225:       if (host != nullptr && host->coarseHealth() != Upstream::Host::Health::Unhealthy &&\n226:           host.get() != &active_session->host().value().get()) {\n227:         ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"upstream session unhealthy, recreating the session\");\n228:         removeSession(active_session);\n229:         active_session = createSession(std::move(data.addresses_), host, false);\n230:       } else {\n231:         // In this case we could not get a better host, so just keep using the current session.\n232:         ENVOY_LOG(trace, \"upstream session unhealthy, but unable to get a better host\");\n233:       }\n234:     }\n235:   }\n236: \n237:   active_session->onData(data);\n238: \n239:   return Network::FilterStatus::StopIteration;\n240: }\n241: \n242: UdpProxyFilter::PerPacketLoadBalancingClusterInfo::PerPacketLoadBalancingClusterInfo(\n243:     UdpProxyFilter& filter, Upstream::ThreadLocalCluster& cluster)\n244:     : ClusterInfo(filter, cluster,\n245:                   SessionStorageType(1, HeterogeneousActiveSessionHash(true),\n246:                                      HeterogeneousActiveSessionEqual(true))) {}\n247: \n248: Network::FilterStatus\n249: UdpProxyFilter::PerPacketLoadBalancingClusterInfo::onData(Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\n250:   auto host = chooseHost(data.addresses_.peer_, nullptr);\n251:   if (host == nullptr) {\n252:     ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"cannot find any valid host.\");\n253:     cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_none_healthy_.inc();\n254:     return Network::FilterStatus::StopIteration;\n255:   }\n256: \n257:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"selected {} host as upstream.\", host->address()->asStringView());\n258: \n259:   LocalPeerHostAddresses key{data.addresses_, *host};\n260:   const auto active_session_it = sessions_.find(key);\n261:   ActiveSession* active_session;\n262:   if (active_session_it == sessions_.end()) {\n263:     active_session = createSession(std::move(data.addresses_), host, false);\n264:     if (active_session == nullptr) {\n265:       return Network::FilterStatus::StopIteration;\n266:     }\n267:   } else {\n268:     active_session = active_session_it->get();\n269:     ENVOY_LOG(trace, \"found already existing session on host {}.\",\n270:               active_session->host().value().get().address()->asStringView());\n271:   }\n272: \n273:   active_session->onData(data);\n274: \n275:   return Network::FilterStatus::StopIteration;\n276: }\n277: \n278: std::atomic<uint64_t> UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::next_global_session_id_;\n279: \n280: UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::ActiveSession(ClusterInfo& cluster,\n281:                                              Network::UdpRecvData::LocalPeerAddresses&& addresses,\n282:                                              const Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr& host)\n283:     : cluster_(cluster), addresses_(std::move(addresses)), host_(host),\n284:       session_id_(next_global_session_id_++),\n285:       idle_timer_(cluster.filter_.read_callbacks_->udpListener().dispatcher().createTimer(\n286:           [this] { onIdleTimer(); })),\n287:       udp_session_info_(StreamInfo::StreamInfoImpl(cluster_.filter_.config_->timeSource(),\n288:                                                    createDownstreamConnectionInfoProvider(),\n289:                                                    StreamInfo::FilterState::LifeSpan::Connection)) {\n290:   udp_session_info_.setUpstreamInfo(std::make_shared<StreamInfo::UpstreamInfoImpl>());\n291:   cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.inc();\n292:   cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.inc();\n293:   cluster_.cluster_.info()\n294:       ->resourceManager(Upstream::ResourcePriority::Default)\n295:       .connections()\n296:       .inc();\n297: }\n298: \n299: UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::UdpActiveSession(\n300:     ClusterInfo& cluster, Network::UdpRecvData::LocalPeerAddresses&& addresses,\n301:     const Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr& host)\n302:     : ActiveSession(cluster, std::move(addresses), std::move(host)),\n303:       use_original_src_ip_(cluster.filter_.config_->usingOriginalSrcIp()) {}\n304: \n305: UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::~ActiveSession() {\n306:   ENVOY_BUG(on_session_complete_called_, \"onSessionComplete() not called\");\n307: }\n308: \n309: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onSessionComplete() {\n310:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"deleting the session: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\",\n311:             addresses_.peer_->asStringView(), addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\n312:             host_ != nullptr ? host_->address()->asStringView() : \"unknown\");\n313: \n314:   cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.dec();\n315:   cluster_.cluster_.info()\n316:       ->resourceManager(Upstream::ResourcePriority::Default)\n317:       .connections()\n318:       .dec();\n319: \n320:   disableAccessLogFlushTimer();\n321: \n322:   for (auto& active_read_filter : read_filters_) {\n323:     active_read_filter->read_filter_->onSessionComplete();\n324:   }\n325: \n326:   for (auto& active_write_filter : write_filters_) {\n327:     active_write_filter->write_filter_->onSessionComplete();\n328:   }\n329: \n330:   if (!cluster_.filter_.config_->sessionAccessLogs().empty()) {\n331:     fillSessionStreamInfo();\n332:     const Formatter::HttpFormatterContext log_context{\n333:         nullptr, nullptr, nullptr, {}, AccessLog::AccessLogType::UdpSessionEnd};\n334:     for (const auto& access_log : cluster_.filter_.config_->sessionAccessLogs()) {\n335:       access_log->log(log_context, udp_session_info_);\n336:     }\n337:   }\n338: \n339:   on_session_complete_called_ = true;\n340: }\n341: \n342: std::shared_ptr<Network::ConnectionInfoSetterImpl>\n343: UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::createDownstreamConnectionInfoProvider() {\n344:   auto downstream_connection_info_provider =\n345:       std::make_shared<Network::ConnectionInfoSetterImpl>(addresses_.local_, addresses_.peer_);\n346:   downstream_connection_info_provider->setConnectionID(session_id_);\n347:   return downstream_connection_info_provider;\n348: }\n349: \n350: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::fillSessionStreamInfo() {\n351:   ProtobufWkt::Struct stats_obj;\n352:   auto& fields_map = *stats_obj.mutable_fields();\n353:   fields_map[\"cluster_name\"] = ValueUtil::stringValue(cluster_.cluster_.info()->name());\n354:   fields_map[\"bytes_sent\"] = ValueUtil::numberValue(session_stats_.downstream_sess_tx_bytes_);\n355:   fields_map[\"bytes_received\"] = ValueUtil::numberValue(session_stats_.downstream_sess_rx_bytes_);\n356:   fields_map[\"errors_sent\"] = ValueUtil::numberValue(session_stats_.downstream_sess_tx_errors_);\n357:   fields_map[\"datagrams_sent\"] =\n358:       ValueUtil::numberValue(session_stats_.downstream_sess_tx_datagrams_);\n359:   fields_map[\"datagrams_received\"] =\n360:       ValueUtil::numberValue(session_stats_.downstream_sess_rx_datagrams_);\n361: \n362:   udp_session_info_.setDynamicMetadata(\"udp.proxy.session\", stats_obj);\n363: }\n364: \n365: void UdpProxyFilter::fillProxyStreamInfo() {\n366:   ProtobufWkt::Struct stats_obj;\n367:   auto& fields_map = *stats_obj.mutable_fields();\n368:   fields_map[\"bytes_sent\"] =\n369:       ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_bytes_.value());\n370:   fields_map[\"bytes_received\"] =\n371:       ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_bytes_.value());\n372:   fields_map[\"errors_sent\"] =\n373:       ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_errors_.value());\n374:   fields_map[\"errors_received\"] =\n375:       ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_errors_.value());\n376:   fields_map[\"datagrams_sent\"] =\n377:       ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_datagrams_.value());\n378:   fields_map[\"datagrams_received\"] =\n379:       ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_datagrams_.value());\n380:   fields_map[\"no_route\"] =\n381:       ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_no_route_.value());\n382:   fields_map[\"session_total\"] =\n383:       ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n384:   fields_map[\"idle_timeout\"] = ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().idle_timeout_.value());\n385: \n386:   udp_proxy_stats_.value().setDynamicMetadata(\"udp.proxy.proxy\", stats_obj);\n387: }\n388: \n389: void UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::onIdleTimer() {\n390:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"session idle timeout: downstream={} local={}\", addresses_.peer_->asStringView(),\n391:             addresses_.local_->asStringView());\n392:   cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().idle_timeout_.inc();\n393:   cluster_.removeSession(this);\n394: }\n395: \n396: void UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::onReadReady() {\n397:   resetIdleTimer();\n398: \n399:   // TODO(mattklein123): We should not be passing *addresses_.local_ to this function as we are\n400:   //                     not trying to populate the local address for received packets.\n401:   uint32_t packets_dropped = 0;\n402:   const Api::IoErrorPtr result = Network::Utility::readPacketsFromSocket(\n403:       udp_socket_->ioHandle(), *addresses_.local_, *this, cluster_.filter_.config_->timeSource(),\n404:       cluster_.filter_.config_->upstreamSocketConfig().prefer_gro_, /*allow_mmsg=*/true,\n405:       packets_dropped);\n406:   if (result == nullptr) {\n407:     udp_socket_->ioHandle().activateFileEvents(Event::FileReadyType::Read);\n408:     return;\n409:   }\n410:   if (result->getErrorCode() != Api::IoError::IoErrorCode::Again) {\n411:     cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_rx_errors_.inc();\n412:   }\n413:   // Flush out buffered data at the end of IO event.\n414:   cluster_.filter_.read_callbacks_->udpListener().flush();\n415: }\n416: \n417: bool UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onNewSession() {\n418:   if (cluster_.filter_.config_->accessLogFlushInterval().has_value() &&\n419:       !cluster_.filter_.config_->sessionAccessLogs().empty()) {\n420:     access_log_flush_timer_ =\n421:         cluster_.filter_.read_callbacks_->udpListener().dispatcher().createTimer(\n422:             [this] { onAccessLogFlushInterval(); });\n423:     rearmAccessLogFlushTimer();\n424:   }\n425: \n426:   // Set UUID for the session. This is used for logging and tracing.\n427:   udp_session_info_.setStreamIdProvider(std::make_shared<StreamInfo::StreamIdProviderImpl>(\n428:       cluster_.filter_.config_->randomGenerator().uuid()));\n429: \n430:   for (auto& active_read_filter : read_filters_) {\n431:     if (active_read_filter->initialized_) {\n432:       // The filter may call continueFilterChain() in onNewSession(), causing next\n433:       // filters to iterate onNewSession(), so check that it was not called before.\n434:       continue;\n435:     }\n436: \n437:     active_read_filter->initialized_ = true;\n438:     auto status = active_read_filter->read_filter_->onNewSession();\n439:     if (status == ReadFilterStatus::StopIteration) {\n440:       return true;\n441:     }\n442:   }\n443: \n444:   return createUpstream();\n445: }\n446: \n447: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onData(Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\n448:   ENVOY_LOG(trace, \"received {} byte datagram from downstream: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\",\n449:             data.buffer_->length(), addresses_.peer_->asStringView(),\n450:             addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\n451:             host_ != nullptr ? host_->address()->asStringView() : \"unknown\");\n452: \n453:   const uint64_t rx_buffer_length = data.buffer_->length();\n454:   cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_bytes_.add(rx_buffer_length);\n455:   session_stats_.downstream_sess_rx_bytes_ += rx_buffer_length;\n456:   cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_datagrams_.inc();\n457:   ++session_stats_.downstream_sess_rx_datagrams_;\n458:   resetIdleTimer();\n459: \n460:   for (auto& active_read_filter : read_filters_) {\n461:     auto status = active_read_filter->read_filter_->onData(data);\n462:     if (status == ReadFilterStatus::StopIteration) {\n463:       return;\n464:     }\n465:   }\n466: \n467:   writeUpstream(data);\n468: }\n469: \n470: void UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::writeUpstream(Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\n471:   if (!udp_socket_) {\n472:     ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"cannot write upstream because the socket was not created.\");\n473:     return;\n474:   }\n475: \n476:   // NOTE: On the first write, a local ephemeral port is bound, and thus this write can fail due to\n477:   //       port exhaustion. To avoid exhaustion, UDP sockets will be connected and associated with\n478:   //       a 4-tuple including the local IP, and the UDP port may be reused for multiple\n479:   //       connections unless use_original_src_ip_ is set. When use_original_src_ip_ is set, the\n480:   //       socket should not be connected since the source IP will be changed.\n481:   // NOTE: We do not specify the local IP to use for the sendmsg call if use_original_src_ip_ is not\n482:   //       set. We allow the OS to select the right IP based on outbound routing rules if\n483:   //       use_original_src_ip_ is not set, else use downstream peer IP as local IP.\n484:   if (!connected_ && !use_original_src_ip_) {\n485:     Api::SysCallIntResult rc = udp_socket_->ioHandle().connect(host_->address());\n486:     if (SOCKET_FAILURE(rc.return_value_)) {\n487:       ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"cannot connect: ({}) {}\", rc.errno_, errorDetails(rc.errno_));\n488:       cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tx_errors_.inc();\n489:       return;\n490:     }\n491: \n492:     connected_ = true;\n493:   }\n494: \n495:   ASSERT((connected_ || use_original_src_ip_) && udp_socket_ && host_);\n496: \n497:   const uint64_t tx_buffer_length = data.buffer_->length();\n498:   ENVOY_LOG(trace, \"writing {} byte datagram upstream: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\",\n499:             tx_buffer_length, addresses_.peer_->asStringView(), addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\n500:             host_->address()->asStringView());\n501: \n502:   const Network::Address::Ip* local_ip = use_original_src_ip_ ? addresses_.peer_->ip() : nullptr;\n503:   Api::IoCallUint64Result rc = Network::Utility::writeToSocket(\n504:       udp_socket_->ioHandle(), *data.buffer_, local_ip, *host_->address());\n505: \n506:   if (!rc.ok()) {\n507:     cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tx_errors_.inc();\n508:   } else {\n509:     cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tx_datagrams_.inc();\n510:     cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_tx_bytes_total_.add(tx_buffer_length);\n511:   }\n512: }\n513: \n514: bool UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onContinueFilterChain(ActiveReadFilter* filter) {\n515:   ASSERT(filter != nullptr);\n516: \n517:   std::list<ActiveReadFilterPtr>::iterator entry = std::next(filter->entry());\n518:   for (; entry != read_filters_.end(); entry++) {\n519:     if (!(*entry)->read_filter_ || (*entry)->initialized_) {\n520:       continue;\n521:     }\n522: \n523:     (*entry)->initialized_ = true;\n524:     auto status = (*entry)->read_filter_->onNewSession();\n525:     if (status == ReadFilterStatus::StopIteration) {\n526:       return true;\n527:     }\n528:   }\n529: \n530:   if (!createUpstream()) {\n531:     cluster_.removeSession(this);\n532:     return false;\n533:   }\n534: \n535:   return true;\n536: }\n537: \n538: bool UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::createUpstream() {\n539:   if (udp_socket_) {\n540:     // A session filter may call on continueFilterChain(), after already creating the socket,\n541:     // so we first check that the socket was not created already.\n542:     return true;\n543:   }\n544: \n545:   if (!host_) {\n546:     host_ = cluster_.chooseHost(addresses_.peer_, &udp_session_info_);\n547:     if (host_ == nullptr) {\n548:       ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"cannot find any valid host.\");\n549:       cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_none_healthy_.inc();\n550:       return false;\n551:     }\n552:   }\n553: \n554:   udp_session_info_.upstreamInfo()->setUpstreamHost(host_);\n555:   cluster_.addSession(host_.get(), this);\n556:   createUdpSocket(host_);\n557:   return true;\n558: }\n559: \n560: void UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::createUdpSocket(const Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr& host) {\n561:   // NOTE: The socket call can only fail due to memory/fd exhaustion. No local ephemeral port\n562:   //       is bound until the first packet is sent to the upstream host.\n563:   udp_socket_ = cluster_.filter_.createUdpSocket(host);\n564:   udp_socket_->ioHandle().initializeFileEvent(\n565:       cluster_.filter_.read_callbacks_->udpListener().dispatcher(),\n566:       [this](uint32_t) { onReadReady(); }, Event::PlatformDefaultTriggerType,\n567:       Event::FileReadyType::Read);\n568: \n569:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"creating new session: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\",\n570:             addresses_.peer_->asStringView(), addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\n571:             host->address()->asStringView());\n572: \n573:   if (use_original_src_ip_) {\n574:     const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr socket_options =\n575:         Network::SocketOptionFactory::buildIpTransparentOptions();\n576:     const bool ok = Network::Socket::applyOptions(\n577:         socket_options, *udp_socket_, envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption::STATE_PREBIND);\n578: \n579:     RELEASE_ASSERT(ok, \"Should never occur!\");\n580:     ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"The original src is enabled for address {}.\",\n581:               addresses_.peer_->asStringView());\n582:   }\n583: \n584:   // TODO(mattklein123): Enable dropped packets socket option. In general the Socket abstraction\n585:   // does not work well right now for client sockets. It's too heavy weight and is aimed at listener\n586:   // sockets. We need to figure out how to either refactor Socket into something that works better\n587:   // for this use case or allow the socket option abstractions to work directly against an IO\n588:   // handle.\n589: }\n590: \n591: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onInjectReadDatagramToFilterChain(ActiveReadFilter* filter,\n592:                                                                       Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\n593:   ASSERT(filter != nullptr);\n594: \n595:   std::list<ActiveReadFilterPtr>::iterator entry = std::next(filter->entry());\n596:   for (; entry != read_filters_.end(); entry++) {\n597:     if (!(*entry)->read_filter_) {\n598:       continue;\n599:     }\n600: \n601:     auto status = (*entry)->read_filter_->onData(data);\n602:     if (status == ReadFilterStatus::StopIteration) {\n603:       return;\n604:     }\n605:   }\n606: \n607:   writeUpstream(data);\n608: }\n609: \n610: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onInjectWriteDatagramToFilterChain(ActiveWriteFilter* filter,\n611:                                                                        Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\n612:   ASSERT(filter != nullptr);\n613: \n614:   std::list<ActiveWriteFilterPtr>::iterator entry = std::next(filter->entry());\n615:   for (; entry != write_filters_.end(); entry++) {\n616:     if (!(*entry)->write_filter_) {\n617:       continue;\n618:     }\n619: \n620:     auto status = (*entry)->write_filter_->onWrite(data);\n621:     if (status == WriteFilterStatus::StopIteration) {\n622:       return;\n623:     }\n624:   }\n625: \n626:   writeDownstream(data);\n627: }\n628: \n629: void UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::processPacket(\n630:     Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr local_address,\n631:     Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr peer_address, Buffer::InstancePtr buffer,\n632:     MonotonicTime receive_time, uint8_t tos) {\n633:   const uint64_t rx_buffer_length = buffer->length();\n634:   ENVOY_LOG(trace, \"received {} byte datagram from upstream: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\",\n635:             rx_buffer_length, addresses_.peer_->asStringView(), addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\n636:             host_ != nullptr ? host_->address()->asStringView() : \"unknown\");\n637: \n638:   cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_rx_datagrams_.inc();\n639:   cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_rx_bytes_total_.add(rx_buffer_length);\n640: \n641:   Network::UdpRecvData recv_data{\n642:       {std::move(local_address), std::move(peer_address)}, std::move(buffer), receive_time, tos};\n643:   processUpstreamDatagram(recv_data);\n644: }\n645: \n646: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::resetIdleTimer() {\n647:   if (idle_timer_ == nullptr) {\n648:     return;\n649:   }\n650: \n651:   idle_timer_->enableTimer(cluster_.filter_.config_->sessionTimeout());\n652: }\n653: \n654: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::processUpstreamDatagram(Network::UdpRecvData& recv_data) {\n655:   for (auto& active_write_filter : write_filters_) {\n656:     auto status = active_write_filter->write_filter_->onWrite(recv_data);\n657:     if (status == WriteFilterStatus::StopIteration) {\n658:       return;\n659:     }\n660:   }\n661: \n662:   writeDownstream(recv_data);\n663: }\n664: \n665: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::writeDownstream(Network::UdpRecvData& recv_data) {\n666:   const uint64_t tx_buffer_length = recv_data.buffer_->length();\n667:   ENVOY_LOG(trace, \"writing {} byte datagram downstream: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\",\n668:             tx_buffer_length, addresses_.peer_->asStringView(), addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\n669:             host_ != nullptr ? host_->address()->asStringView() : \"unknown\");\n670: \n671:   Network::UdpSendData data{addresses_.local_->ip(), *addresses_.peer_, *recv_data.buffer_};\n672:   const Api::IoCallUint64Result rc = cluster_.filter_.read_callbacks_->udpListener().send(data);\n673:   if (!rc.ok()) {\n674:     cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_errors_.inc();\n675:     ++session_stats_.downstream_sess_tx_errors_;\n676:   } else {\n677:     cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_bytes_.add(tx_buffer_length);\n678:     session_stats_.downstream_sess_tx_bytes_ += tx_buffer_length;\n679:     cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_datagrams_.inc();\n680:     ++session_stats_.downstream_sess_tx_datagrams_;\n681:   }\n682: }\n683: \n684: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onAccessLogFlushInterval() {\n685:   fillSessionStreamInfo();\n686:   const Formatter::HttpFormatterContext log_context{\n687:       nullptr, nullptr, nullptr, {}, AccessLog::AccessLogType::UdpPeriodic};\n688:   for (const auto& access_log : cluster_.filter_.config_->sessionAccessLogs()) {\n689:     access_log->log(log_context, udp_session_info_);\n690:   }\n691: \n692:   rearmAccessLogFlushTimer();\n693: }\n694: \n695: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::rearmAccessLogFlushTimer() {\n696:   if (access_log_flush_timer_ != nullptr) {\n697:     ASSERT(cluster_.filter_.config_->accessLogFlushInterval().has_value());\n698:     access_log_flush_timer_->enableTimer(\n699:         cluster_.filter_.config_->accessLogFlushInterval().value());\n700:   }\n701: }\n702: \n703: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::disableAccessLogFlushTimer() {\n704:   if (access_log_flush_timer_ != nullptr) {\n705:     access_log_flush_timer_->disableTimer();\n706:     access_log_flush_timer_.reset();\n707:   }\n708: }\n709: \n710: void HttpUpstreamImpl::encodeData(Buffer::Instance& data) {\n711:   if (!request_encoder_) {\n712:     return;\n713:   }\n714: \n715:   request_encoder_->encodeData(data, false);\n716: }\n717: \n718: void HttpUpstreamImpl::setRequestEncoder(Http::RequestEncoder& request_encoder, bool is_ssl) {\n719:   request_encoder_ = &request_encoder;\n720:   request_encoder_->getStream().addCallbacks(*this);\n721: \n722:   const std::string& scheme =\n723:       is_ssl ? Http::Headers::get().SchemeValues.Https : Http::Headers::get().SchemeValues.Http;\n724: \n725:   std::string host = tunnel_config_.proxyHost(downstream_info_);\n726:   const auto* dynamic_port =\n727:       downstream_info_.filterState()->getDataReadOnly<StreamInfo::UInt32Accessor>(\n728:           \"udp.connect.proxy_port\");\n729:   if (dynamic_port != nullptr && dynamic_port->value() > 0 && dynamic_port->value() <= 65535) {\n730:     absl::StrAppend(&host, \":\", std::to_string(dynamic_port->value()));\n731:   } else if (tunnel_config_.proxyPort().has_value()) {\n732:     absl::StrAppend(&host, \":\", std::to_string(tunnel_config_.proxyPort().value()));\n733:   }\n734: \n735:   auto headers = Http::RequestHeaderMapImpl::create();\n736:   headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Scheme, scheme);\n737:   headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Host, host);\n738: \n739:   if (tunnel_config_.usePost()) {\n740:     headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Method, \"POST\");\n741:     headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Path, tunnel_config_.postPath());\n742:   } else {\n743:     // The Envoy HTTP/2 and HTTP/3 clients expect the request header map to be in the form of HTTP/1\n744:     // upgrade to issue an extended CONNECT request.\n745:     headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Method, \"GET\");\n746:     headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Connection, \"Upgrade\");\n747:     headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Upgrade, \"connect-udp\");\n748:     headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().CapsuleProtocol, \"?1\");\n749:     const std::string target_tunnel_path = resolveTargetTunnelPath();\n750:     headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Path, target_tunnel_path);\n751:   }\n752: \n753:   tunnel_config_.headerEvaluator().evaluateHeaders(*headers, {downstream_info_.getRequestHeaders()},\n754:                                                    downstream_info_);\n755: \n756:   const auto status = request_encoder_->encodeHeaders(*headers, false);\n757:   // Encoding can only fail on missing required request headers.\n758:   ASSERT(status.ok());\n759: }\n760: \n761: const std::string HttpUpstreamImpl::resolveTargetTunnelPath() {\n762:   std::string target_host = tunnel_config_.targetHost(downstream_info_);\n763:   target_host = Http::Utility::PercentEncoding::encode(target_host, \":\");\n764: \n765:   const auto* dynamic_port =\n766:       downstream_info_.filterState()->getDataReadOnly<StreamInfo::UInt32Accessor>(\n767:           \"udp.connect.target_port\");\n768: \n769:   std::string target_port;\n770:   if (dynamic_port != nullptr && dynamic_port->value() > 0 && dynamic_port->value() <= 65535) {\n771:     target_port = std::to_string(dynamic_port->value());\n772:   } else {\n773:     target_port = std::to_string(tunnel_config_.defaultTargetPort());\n774:   }\n775: \n776:   // TODO(ohadvano): support configurable URI template.\n777:   return absl::StrCat(\"/.well-known/masque/udp/\", target_host, \"/\", target_port, \"/\");\n778: }\n779: \n780: HttpUpstreamImpl::~HttpUpstreamImpl() { resetEncoder(Network::ConnectionEvent::LocalClose); }\n781: \n782: void HttpUpstreamImpl::resetEncoder(Network::ConnectionEvent event, bool by_downstream) {\n783:   if (!request_encoder_) {\n784:     return;\n785:   }\n786: \n787:   request_encoder_->getStream().removeCallbacks(*this);\n788:   if (by_downstream) {\n789:     request_encoder_->getStream().resetStream(Http::StreamResetReason::LocalReset);\n790:   }\n791: \n792:   request_encoder_ = nullptr;\n793: \n794:   // If we did not receive a valid CONNECT response yet we treat this as a pool\n795:   // failure, otherwise we forward the event downstream.\n796:   if (tunnel_creation_callbacks_.has_value()) {\n797:     tunnel_creation_callbacks_.value().get().onStreamFailure();\n798:     return;\n799:   }\n800: \n801:   if (!by_downstream) {\n802:     upstream_callbacks_.onUpstreamEvent(event);\n803:   }\n804: }\n805: \n806: TunnelingConnectionPoolImpl::TunnelingConnectionPoolImpl(\n807:     Upstream::ThreadLocalCluster& thread_local_cluster, Upstream::LoadBalancerContext* context,\n808:     const UdpTunnelingConfig& tunnel_config, UpstreamTunnelCallbacks& upstream_callbacks,\n809:     StreamInfo::StreamInfo& downstream_info, bool flush_access_log_on_tunnel_connected,\n810:     const std::vector<AccessLog::InstanceSharedPtr>& session_access_logs)\n811:     : upstream_callbacks_(upstream_callbacks), tunnel_config_(tunnel_config),\n812:       downstream_info_(downstream_info),\n813:       flush_access_log_on_tunnel_connected_(flush_access_log_on_tunnel_connected),\n814:       session_access_logs_(session_access_logs) {\n815:   // TODO(ohadvano): support upstream HTTP/3.\n816:   absl::optional<Http::Protocol> protocol = Http::Protocol::Http2;\n817:   conn_pool_data_ =\n818:       thread_local_cluster.httpConnPool(Upstream::ResourcePriority::Default, protocol, context);\n819: }\n820: \n821: void TunnelingConnectionPoolImpl::newStream(HttpStreamCallbacks& callbacks) {\n822:   callbacks_ = &callbacks;\n823:   upstream_ =\n824:       std::make_unique<HttpUpstreamImpl>(upstream_callbacks_, tunnel_config_, downstream_info_);\n825:   Tcp::ConnectionPool::Cancellable* handle =\n826:       conn_pool_data_.value().newStream(upstream_->responseDecoder(), *this,\n827:                                         {/*can_send_early_data_=*/false,\n828:                                          /*can_use_http3_=*/false});\n829: \n830:   if (handle != nullptr) {\n831:     upstream_handle_ = handle;\n832:   }\n833: }\n834: \n835: void TunnelingConnectionPoolImpl::onPoolFailure(Http::ConnectionPool::PoolFailureReason reason,\n836:                                                 absl::string_view failure_reason,\n837:                                                 Upstream::HostDescriptionConstSharedPtr host) {\n838:   upstream_handle_ = nullptr;\n839:   callbacks_->onStreamFailure(reason, failure_reason, host);\n840:   downstream_info_.upstreamInfo()->setUpstreamHost(host);\n841:   downstream_info_.upstreamInfo()->setUpstreamTransportFailureReason(failure_reason);\n842: }\n843: \n844: void TunnelingConnectionPoolImpl::onPoolReady(Http::RequestEncoder& request_encoder,\n845:                                               Upstream::HostDescriptionConstSharedPtr upstream_host,\n846:                                               StreamInfo::StreamInfo& upstream_info,\n847:                                               absl::optional<Http::Protocol>) {\n848:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"Upstream connection [C{}] ready, creating tunnel stream\",\n849:             upstream_info.downstreamAddressProvider().connectionID().value());\n850: \n851:   upstream_handle_ = nullptr;\n852:   upstream_host_ = upstream_host;\n853:   upstream_info_ = &upstream_info;\n854:   ssl_info_ = upstream_info.downstreamAddressProvider().sslConnection();\n855: \n856:   bool is_ssl = upstream_host->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport();\n857:   upstream_->setRequestEncoder(request_encoder, is_ssl);\n858:   upstream_->setTunnelCreationCallbacks(*this);\n859:   downstream_info_.upstreamInfo()->setUpstreamHost(upstream_host);\n860: \n861:   if (flush_access_log_on_tunnel_connected_) {\n862:     const Formatter::HttpFormatterContext log_context{\n863:         nullptr, nullptr, nullptr, {}, AccessLog::AccessLogType::UdpTunnelUpstreamConnected};\n864:     for (const auto& access_log : session_access_logs_) {\n865:       access_log->log(log_context, downstream_info_);\n866:     }\n867:   }\n868: }\n869: \n870: TunnelingConnectionPoolPtr TunnelingConnectionPoolFactory::createConnPool(\n871:     Upstream::ThreadLocalCluster& thread_local_cluster, Upstream::LoadBalancerContext* context,\n872:     const UdpTunnelingConfig& tunnel_config, UpstreamTunnelCallbacks& upstream_callbacks,\n873:     StreamInfo::StreamInfo& downstream_info, bool flush_access_log_on_tunnel_connected,\n874:     const std::vector<AccessLog::InstanceSharedPtr>& session_access_logs) const {\n875:   auto pool = std::make_unique<TunnelingConnectionPoolImpl>(\n876:       thread_local_cluster, context, tunnel_config, upstream_callbacks, downstream_info,\n877:       flush_access_log_on_tunnel_connected, session_access_logs);\n878:   return (pool->valid() ? std::move(pool) : nullptr);\n879: }\n880: \n881: UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::TunnelingActiveSession(\n882:     ClusterInfo& cluster, Network::UdpRecvData::LocalPeerAddresses&& addresses)\n883:     : ActiveSession(cluster, std::move(addresses), nullptr) {}\n884: \n885: bool UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::createUpstream() {\n886:   if (conn_pool_factory_) {\n887:     // A session filter may call on continueFilterChain(), after already creating the upstream,\n888:     // so we first check that the factory was not created already.\n889:     return true;\n890:   }\n891: \n892:   conn_pool_factory_ = std::make_unique<TunnelingConnectionPoolFactory>();\n893:   load_balancer_context_ = std::make_unique<UdpLoadBalancerContext>(\n894:       cluster_.filter_.config_->hashPolicy(), addresses_.peer_, &udp_session_info_);\n895: \n896:   return establishUpstreamConnection();\n897: }\n898: \n899: bool UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::establishUpstreamConnection() {\n900:   if (!createConnectionPool()) {\n901:     ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"failed to create upstream connection pool\");\n902:     cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tunnel_failure_.inc();\n903:     return false;\n904:   }\n905: \n906:   return true;\n907: }\n908: \n909: bool UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::createConnectionPool() {\n910:   ASSERT(conn_pool_factory_);\n911: \n912:   // Check this here because the TCP conn pool will queue our request waiting for a connection that\n913:   // will never be released.\n914:   if (!cluster_.cluster_.info()\n915:            ->resourceManager(Upstream::ResourcePriority::Default)\n916:            .connections()\n917:            .canCreate()) {\n918:     udp_session_info_.setResponseFlag(StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::UpstreamOverflow);\n919:     cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_overflow_.inc();\n920:     return false;\n921:   }\n922: \n923:   if (connect_attempts_ >= cluster_.filter_.config_->tunnelingConfig()->maxConnectAttempts()) {\n924:     udp_session_info_.setResponseFlag(StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::UpstreamRetryLimitExceeded);\n925:     cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_connect_attempts_exceeded_.inc();\n926:     return false;\n927:   } else if (connect_attempts_ >= 1) {\n928:     cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_rq_retry_.inc();\n929:   }\n930: \n931:   conn_pool_ = conn_pool_factory_->createConnPool(\n932:       cluster_.cluster_, load_balancer_context_.get(), *cluster_.filter_.config_->tunnelingConfig(),\n933:       *this, udp_session_info_, cluster_.filter_.config_->flushAccessLogOnTunnelConnected(),\n934:       cluster_.filter_.config_->sessionAccessLogs());\n935: \n936:   if (conn_pool_) {\n937:     connecting_ = true;\n938:     connect_attempts_++;\n939:     udp_session_info_.setAttemptCount(connect_attempts_);\n940:     conn_pool_->newStream(*this);\n941:     return true;\n942:   }\n943: \n944:   udp_session_info_.setResponseFlag(StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::NoHealthyUpstream);\n945:   return false;\n946: }\n947: \n948: void UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::onStreamFailure(\n949:     ConnectionPool::PoolFailureReason reason, absl::string_view failure_reason,\n950:     Upstream::HostDescriptionConstSharedPtr) {\n951:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"Failed to create upstream stream: {}\", failure_reason);\n952: \n953:   conn_pool_.reset();\n954:   upstream_.reset();\n955: \n956:   switch (reason) {\n957:   case ConnectionPool::PoolFailureReason::Overflow:\n958:   case ConnectionPool::PoolFailureReason::LocalConnectionFailure:\n959:     onUpstreamEvent(Network::ConnectionEvent::LocalClose);\n960:     break;\n961:   case ConnectionPool::PoolFailureReason::Timeout:\n962:     udp_session_info_.setResponseFlag(StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::UpstreamConnectionFailure);\n963:     onUpstreamEvent(Network::ConnectionEvent::RemoteClose);\n964:     break;\n965:   case ConnectionPool::PoolFailureReason::RemoteConnectionFailure:\n966:     if (connecting_) {\n967:       udp_session_info_.setResponseFlag(StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::UpstreamConnectionFailure);\n968:     }\n969:     onUpstreamEvent(Network::ConnectionEvent::RemoteClose);\n970:     break;\n971:   }\n972: }\n973: \n974: void UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::onStreamReady(StreamInfo::StreamInfo* upstream_info,\n975:                                                            std::unique_ptr<HttpUpstream>&& upstream,\n976:                                                            Upstream::HostDescriptionConstSharedPtr&,\n977:                                                            const Network::ConnectionInfoProvider&,\n978:                                                            Ssl::ConnectionInfoConstSharedPtr) {\n979:   // TODO(ohadvano): save the host description to host_ field. This requires refactoring because\n980:   // currently host_ is of type HostConstSharedPtr and not HostDescriptionConstSharedPtr.\n981:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"Upstream connection [C{}] attached to session ID [S{}]\",\n982:             upstream_info->downstreamAddressProvider().connectionID().value(), sessionId());\n983: \n984:   upstream_ = std::move(upstream);\n985:   conn_pool_.reset();\n986:   connecting_ = false;\n987:   can_send_upstream_ = true;\n988:   cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tunnel_success_.inc();\n989:   flushBuffer();\n990: }\n991: \n992: void UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::onUpstreamEvent(Network::ConnectionEvent event) {\n993:   if (event == Network::ConnectionEvent::Connected ||\n994:       event == Network::ConnectionEvent::ConnectedZeroRtt) {\n995:     return;\n996:   }\n997: \n998:   bool connecting = connecting_;\n999:   connecting_ = false;\n1000: \n1001:   if (event == Network::ConnectionEvent::RemoteClose ||\n1002:       event == Network::ConnectionEvent::LocalClose) {\n1003:     upstream_.reset();\n1004: \n1005:     if (!connecting || !establishUpstreamConnection()) {\n1006:       cluster_.removeSession(this);\n1007:     }\n1008:   }\n1009: }\n1010: \n1011: void UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::onAboveWriteBufferHighWatermark() {\n1012:   can_send_upstream_ = false;\n1013: }\n1014: \n1015: void UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::onBelowWriteBufferLowWatermark() {\n1016:   can_send_upstream_ = true;\n1017:   flushBuffer();\n1018: }\n1019: \n1020: void UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::flushBuffer() {\n1021:   while (!datagrams_buffer_.empty()) {\n1022:     BufferedDatagramPtr buffered_datagram = std::move(datagrams_buffer_.front());\n1023:     datagrams_buffer_.pop();\n1024:     buffered_bytes_ -= buffered_datagram->buffer_->length();\n1025:     upstream_->encodeData(*buffered_datagram->buffer_);\n1026:   }\n1027: }\n1028: \n1029: void UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::maybeBufferDatagram(Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\n1030:   if (!cluster_.filter_.config_->tunnelingConfig()->bufferEnabled()) {\n1031:     return;\n1032:   }\n1033: \n1034:   if (datagrams_buffer_.size() ==\n1035:           cluster_.filter_.config_->tunnelingConfig()->maxBufferedDatagrams() ||\n1036:       buffered_bytes_ + data.buffer_->length() >\n1037:           cluster_.filter_.config_->tunnelingConfig()->maxBufferedBytes()) {\n1038:     cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tunnel_buffer_overflow_.inc();\n1039:     return;\n1040:   }\n1041: \n1042:   auto buffered_datagram = std::make_unique<Network::UdpRecvData>();\n1043:   buffered_datagram->addresses_ = {std::move(data.addresses_.local_),\n1044:                                    std::move(data.addresses_.peer_)};\n1045:   buffered_datagram->buffer_ = std::move(data.buffer_);\n1046:   buffered_datagram->receive_time_ = data.receive_time_;\n1047:   buffered_bytes_ += buffered_datagram->buffer_->length();\n1048:   datagrams_buffer_.push(std::move(buffered_datagram));\n1049: }\n1050: \n1051: void UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::writeUpstream(Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\n1052:   if (!upstream_ || !can_send_upstream_) {\n1053:     maybeBufferDatagram(data);\n1054:     return;\n1055:   }\n1056: \n1057:   if (upstream_) {\n1058:     upstream_->encodeData(*data.buffer_);\n1059:   }\n1060: }\n1061: \n1062: void UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::onUpstreamData(Buffer::Instance& data, bool) {\n1063:   const uint64_t rx_buffer_length = data.length();\n1064:   ENVOY_LOG(trace, \"received {} byte datagram from upstream: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\",\n1065:             rx_buffer_length, addresses_.peer_->asStringView(), addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\n1066:             host_ != nullptr ? host_->address()->asStringView() : \"unknown\");\n1067: \n1068:   cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_rx_datagrams_.inc();\n1069:   cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_rx_bytes_total_.add(rx_buffer_length);\n1070:   resetIdleTimer();\n1071: \n1072:   Network::UdpRecvData recv_data{{addresses_.local_, addresses_.peer_},\n1073:                                  std::make_unique<Buffer::OwnedImpl>(data),\n1074:                                  cluster_.filter_.config_->timeSource().monotonicTime()};\n1075:   processUpstreamDatagram(recv_data);\n1076: }\n1077: \n1078: void UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::onIdleTimer() {\n1079:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"session idle timeout: downstream={} local={}\", addresses_.peer_->asStringView(),\n1080:             addresses_.local_->asStringView());\n1081:   udp_session_info_.setResponseFlag(StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::StreamIdleTimeout);\n1082:   cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().idle_timeout_.inc();\n1083:   upstream_->onDownstreamEvent(Network::ConnectionEvent::LocalClose);\n1084:   cluster_.removeSession(this);\n1085: }\n1086: \n1087: } // namespace UdpProxy\n1088: } // namespace UdpFilters\n1089: } // namespace Extensions\n1090: } // namespace Envoy\n1091: ",

setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n943: stat_prefix: foo\n944: matcher:\n945:   on_no_match:\n946:     action:\n947:       name: route\n948:       typed_config:\n949:         '@type': \\\"connect-udp\\\");\\n1603:       headers.addCopy(\\\"connection\\\", \\\"Upgrade\\\");\\n1604:     }\\n1605: \\n1606:     if (header_to_add) {\\n1607:       headers.addCopy(header_to_add.value().key_, header_to_add.value().value_);\\n1608:     }\\n1609: \\n1610:     return headers;\\n1611:   }\\n1612: \\n1613:   void setAndExpectRequestEncoder(Http::TestRequestHeaderMapImpl expected_headers,\\n1614:                                   bool is_ssl = false) {\\n1615:     EXPECT_CALL(request_encoder_.stream_, addCallbacks(_));\\n1616:     EXPECT_CALL(request_encoder_, encodeHeaders(_, _))\\n1617:         .WillOnce(Invoke([expected_headers](const Http::RequestHeaderMap& headers,\\n1618: once.\\n1627:     EXPECT_CALL(request_encoder_.stream_, removeCallbacks(_));\\n1628:   }\\n1629: \\n1630:   void filterStateOverride(absl::optional<uint32_t> proxy_port = absl::nullopt,\\n1631:                            absl::optional<uint32_t> target_port = absl::nullopt) {\\n1632:     if (proxy_port) {\\n1633:       stream_info_.filterState()->setData(\\n1634: setup(absl::optional<HeaderToAdd> header_to_add = absl::nullopt) {\\n1648:     Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::core::v3::HeaderValueOption> headers_to_add;\\n1649:     if (header_to_add) {\\n1650:       envoy::config::core::v3::HeaderValueOption* header = headers_to_add.Add();\\n1651:       header->mutable_header()->set_key(header_to_add.value().key_);\\n1652:       header->mutable_header()->set_value(header_to_add.value().value_);\\n1653:     }\\n1654: \\n1655:     header_evaluator_ = Envoy::Router::HeaderParser::configure(headers_to_add);\\n1656:     config_ = std::make_unique<NiceMock<MockUdpTunnelingConfig>>(*header_evaluator_);\\n1657:     upstream_ = std::make_unique<HttpUpstreamImpl>(callbacks_, *config_, stream_info_);\\n1658:     upstream_->setTunnelCreationCallbacks(creation_callbacks_);\\n1659:   }\\n1660: \\n1661:   NiceMock<MockUpstreamTunnelCallbacks> callbacks_;\\n1662:   NiceMock<StreamInfo::MockStreamInfo> stream_info_;\\n1663:   NiceMock<Http::MockRequestEncoder> request_encoder_;\\n1664:   NiceMock<MockTunnelCreationCallbacks> creation_callbacks_;\\n1665: false));\\n1675:   Buffer::OwnedImpl data;\\n1676:   upstream_->encodeData(data);\\n1677: }\\n1678: \\n1679: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, WatermarksCallBack) {\\n1680:   setup();\\n1681: \\n1682: setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\\n1691: \\n1692:   // If the creation callbacks are active will resetting the stream, it means that response\\n1693:   // headers were not received, so it's expected to be a failure.\\n1694:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamFailure());\\n1695:   upstream_->onResetStream(Http::StreamResetReason::ConnectionTimeout, \\\"reason\\\");\\n1696:
