cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_overflow_.inc();\n    return nullptr;\n  }\n\n  if (defer_socket_creation) {\n    ASSERT(!optional_host);\n    return createSessionWithOptionalHost(std::move(addresses), nullptr);\n  }\n\n  if (optional_host) {\n    return createSessionWithOptionalHost(std::move(addresses), optional_host);\n  }\n\n  auto host = chooseHost(addresses.peer_, nullptr);\n  if (host == nullptr) {\n    ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"cannot find any valid host.\");\n    cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_none_healthy_.inc();\n    return nullptr;\n  }\n\n  return createSessionWithOptionalHost(std::move(addresses), host);\n}\n\nUdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession* UdpProxyFilter::ClusterInfo::createSessionWithOptionalHost(\n    Network::UdpRecvData::LocalPeerAddresses&& addresses,\n    const Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr& host) {\n  ActiveSessionPtr new_session;\n  if (filter_.config_->tunnelingConfig()) {\n    ASSERT(!host);\n    new_session = std::make_unique<TunnelingActiveSession>(*this, std::move(addresses));\n  } else {\n    new_session = std::make_unique<UdpActiveSession>(*this, std::move(addresses), host);\n  }\n\n  new_session->createFilterChain();\n  if (new_session->onNewSession()) {\n    auto new_session_ptr = new_session.get();\n    sessions_.emplace(std::move(new_session));\n    return new_session_ptr;\n  }\n\n  new_session->onSessionComplete();\n  return nullptr;\n}\n\nUpstream::HostConstSharedPtr UdpProxyFilter::ClusterInfo::chooseHost(\n    const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& peer_address,\n    const StreamInfo::StreamInfo* stream_info) const {\n  UdpLoadBalancerContext context(filter_.config_->hashPolicy(), peer_address, stream_info);\n  Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr host = cluster_.loadBalancer().chooseHost(&context);\n  return host;\n}\n\nUdpProxyFilter::StickySessionClusterInfo::StickySessionClusterInfo(\n    UdpProxyFilter& filter, Upstream::ThreadLocalCluster& cluster)\n    : ClusterInfo(filter, cluster,\n                  SessionStorageType(1, HeterogeneousActiveSessionHash(false),\n                                     HeterogeneousActiveSessionEqual(false))) {}\n\nNetwork::FilterStatus UdpProxyFilter::StickySessionClusterInfo::onData(Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\n  bool defer_socket = filter_.config_->hasSessionFilters() || filter_.config_->tunnelingConfig();\n  const auto active_session_it = sessions_.find(data.addresses_);\n  ActiveSession* active_session;\n  if (active_session_it == sessions_.end()) {\n    active_session = createSession(std::move(data.addresses_), nullptr, defer_socket);\n    if (active_session == nullptr) {\n      return Network::FilterStatus::StopIteration;\n    }\n  } else {\n    active_session = active_session_it->get();\n    // We defer the socket creation when the session includes filters, so the filters can be\n    // iterated before choosing the host, to allow dynamically choosing upstream host. Due to this,\n    // we can't perform health checks during a session.\n    // TODO(ohadvano): add similar functionality that is performed after session filter chain\n    // iteration to signal filters about the unhealthy host, or replace the host during the session.\n    if (!defer_socket &&\n        active_session->host().value().get().coarseHealth() == Upstream::Host::Health::Unhealthy) {\n      // If a host becomes unhealthy, we optimally would like to replace it with a new session\n      // to a healthy host. We may eventually want to make this behavior configurable, but for now\n      // this will be the universal behavior.\n      auto host = chooseHost(data.addresses_.peer_, nullptr);\n      if (host != nullptr && host->coarseHealth() != Upstream::Host::Health::Unhealthy &&\n          host.get() != &active_session->host().value().get()) {\n        ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"upstream session unhealthy, recreating the session\");\n        removeSession(active_session);\n        active_session = createSession(std::move(data.addresses_), host, false);\n      } else {\n        // In this case we could not get a better host, so just keep using the current session.\n        ENVOY_LOG(trace, \"upstream session unhealthy, but unable to get a better host\");\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  active_session->onData(data);\n\n  return Network::FilterStatus::StopIteration;\n}\n\nUdpProxyFilter::PerPacketLoadBalancingClusterInfo::PerPacketLoadBalancingClusterInfo(\n    UdpProxyFilter& filter, Upstream::ThreadLocalCluster& cluster)\n    : ClusterInfo(filter, cluster,\n                  SessionStorageType(1, HeterogeneousActiveSessionHash(true),\n                                     HeterogeneousActiveSessionEqual(true))) {}\n\nNetwork::FilterStatus\nUdpProxyFilter::PerPacketLoadBalancingClusterInfo::onData(Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\n  auto host = chooseHost(data.addresses_.peer_, nullptr);\n  if (host == nullptr) {\n    ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"cannot find any valid host.\");\n    cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_none_healthy_.inc();\n    return Network::FilterStatus::StopIteration;\n  }\n\n  ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"selected {} host as upstream.\", host->address()->asStringView());\n\n  LocalPeerHostAddresses key{data.addresses_, *host};\n  const auto active_session_it = sessions_.find(key);\n  ActiveSession* active_session;\n  if (active_session_it == sessions_.end()) {\n    active_session = createSession(std::move(data.addresses_), host, false);\n    if (active_session == nullptr) {\n      return Network::FilterStatus::StopIteration;\n    }\n  } else {\n    active_session = active_session_it->get();\n    ENVOY_LOG(trace, \"found already existing session on host {}.\",\n              active_session->host().value().get().address()->asStringView());\n  }\n\n  active_session->onData(data);\n\n  return Network::FilterStatus::StopIteration;\n}\n\nstd::atomic<uint64_t> UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::next_global_session_id_;\n\nUdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::ActiveSession(ClusterInfo& cluster,\n                                             Network::UdpRecvData::LocalPeerAddresses&& addresses,\n                                             const Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr& host)\n    : cluster_(cluster), addresses_(std::move(addresses)), host_(host),\n      session_id_(next_global_session_id_++),\n      idle_timer_(cluster.filter_.read_callbacks_->udpListener().dispatcher().createTimer(\n          [this] { onIdleTimer(); })),\n      udp_session_info_(StreamInfo::StreamInfoImpl(cluster_.filter_.config_->timeSource(),\n                                                   createDownstreamConnectionInfoProvider(),\n                                                   StreamInfo::FilterState::LifeSpan::Connection)) {\n  udp_session_info_.setUpstreamInfo(std::make_shared<StreamInfo::UpstreamInfoImpl>());\n  cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.inc();\n  cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.inc();\n  cluster_.cluster_.info()\n      ->resourceManager(Upstream::ResourcePriority::Default)\n      .connections()\n      .inc();\n}\n\nUdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::UdpActiveSession(\n    ClusterInfo& cluster, Network::UdpRecvData::LocalPeerAddresses&& addresses,\n    const Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr& host)\n    : ActiveSession(cluster, std::move(addresses), std::move(host)),\n      use_original_src_ip_(cluster.filter_.config_->usingOriginalSrcIp()) {}\n\nUdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::~ActiveSession() {\n  ENVOY_BUG(on_session_complete_called_, \"onSessionComplete() not called\");\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onSessionComplete() {\n  ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"deleting the session: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\",\n            addresses_.peer_->asStringView(), addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\n            host_ != nullptr ? host_->address()->asStringView() : \"unknown\");\n\n  cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.dec();\n  cluster_.cluster_.info()\n      ->resourceManager(Upstream::ResourcePriority::Default)\n      .connections()\n      .dec();\n\n  disableAccessLogFlushTimer();\n\n  for (auto& active_read_filter : read_filters_) {\n    active_read_filter->read_filter_->onSessionComplete();\n  }\n\n  for (auto& active_write_filter : write_filters_) {\n    active_write_filter->write_filter_->onSessionComplete();\n  }\n\n  if (!cluster_.filter_.config_->sessionAccessLogs().empty()) {\n    fillSessionStreamInfo();\n    const Formatter::HttpFormatterContext log_context{\n        nullptr, nullptr, nullptr, {}, AccessLog::AccessLogType::UdpSessionEnd};\n    for (const auto& access_log : cluster_.filter_.config_->sessionAccessLogs()) {\n      access_log->log(log_context, udp_session_info_);\n    }\n  }\n\n  on_session_complete_called_ = true;\n}\n\nstd::shared_ptr<Network::ConnectionInfoSetterImpl>\nUdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::createDownstreamConnectionInfoProvider() {\n  auto downstream_connection_info_provider =\n      std::make_shared<Network::ConnectionInfoSetterImpl>(addresses_.local_, addresses_.peer_);\n  downstream_connection_info_provider->setConnectionID(session_id_);\n  return downstream_connection_info_provider;\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::fillSessionStreamInfo() {\n  ProtobufWkt::Struct stats_obj;\n  auto& fields_map = *stats_obj.mutable_fields();\n  fields_map[\"cluster_name\"] = ValueUtil::stringValue(cluster_.cluster_.info()->name());\n  fields_map[\"bytes_sent\"] = ValueUtil::numberValue(session_stats_.downstream_sess_tx_bytes_);\n  fields_map[\"bytes_received\"] = ValueUtil::numberValue(session_stats_.downstream_sess_rx_bytes_);\n  fields_map[\"errors_sent\"] = ValueUtil::numberValue(session_stats_.downstream_sess_tx_errors_);\n  fields_map[\"datagrams_sent\"] =\n      ValueUtil::numberValue(session_stats_.downstream_sess_tx_datagrams_);\n  fields_map[\"datagrams_received\"] =\n      ValueUtil::numberValue(session_stats_.downstream_sess_rx_datagrams_);\n\n  udp_session_info_.setDynamicMetadata(\"udp.proxy.session\", stats_obj);\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::fillProxyStreamInfo() {\n  ProtobufWkt::Struct stats_obj;\n  auto& fields_map = *stats_obj.mutable_fields();\n  fields_map[\"bytes_sent\"] =\n      ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_bytes_.value());\n  fields_map[\"bytes_received\"] =\n      ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_bytes_.value());\n  fields_map[\"errors_sent\"] =\n      ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_errors_.value());\n  fields_map[\"errors_received\"] =\n      ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_errors_.value());\n  fields_map[\"datagrams_sent\"] =\n      ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_datagrams_.value());\n  fields_map[\"datagrams_received\"] =\n      ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_datagrams_.value());\n  fields_map[\"no_route\"] =\n      ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_no_route_.value());\n  fields_map[\"session_total\"] =\n      ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n  fields_map[\"idle_timeout\"] = ValueUtil::numberValue(config_->stats().idle_timeout_.value());\n\n  udp_proxy_stats_.value().setDynamicMetadata(\"udp.proxy.proxy\", stats_obj);\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::onIdleTimer() {\n  ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"session idle timeout: downstream={} local={}\", addresses_.peer_->asStringView(),\n            addresses_.local_->asStringView());\n  cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().idle_timeout_.inc();\n  cluster_.removeSession(this);\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::onReadReady() {\n  resetIdleTimer();\n\n  // TODO(mattklein123): We should not be passing *addresses_.local_ to this function as we are\n  //                     not trying to populate the local address for received packets.\n  uint32_t packets_dropped = 0;\n  const Api::IoErrorPtr result = Network::Utility::readPacketsFromSocket(\n      udp_socket_->ioHandle(), *addresses_.local_, *this, cluster_.filter_.config_->timeSource(),\n      cluster_.filter_.config_->upstreamSocketConfig().prefer_gro_, /*allow_mmsg=*/true,\n      packets_dropped);\n  if (result == nullptr) {\n    udp_socket_->ioHandle().activateFileEvents(Event::FileReadyType::Read);\n    return;\n  }\n  if (result->getErrorCode() != Api::IoError::IoErrorCode::Again) {\n    cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_rx_errors_.inc();\n  }\n  // Flush out buffered data at the end of IO event.\n  cluster_.filter_.read_callbacks_->udpListener().flush();\n}\n\nbool UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onNewSession() {\n  if (cluster_.filter_.config_->accessLogFlushInterval().has_value() &&\n      !cluster_.filter_.config_->sessionAccessLogs().empty()) {\n    access_log_flush_timer_ =\n        cluster_.filter_.read_callbacks_->udpListener().dispatcher().createTimer(\n            [this] { onAccessLogFlushInterval(); });\n    rearmAccessLogFlushTimer();\n  }\n\n  // Set UUID for the session. This is used for logging and tracing.\n  udp_session_info_.setStreamIdProvider(std::make_shared<StreamInfo::StreamIdProviderImpl>(\n      cluster_.filter_.config_->randomGenerator().uuid()));\n\n  for (auto& active_read_filter : read_filters_) {\n    if (active_read_filter->initialized_) {\n      // The filter may call continueFilterChain() in onNewSession(), causing next\n      // filters to iterate onNewSession(), so check that it was not called before.\n      continue;\n    }\n\n    active_read_filter->initialized_ = true;\n    auto status = active_read_filter->read_filter_->onNewSession();\n    if (status == ReadFilterStatus::StopIteration) {\n      return true;\n    }\n  }\n\n  return createUpstream();\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onData(Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\n  ENVOY_LOG(trace, \"received {} byte datagram from downstream: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\",\n            data.buffer_->length(), addresses_.peer_->asStringView(),\n            addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\n            host_ != nullptr ? host_->address()->asStringView() : \"unknown\");\n\n  const uint64_t rx_buffer_length = data.buffer_->length();\n  cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_bytes_.add(rx_buffer_length);\n  session_stats_.downstream_sess_rx_bytes_ += rx_buffer_length;\n  cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_datagrams_.inc();\n  ++session_stats_.downstream_sess_rx_datagrams_;\n  resetIdleTimer();\n\n  for (auto& active_read_filter : read_filters_) {\n    auto status = active_read_filter->read_filter_->onData(data);\n    if (status == ReadFilterStatus::StopIteration) {\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n\n  writeUpstream(data);\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::writeUpstream(Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\n  if (!udp_socket_) {\n    ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"cannot write upstream because the socket was not created.\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // NOTE: On the first write, a local ephemeral port is bound, and thus this write can fail due to\n  //       port exhaustion. To avoid exhaustion, UDP sockets will be connected and associated with\n  //       a 4-tuple including the local IP, and the UDP port may be reused for multiple\n  //       connections unless use_original_src_ip_ is set. When use_original_src_ip_ is set, the\n  //       socket should not be connected since the source IP will be changed.\n  // NOTE: We do not specify the local IP to use for the sendmsg call if use_original_src_ip_ is not\n  //       set. We allow the OS to select the right IP based on outbound routing rules if\n  //       use_original_src_ip_ is not set, else use downstream peer IP as local IP.\n  if (!connected_ && !use_original_src_ip_) {\n    Api::SysCallIntResult rc = udp_socket_->ioHandle().connect(host_->address());\n    if (SOCKET_FAILURE(rc.return_value_)) {\n      ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"cannot connect: ({}) {}\", rc.errno_, errorDetails(rc.errno_));\n      cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tx_errors_.inc();\n      return;\n    }\n\n    connected_ = true;\n  }\n\n  ASSERT((connected_ || use_original_src_ip_) && udp_socket_ && host_);\n\n  const uint64_t tx_buffer_length = data.buffer_->length();\n  ENVOY_LOG(trace, \"writing {} byte datagram upstream: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\",\n            tx_buffer_length, addresses_.peer_->asStringView(), addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\n            host_->address()->asStringView());\n\n  const Network::Address::Ip* local_ip = use_original_src_ip_ ? addresses_.peer_->ip() : nullptr;\n  Api::IoCallUint64Result rc = Network::Utility::writeToSocket(\n      udp_socket_->ioHandle(), *data.buffer_, local_ip, *host_->address());\n\n  if (!rc.ok()) {\n    cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tx_errors_.inc();\n  } else {\n    cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tx_datagrams_.inc();\n    cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_tx_bytes_total_.add(tx_buffer_length);\n  }\n}\n\nbool UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onContinueFilterChain(ActiveReadFilter* filter) {\n  ASSERT(filter != nullptr);\n\n  std::list<ActiveReadFilterPtr>::iterator entry = std::next(filter->entry());\n  for (; entry != read_filters_.end(); entry++) {\n    if (!(*entry)->read_filter_ || (*entry)->initialized_) {\n      continue;\n    }\n\n    (*entry)->initialized_ = true;\n    auto status = (*entry)->read_filter_->onNewSession();\n    if (status == ReadFilterStatus::StopIteration) {\n      return true;\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (!createUpstream()) {\n    cluster_.removeSession(this);\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  return true;\n}\n\nbool UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::createUpstream() {\n  if (udp_socket_) {\n    // A session filter may call on continueFilterChain(), after already creating the socket,\n    // so we first check that the socket was not created already.\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  if (!host_) {\n    host_ = cluster_.chooseHost(addresses_.peer_, &udp_session_info_);\n    if (host_ == nullptr) {\n      ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"cannot find any valid host.\");\n      cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_none_healthy_.inc();\n      return false;\n    }\n  }\n\n  udp_session_info_.upstreamInfo()->setUpstreamHost(host_);\n  cluster_.addSession(host_.get(), this);\n  createUdpSocket(host_);\n  return true;\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::createUdpSocket(const Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr& host) {\n  // NOTE: The socket call can only fail due to memory/fd exhaustion. No local ephemeral port\n  //       is bound until the first packet is sent to the upstream host.\n  udp_socket_ = cluster_.filter_.createUdpSocket(host);\n  udp_socket_->ioHandle().initializeFileEvent(\n      cluster_.filter_.read_callbacks_->udpListener().dispatcher(),\n      [this](uint32_t) { onReadReady(); }, Event::PlatformDefaultTriggerType,\n      Event::FileReadyType::Read);\n\n  ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"creating new session: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\",\n            addresses_.peer_->asStringView(), addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\n            host->address()->asStringView());\n\n  if (use_original_src_ip_) {\n    const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr socket_options =\n        Network::SocketOptionFactory::buildIpTransparentOptions();\n    const bool ok = Network::Socket::applyOptions(\n        socket_options, *udp_socket_, envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption::STATE_PREBIND);\n\n    RELEASE_ASSERT(ok, \"Should never occur!\");\n    ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"The original src is enabled for address {}.\",\n              addresses_.peer_->asStringView());\n  }\n\n  // TODO(mattklein123): Enable dropped packets socket option. In general the Socket abstraction\n  // does not work well right now for client sockets. It's too heavy weight and is aimed at listener\n  // sockets. We need to figure out how to either refactor Socket into something that works better\n  // for this use case or allow the socket option abstractions to work directly against an IO\n  // handle.\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onInjectReadDatagramToFilterChain(ActiveReadFilter* filter,\n                                                                      Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\n  ASSERT(filter != nullptr);\n\n  std::list<ActiveReadFilterPtr>::iterator entry = std::next(filter->entry());\n  for (; entry != read_filters_.end(); entry++) {\n    if (!(*entry)->read_filter_) {\n      continue;\n    }\n\n    auto status = (*entry)->read_filter_->onData(data);\n    if (status == ReadFilterStatus::StopIteration) {\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n\n  writeUpstream(data);\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onInjectWriteDatagramToFilterChain(ActiveWriteFilter* filter,\n                                                                       Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\n  ASSERT(filter != nullptr);\n\n  std::list<ActiveWriteFilterPtr>::iterator entry = std::next(filter->entry());\n  for (; entry != write_filters_.end(); entry++) {\n    if (!(*entry)->write_filter_) {\n      continue;\n    }\n\n    auto status = (*entry)->write_filter_->onWrite(data);\n    if (status == WriteFilterStatus::StopIteration) {\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n\n  writeDownstream(data);\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::processPacket(\n    Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr local_address,\n    Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr peer_address, Buffer::InstancePtr buffer,\n    MonotonicTime receive_time, uint8_t tos) {\n  const uint64_t rx_buffer_length = buffer->length();\n  ENVOY_LOG(trace, \"received {} byte datagram from upstream: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\",\n            rx_buffer_length, addresses_.peer_->asStringView(), addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\n            host_ != nullptr ? host_->address()->asStringView() : \"unknown\");\n\n  cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_rx_datagrams_.inc();\n  cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_rx_bytes_total_.add(rx_buffer_length);\n\n  Network::UdpRecvData recv_data{\n      {std::move(local_address), std::move(peer_address)}, std::move(buffer), receive_time, tos};\n  processUpstreamDatagram(recv_data);\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::resetIdleTimer() {\n  if (idle_timer_ == nullptr) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  idle_timer_->enableTimer(cluster_.filter_.config_->sessionTimeout());\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::processUpstreamDatagram(Network::UdpRecvData& recv_data) {\n  for (auto& active_write_filter : write_filters_) {\n    auto status = active_write_filter->write_filter_->onWrite(recv_data);\n    if (status == WriteFilterStatus::StopIteration) {\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n\n  writeDownstream(recv_data);\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::writeDownstream(Network::UdpRecvData& recv_data) {\n  const uint64_t tx_buffer_length = recv_data.buffer_->length();\n  ENVOY_LOG(trace, \"writing {} byte datagram downstream: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\",\n            tx_buffer_length, addresses_.peer_->asStringView(), addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\n            host_ != nullptr ? host_->address()->asStringView() : \"unknown\");\n\n  Network::UdpSendData data{addresses_.local_->ip(), *addresses_.peer_, *recv_data.buffer_};\n  const Api::IoCallUint64Result rc = cluster_.filter_.read_callbacks_->udpListener().send(data);\n  if (!rc.ok()) {\n    cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_errors_.inc();\n    ++session_stats_.downstream_sess_tx_errors_;\n  } else {\n    cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_bytes_.add(tx_buffer_length);\n    session_stats_.downstream_sess_tx_bytes_ += tx_buffer_length;\n    cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_datagrams_.inc();\n    ++session_stats_.downstream_sess_tx_datagrams_;\n  }\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onAccessLogFlushInterval() {\n  fillSessionStreamInfo();\n  const Formatter::HttpFormatterContext log_context{\n      nullptr, nullptr, nullptr, {}, AccessLog::AccessLogType::UdpPeriodic};\n  for (const auto& access_log : cluster_.filter_.config_->sessionAccessLogs()) {\n    access_log->log(log_context, udp_session_info_);\n  }\n\n  rearmAccessLogFlushTimer();\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::rearmAccessLogFlushTimer() {\n  if (access_log_flush_timer_ != nullptr) {\n    ASSERT(cluster_.filter_.config_->accessLogFlushInterval().has_value());\n    access_log_flush_timer_->enableTimer(\n        cluster_.filter_.config_->accessLogFlushInterval().value());\n  }\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::disableAccessLogFlushTimer() {\n  if (access_log_flush_timer_ != nullptr) {\n    access_log_flush_timer_->disableTimer();\n    access_log_flush_timer_.reset();\n  }\n}\n\nvoid HttpUpstreamImpl::encodeData(Buffer::Instance& data) {\n  if (!request_encoder_) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  request_encoder_->encodeData(data, false);\n}\n\nvoid HttpUpstreamImpl::setRequestEncoder(Http::RequestEncoder& request_encoder, bool is_ssl) {\n  request_encoder_ = &request_encoder;\n  request_encoder_->getStream().addCallbacks(*this);\n\n  const std::string& scheme =\n      is_ssl ? Http::Headers::get().SchemeValues.Https : Http::Headers::get().SchemeValues.Http;\n\n  std::string host = tunnel_config_.proxyHost(downstream_info_);\n  const auto* dynamic_port =\n      downstream_info_.filterState()->getDataReadOnly<StreamInfo::UInt32Accessor>(\n          \"udp.connect.proxy_port\");\n  if (dynamic_port != nullptr && dynamic_port->value() > 0 && dynamic_port->value() <= 65535) {\n    absl::StrAppend(&host, \":\", std::to_string(dynamic_port->value()));\n  } else if (tunnel_config_.proxyPort().has_value()) {\n    absl::StrAppend(&host, \":\", std::to_string(tunnel_config_.proxyPort().value()));\n  }\n\n  auto headers = Http::RequestHeaderMapImpl::create();\n  headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Scheme, scheme);\n  headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Host, host);\n\n  if (tunnel_config_.usePost()) {\n    headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Method, \"POST\");\n    headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Path, tunnel_config_.postPath());\n  } else {\n    // The Envoy HTTP/2 and HTTP/3 clients expect the request header map to be in the form of HTTP/1\n    // upgrade to issue an extended CONNECT request.\n    headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Method, \"GET\");\n    headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Connection, \"Upgrade\");\n    headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Upgrade, \"connect-udp\");\n    headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().CapsuleProtocol, \"?1\");\n    const std::string target_tunnel_path = resolveTargetTunnelPath();\n    headers->addReferenceKey(Http::Headers::get().Path, target_tunnel_path);\n  }\n\n  tunnel_config_.headerEvaluator().evaluateHeaders(*headers, {downstream_info_.getRequestHeaders()},\n                                                   downstream_info_);\n\n  const auto status = request_encoder_->encodeHeaders(*headers, false);\n  // Encoding can only fail on missing required request headers.\n  ASSERT(status.ok());\n}\n\nconst std::string HttpUpstreamImpl::resolveTargetTunnelPath() {\n  std::string target_host = tunnel_config_.targetHost(downstream_info_);\n  target_host = Http::Utility::PercentEncoding::encode(target_host, \":\");\n\n  const auto* dynamic_port =\n      downstream_info_.filterState()->getDataReadOnly<StreamInfo::UInt32Accessor>(\n          \"udp.connect.target_port\");\n\n  std::string target_port;\n  if (dynamic_port != nullptr && dynamic_port->value() > 0 && dynamic_port->value() <= 65535) {\n    target_port = std::to_string(dynamic_port->value());\n  } else {\n    target_port = std::to_string(tunnel_config_.defaultTargetPort());\n  }\n\n  // TODO(ohadvano): support configurable URI template.\n  return absl::StrCat(\"/.well-known/masque/udp/\", target_host, \"/\", target_port, \"/\");\n}\n\nHttpUpstreamImpl::~HttpUpstreamImpl() { resetEncoder(Network::ConnectionEvent::LocalClose); }\n\nvoid HttpUpstreamImpl::resetEncoder(Network::ConnectionEvent event, bool by_downstream) {\n  if (!request_encoder_) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  request_encoder_->getStream().removeCallbacks(*this);\n  if (by_downstream) {\n    request_encoder_->getStream().resetStream(Http::StreamResetReason::LocalReset);\n  }\n\n  request_encoder_ = nullptr;\n\n  // If we did not receive a valid CONNECT response yet we treat this as a pool\n  // failure, otherwise we forward the event downstream.\n  if (tunnel_creation_callbacks_.has_value()) {\n    tunnel_creation_callbacks_.value().get().onStreamFailure();\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (!by_downstream) {\n    upstream_callbacks_.onUpstreamEvent(event);\n  }\n}\n\nTunnelingConnectionPoolImpl::TunnelingConnectionPoolImpl(\n    Upstream::ThreadLocalCluster& thread_local_cluster, Upstream::LoadBalancerContext* context,\n    const UdpTunnelingConfig& tunnel_config, UpstreamTunnelCallbacks& upstream_callbacks,\n    StreamInfo::StreamInfo& downstream_info, bool flush_access_log_on_tunnel_connected,\n    const std::vector<AccessLog::InstanceSharedPtr>& session_access_logs)\n    : upstream_callbacks_(upstream_callbacks), tunnel_config_(tunnel_config),\n      downstream_info_(downstream_info),\n      flush_access_log_on_tunnel_connected_(flush_access_log_on_tunnel_connected),\n      session_access_logs_(session_access_logs) {\n  // TODO(ohadvano): support upstream HTTP/3.\n  absl::optional<Http::Protocol> protocol = Http::Protocol::Http2;\n  conn_pool_data_ =\n      thread_local_cluster.httpConnPool(Upstream::ResourcePriority::Default, protocol, context);\n}\n\nvoid TunnelingConnectionPoolImpl::newStream(HttpStreamCallbacks& callbacks) {\n  callbacks_ = &callbacks;\n  upstream_ =\n      std::make_unique<HttpUpstreamImpl>(upstream_callbacks_, tunnel_config_, downstream_info_);\n  Tcp::ConnectionPool::Cancellable* handle =\n      conn_pool_data_.value().newStream(upstream_->responseDecoder(), *this,\n                                        {/*can_send_early_data_=*/false,\n                                         /*can_use_http3_=*/false});\n\n  if (handle != nullptr) {\n    upstream_handle_ = handle;\n  }\n}\n\nvoid TunnelingConnectionPoolImpl::onPoolFailure(Http::ConnectionPool::PoolFailureReason reason,\n                                                absl::string_view failure_reason,\n                                                Upstream::HostDescriptionConstSharedPtr host) {\n  upstream_handle_ = nullptr;\n  callbacks_->onStreamFailure(reason, failure_reason, host);\n  downstream_info_.upstreamInfo()->setUpstreamHost(host);\n  downstream_info_.upstreamInfo()->setUpstreamTransportFailureReason(failure_reason);\n}\n\nvoid TunnelingConnectionPoolImpl::onPoolReady(Http::RequestEncoder& request_encoder,\n                                              Upstream::HostDescriptionConstSharedPtr upstream_host,\n                                              StreamInfo::StreamInfo& upstream_info,\n                                              absl::optional<Http::Protocol>) {\n  ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"Upstream connection [C{}] ready, creating tunnel stream\",\n            upstream_info.downstreamAddressProvider().connectionID().value());\n\n  upstream_handle_ = nullptr;\n  upstream_host_ = upstream_host;\n  upstream_info_ = &upstream_info;\n  ssl_info_ = upstream_info.downstreamAddressProvider().sslConnection();\n\n  bool is_ssl = upstream_host->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport();\n  upstream_->setRequestEncoder(request_encoder, is_ssl);\n  upstream_->setTunnelCreationCallbacks(*this);\n  downstream_info_.upstreamInfo()->setUpstreamHost(upstream_host);\n\n  if (flush_access_log_on_tunnel_connected_) {\n    const Formatter::HttpFormatterContext log_context{\n        nullptr, nullptr, nullptr, {}, AccessLog::AccessLogType::UdpTunnelUpstreamConnected};\n    for (const auto& access_log : session_access_logs_) {\n      access_log->log(log_context, downstream_info_);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nTunnelingConnectionPoolPtr TunnelingConnectionPoolFactory::createConnPool(\n    Upstream::ThreadLocalCluster& thread_local_cluster, Upstream::LoadBalancerContext* context,\n    const UdpTunnelingConfig& tunnel_config, UpstreamTunnelCallbacks& upstream_callbacks,\n    StreamInfo::StreamInfo& downstream_info, bool flush_access_log_on_tunnel_connected,\n    const std::vector<AccessLog::InstanceSharedPtr>& session_access_logs) const {\n  auto pool = std::make_unique<TunnelingConnectionPoolImpl>(\n      thread_local_cluster, context, tunnel_config, upstream_callbacks, downstream_info,\n      flush_access_log_on_tunnel_connected, session_access_logs);\n  return (pool->valid() ? std::move(pool) : nullptr);\n}\n\nUdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::TunnelingActiveSession(\n    ClusterInfo& cluster, Network::UdpRecvData::LocalPeerAddresses&& addresses)\n    : ActiveSession(cluster, std::move(addresses), nullptr) {}\n\nbool UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::createUpstream() {\n  if (conn_pool_factory_) {\n    // A session filter may call on continueFilterChain(), after already creating the upstream,\n    // so we first check that the factory was not created already.\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  conn_pool_factory_ = std::make_unique<TunnelingConnectionPoolFactory>();\n  load_balancer_context_ = std::make_unique<UdpLoadBalancerContext>(\n      cluster_.filter_.config_->hashPolicy(), addresses_.peer_, &udp_session_info_);\n\n  return establishUpstreamConnection();\n}\n\nbool UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::establishUpstreamConnection() {\n  if (!createConnectionPool()) {\n    ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"failed to create upstream connection pool\");\n    cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tunnel_failure_.inc();\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  return true;\n}\n\nbool UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::createConnectionPool() {\n  ASSERT(conn_pool_factory_);\n\n  // Check this here because the TCP conn pool will queue our request waiting for a connection that\n  // will never be released.\n  if (!cluster_.cluster_.info()\n           ->resourceManager(Upstream::ResourcePriority::Default)\n           .connections()\n           .canCreate()) {\n    udp_session_info_.setResponseFlag(StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::UpstreamOverflow);\n    cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_overflow_.inc();\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  if (connect_attempts_ >= cluster_.filter_.config_->tunnelingConfig()->maxConnectAttempts()) {\n    udp_session_info_.setResponseFlag(StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::UpstreamRetryLimitExceeded);\n    cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_connect_attempts_exceeded_.inc();\n    return false;\n  } else if (connect_attempts_ >= 1) {\n    cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_rq_retry_.inc();\n  }\n\n  conn_pool_ = conn_pool_factory_->createConnPool(\n      cluster_.cluster_, load_balancer_context_.get(), *cluster_.filter_.config_->tunnelingConfig(),\n      *this, udp_session_info_, cluster_.filter_.config_->flushAccessLogOnTunnelConnected(),\n      cluster_.filter_.config_->sessionAccessLogs());\n\n  if (conn_pool_) {\n    connecting_ = true;\n    connect_attempts_++;\n    udp_session_info_.setAttemptCount(connect_attempts_);\n    conn_pool_->newStream(*this);\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  udp_session_info_.setResponseFlag(StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::NoHealthyUpstream);\n  return false;\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::onStreamFailure(\n    ConnectionPool::PoolFailureReason reason, absl::string_view failure_reason,\n    Upstream::HostDescriptionConstSharedPtr) {\n  ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"Failed to create upstream stream: {}\", failure_reason);\n\n  conn_pool_.reset();\n  upstream_.reset();\n\n  switch (reason) {\n  case ConnectionPool::PoolFailureReason::Overflow:\n  case ConnectionPool::PoolFailureReason::LocalConnectionFailure:\n    onUpstreamEvent(Network::ConnectionEvent::LocalClose);\n    break;\n  case ConnectionPool::PoolFailureReason::Timeout:\n    udp_session_info_.setResponseFlag(StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::UpstreamConnectionFailure);\n    onUpstreamEvent(Network::ConnectionEvent::RemoteClose);\n    break;\n  case ConnectionPool::PoolFailureReason::RemoteConnectionFailure:\n    if (connecting_) {\n      udp_session_info_.setResponseFlag(StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::UpstreamConnectionFailure);\n    }\n    onUpstreamEvent(Network::ConnectionEvent::RemoteClose);\n    break;\n  }\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::onStreamReady(StreamInfo::StreamInfo* upstream_info,\n                                                           std::unique_ptr<HttpUpstream>&& upstream,\n                                                           Upstream::HostDescriptionConstSharedPtr&,\n                                                           const Network::ConnectionInfoProvider&,\n                                                           Ssl::ConnectionInfoConstSharedPtr) {\n  // TODO(ohadvano): save the host description to host_ field. This requires refactoring because\n  // currently host_ is of type HostConstSharedPtr and not HostDescriptionConstSharedPtr.\n  ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"Upstream connection [C{}] attached to session ID [S{}]\",\n            upstream_info->downstreamAddressProvider().connectionID().value(), sessionId());\n\n  upstream_ = std::move(upstream);\n  conn_pool_.reset();\n  connecting_ = false;\n  can_send_upstream_ = true;\n  cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tunnel_success_.inc();\n  flushBuffer();\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::onUpstreamEvent(Network::ConnectionEvent event) {\n  if (event == Network::ConnectionEvent::Connected ||\n      event == Network::ConnectionEvent::ConnectedZeroRtt) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  bool connecting = connecting_;\n  connecting_ = false;\n\n  if (event == Network::ConnectionEvent::RemoteClose ||\n      event == Network::ConnectionEvent::LocalClose) {\n    upstream_.reset();\n\n    if (!connecting || !establishUpstreamConnection()) {\n      cluster_.removeSession(this);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::onAboveWriteBufferHighWatermark() {\n  can_send_upstream_ = false;\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::onBelowWriteBufferLowWatermark() {\n  can_send_upstream_ = true;\n  flushBuffer();\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::flushBuffer() {\n  while (!datagrams_buffer_.empty()) {\n    BufferedDatagramPtr buffered_datagram = std::move(datagrams_buffer_.front());\n    datagrams_buffer_.pop();\n    buffered_bytes_ -= buffered_datagram->buffer_->length();\n    upstream_->encodeData(*buffered_datagram->buffer_);\n  }\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::maybeBufferDatagram(Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\n  if (!cluster_.filter_.config_->tunnelingConfig()->bufferEnabled()) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (datagrams_buffer_.size() ==\n          cluster_.filter_.config_->tunnelingConfig()->maxBufferedDatagrams() ||\n      buffered_bytes_ + data.buffer_->length() >\n          cluster_.filter_.config_->tunnelingConfig()->maxBufferedBytes()) {\n    cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tunnel_buffer_overflow_.inc();\n    return;\n  }\n\n  auto buffered_datagram = std::make_unique<Network::UdpRecvData>();\n  buffered_datagram->addresses_ = {std::move(data.addresses_.local_),\n                                   std::move(data.addresses_.peer_)};\n  buffered_datagram->buffer_ = std::move(data.buffer_);\n  buffered_datagram->receive_time_ = data.receive_time_;\n  buffered_bytes_ += buffered_datagram->buffer_->length();\n  datagrams_buffer_.push(std::move(buffered_datagram));\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::writeUpstream(Network::UdpRecvData& data) {\n  if (!upstream_ || !can_send_upstream_) {\n    maybeBufferDatagram(data);\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (upstream_) {\n    upstream_->encodeData(*data.buffer_);\n  }\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::onUpstreamData(Buffer::Instance& data, bool) {\n  const uint64_t rx_buffer_length = data.length();\n  ENVOY_LOG(trace, \"received {} byte datagram from upstream: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\",\n            rx_buffer_length, addresses_.peer_->asStringView(), addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\n            host_ != nullptr ? host_->address()->asStringView() : \"unknown\");\n\n  cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_rx_datagrams_.inc();\n  cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_rx_bytes_total_.add(rx_buffer_length);\n  resetIdleTimer();\n\n  Network::UdpRecvData recv_data{{addresses_.local_, addresses_.peer_},\n                                 std::make_unique<Buffer::OwnedImpl>(data),\n                                 cluster_.filter_.config_->timeSource().monotonicTime()};\n  processUpstreamDatagram(recv_data);\n}\n\nvoid UdpProxyFilter::TunnelingActiveSession::onIdleTimer() {\n  ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"session idle timeout: downstream={} local={}\", addresses_.peer_->asStringView(),\n            addresses_.local_->asStringView());\n  udp_session_info_.setResponseFlag(StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::StreamIdleTimeout);\n  cluster_.filter_.config_->stats().idle_timeout_.inc();\n  upstream_->onDownstreamEvent(Network::ConnectionEvent::LocalClose);\n  cluster_.removeSession(this);\n}\n\n} // namespace UdpProxy\n} // namespace UdpFilters\n} // namespace Extensions\n} // namespace Envoy\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/source/extensions/filters/udp/udp_proxy/udp_proxy_filter.cc",
  "originalFile": null,
  "structuredPatch": [],
  "type": "create"
}
35. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "date: Pending\n\nbehavior_changes:\n# *Changes that are expected to cause an incompatibility if applicable; deployment changes are likely required*\n- area: thread_local\n  change: |\n    Changes the behavior of the ``SlotImpl`` class destructor. With this change the destructor can be called on any thread.\n    This behavior can be reverted by setting the runtime flag ``envoy.reloadable_features.allow_slot_destroy_on_worker_threads``\n    to false.\n\nminor_behavior_changes:\n# *Changes that may cause incompatibilities for some users, but should not for most*\n- area: tracers\n  change: |\n    Set status code for OpenTelemetry tracers (previously unset).\n- area: xds\n  change: |\n    Updated xDS-TP path naming to better comply with RFC-3986. Encoded resource paths can now include an a colon ``:``,\n    instead of ``%3A``. This behavior can be reverted by setting the runtime flag\n    ``envoy.reloadable_features.xdstp_path_avoid_colon_encoding`` to ``false``.\n- area: udp\n  change: |\n    Change GRO read buffer to 64kB to avoid MSG_TRUNC. And change the way to limit the number of packets processed per event\n    loop to work with GRO. This behavior can be reverted by setting runtime guard\n    ``envoy.reloadable_features.udp_socket_apply_aggregated_read_limit`` to false.\n- area: statistics\n  change: |\n    Hot restart statistics like hot_restart_epoch are only set when hot restart is enabled.\n\nbug_fixes:\n# *Changes expected to improve the state of the world and are unlikely to have negative effects*\n- area: udp\n  change: |\n    Fixed UDP proxy crash on dynamic cluster updates (CDS). The UDP proxy filter was using ``unordered_map::emplace()``\n    which silently fails when a key already exists, leaving stale cluster info and causing crashes on cluster updates.\n    Fixed by using ``insert_or_assign()`` instead to properly update cluster info on dynamic cluster changes.\n- area: outlier detection\n  change: |\n    Fixed :ref:`successful_active_health_check_uneject_host\n    <envoy_v3_api_field_config.cluster.v3.OutlierDetection.successful_active_health_check_uneject_host>`.\n    Before, a failed health check could uneject the host if the ``FAILED_ACTIVE_HC`` health flag had not been set.\n- area: tls\n  change: |\n    Fix a RELEASE_ASSERT when using :ref:`auto_sni <envoy_v3_api_field_config.core.v3.UpstreamHttpProtocolOptions.auto_sni>`\n    if the downstream request ``:authority`` was longer than 255 characters.\n- area: http\n  change: |\n    Fix a crash when reloading the HTTP Connection Manager via ECDS.\n- area: cares\n  change: |\n    Upgraded c-ares library to 1.20.1 and added fix to c-ares DNS implementation to additionally check for ``ARES_EREFUSED``,\n    ``ARES_ESERVFAIL``and ``ARES_ENOTIMP`` status. Without this fix, ``DestroyChannelOnRefused`` and\n    ``CustomResolverValidAfterChannelDestruction`` unit test will break.\n- area: ext_authz\n  change: |\n    Handle ``append_action`` from :ref:`external authorization service <envoy_v3_api_msg_service.auth.v3.CheckResponse>`\n    that was ignored.\n\nremoved_config_or_runtime:\n# *Normally occurs at the end of the* :ref:`deprecation period <deprecated>`\n- area: http\n  change: |\n    Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.use_cluster_cache_for_alt_protocols_filter`` runtime flag and lagacy code paths.\n- area: http\n  change: |\n    Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.proxy_status_upstream_request_timeout`` runtime flag and lagacy code paths.\n- area: http\n  change: |\n    Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.handle_uppercase_scheme`` runtime flag and legacy code paths.\n- area: tcp\n  change: |\n    Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.detect_and_raise_rst_tcp_connection`` runtime flag and legacy code paths.\n- area: http\n  change: |\n    Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.lowercase_scheme`` runtime flag and lagacy code paths.\n- area: upstream\n  change: |\n    Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.convert_legacy_lb_config`` runtime flag and lagacy code paths.\n- area: router\n  change: |\n    Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.copy_response_code_to_downstream_stream_info`` runtime flag and legacy code paths.\n\nnew_features:\n- area: matching\n  change: |\n    Added :ref:`Filter State Input <envoy_v3_api_msg_extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.FilterStateInput>`\n    for matching http input based on filter state objects.\n- area: cares\n  change: |\n    Added :ref:`udp_max_queries<envoy_v3_api_field_extensions.network.dns_resolver.cares.v3.CaresDnsResolverConfig.udp_max_queries>`\n    option to limit the number of UDP queries.\n- area: http\n  change: |\n    Added :ref:`disable_shadow_host_suffix_append\n    <envoy_v3_api_field_config.route.v3.RouteAction.RequestMirrorPolicy.disable_shadow_host_suffix_append>`\n    in :ref:`request_mirror_policies <envoy_v3_api_field_config.route.v3.RouteAction.request_mirror_policies>`\n    for disabling appending of the ``-shadow`` suffix to the shadowed host/authority header.\n\ndeprecated:\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/changelogs/current.yaml"
}
Output
{
  "content": "date: Pending\n\nbehavior_changes:\n# *Changes that are expected to cause an incompatibility if applicable; deployment changes are likely required*\n- area: thread_local\n  change: |\n    Changes the behavior of the ``SlotImpl`` class destructor. With this change the destructor can be called on any thread.\n    This behavior can be reverted by setting the runtime flag ``envoy.reloadable_features.allow_slot_destroy_on_worker_threads``\n    to false.\n\nminor_behavior_changes:\n# *Changes that may cause incompatibilities for some users, but should not for most*\n- area: tracers\n  change: |\n    Set status code for OpenTelemetry tracers (previously unset).\n- area: xds\n  change: |\n    Updated xDS-TP path naming to better comply with RFC-3986. Encoded resource paths can now include an a colon ``:``,\n    instead of ``%3A``. This behavior can be reverted by setting the runtime flag\n    ``envoy.reloadable_features.xdstp_path_avoid_colon_encoding`` to ``false``.\n- area: udp\n  change: |\n    Change GRO read buffer to 64kB to avoid MSG_TRUNC. And change the way to limit the number of packets processed per event\n    loop to work with GRO. This behavior can be reverted by setting runtime guard\n    ``envoy.reloadable_features.udp_socket_apply_aggregated_read_limit`` to false.\n- area: statistics\n  change: |\n    Hot restart statistics like hot_restart_epoch are only set when hot restart is enabled.\n\nbug_fixes:\n# *Changes expected to improve the state of the world and are unlikely to have negative effects*\n- area: udp\n  change: |\n    Fixed UDP proxy crash on dynamic cluster updates (CDS). The UDP proxy filter was using ``unordered_map::emplace()``\n    which silently fails when a key already exists, leaving stale cluster info and causing crashes on cluster updates.\n    Fixed by using ``insert_or_assign()`` instead to properly update cluster info on dynamic cluster changes.\n- area: outlier detection\n  change: |\n    Fixed :ref:`successful_active_health_check_uneject_host\n    <envoy_v3_api_field_config.cluster.v3.OutlierDetection.successful_active_health_check_uneject_host>`.\n    Before, a failed health check could uneject the host if the ``FAILED_ACTIVE_HC`` health flag had not been set.\n- area: tls\n  change: |\n    Fix a RELEASE_ASSERT when using :ref:`auto_sni <envoy_v3_api_field_config.core.v3.UpstreamHttpProtocolOptions.auto_sni>`\n    if the downstream request ``:authority`` was longer than 255 characters.\n- area: http\n  change: |\n    Fix a crash when reloading the HTTP Connection Manager via ECDS.\n- area: cares\n  change: |\n    Upgraded c-ares library to 1.20.1 and added fix to c-ares DNS implementation to additionally check for ``ARES_EREFUSED``,\n    ``ARES_ESERVFAIL``and ``ARES_ENOTIMP`` status. Without this fix, ``DestroyChannelOnRefused`` and\n    ``CustomResolverValidAfterChannelDestruction`` unit test will break.\n- area: ext_authz\n  change: |\n    Handle ``append_action`` from :ref:`external authorization service <envoy_v3_api_msg_service.auth.v3.CheckResponse>`\n    that was ignored.\n\nremoved_config_or_runtime:\n# *Normally occurs at the end of the* :ref:`deprecation period <deprecated>`\n- area: http\n  change: |\n    Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.use_cluster_cache_for_alt_protocols_filter`` runtime flag and lagacy code paths.\n- area: http\n  change: |\n    Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.proxy_status_upstream_request_timeout`` runtime flag and lagacy code paths.\n- area: http\n  change: |\n    Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.handle_uppercase_scheme`` runtime flag and legacy code paths.\n- area: tcp\n  change: |\n    Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.detect_and_raise_rst_tcp_connection`` runtime flag and legacy code paths.\n- area: http\n  change: |\n    Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.lowercase_scheme`` runtime flag and lagacy code paths.\n- area: upstream\n  change: |\n    Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.convert_legacy_lb_config`` runtime flag and lagacy code paths.\n- area: router\n  change: |\n    Removed ``envoy.reloadable_features.copy_response_code_to_downstream_stream_info`` runtime flag and legacy code paths.\n\nnew_features:\n- area: matching\n  change: |\n    Added :ref:`Filter State Input <envoy_v3_api_msg_extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.FilterStateInput>`\n    for matching http input based on filter state objects.\n- area: cares\n  change: |\n    Added :ref:`udp_max_queries<envoy_v3_api_field_extensions.network.dns_resolver.cares.v3.CaresDnsResolverConfig.udp_max_queries>`\n    option to limit the number of UDP queries.\n- area: http\n  change: |\n    Added :ref:`disable_shadow_host_suffix_append\n    <envoy_v3_api_field_config.route.v3.RouteAction.RequestMirrorPolicy.disable_shadow_host_suffix_append>`\n    in :ref:`request_mirror_policies <envoy_v3_api_field_config.route.v3.RouteAction.request_mirror_policies>`\n    for disabling appending of the ``-shadow`` suffix to the shadowed host/authority header.\n\ndeprecated:\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/changelogs/current.yaml",
  "originalFile": null,
  "structuredPatch": [],
  "type": "create"
}

    data.addresses_.peer_ = Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(peer_address);\\n246:     data.addresses_.local_ = Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(local_address);\\n247:     data.buffer_ = std::make_unique<Buffer::OwnedImpl>(buffer);\\n248:     data.receive_time_ = MonotonicTime(std::chrono::seconds(0));\\n249:     filter_->onData(data);\\n250:   }\\n251: \\n252:   void expectSessionCreate(const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& address) {\\n253:     test_sessions_.emplace_back(*this, address);\\n254:     TestSession& new_session = test_sessions_.back();\\n255:     new_session.idle_timer_ = new Event::MockTimer(&callbacks_.udp_listener_.dispatcher_);\\n256:     EXPECT_CALL(*filter_, createUdpSocket(_))\\n257:         .WillOnce(Return(ByMove(Network::SocketPtr{test_sessions_.back().socket_})));\\n258:     EXPECT_CALL(\\n259:         *new_session.socket_->io_handle_,\\n260:         createFileEvent_(_, _, coarseHealth()).WillByDefault(Return(Upstream::Host::Health::Healthy));\\n273:     return host;\\n274:   }\\n275: \\n276:   void checkTransferStats(uint64_t rx_bytes, uint64_t rx_datagrams, uint64_t tx_bytes,\\n277:                           uint64_t tx_datagrams) {\\n278:     EXPECT_EQ(rx_bytes, config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_bytes_.value());\\n279:     EXPECT_EQ(rx_datagrams,          int ipv4_expect, const Network::SocketOptionName& ipv6_option,\\n286:                           int ipv6_expect) {\\n287:     EXPECT_EQ(ipv4_expect, session.sock_opts_[ipv4_option.level()][ipv4_option.option()]);\\n288:     EXPECT_EQ(ipv6_expect, session.sock_opts_[ipv6_option.level()][ipv6_option.option()]);\\n289:   }\\n290: \\n291:   void\\n292:   ensureIpTransparentSocketOptions(const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& upstream_address,\\n293:                                    const std::string& local_address, int ipv4_expect,\\n294:                                    int ipv6_expect) {\\n295:     setup(readConfig(R\\\"EOF(\\n296: stat_prefix: foo\\n297: matcher:\\n298:   on_no_match:\\n299:     action:\\n300:       name: route\\n301:       typed_config:\\n302:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\\n303:         cluster: fake_cluster\\n304: use_original_src_ip: true\\n305:     )EOF\\\"));\\n306: \\n307:     expectSessionCreate(upstream_address);\\n308:     test_sessions_[0].expectSetIpTransparentSocketOption();\\n309:     test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\\\"hello\\\", 0, peer_address_->ip());\\n310:     recvDataFromDownstream(peer_address_->asString(), local_address, \\\"hello\\\");\\n311: \\n312:     checkSocketOptions(test_sessions_[0], ENVOY_SOCKET_IP_TRANSPARENT, ipv4_expect,\\n313:                        ENVOY_SOCKET_IPV6_TRANSPARENT, ipv6_expect);\\n314:     EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\\n315:     EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\\n316:     checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n317: \\n318:     test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\\\"world\\\");\\n319:     checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n320:   }\\n321: \\n322:   // Return the config from yaml, plus one file access log with the specified format\\n323:   envoy::extensions::filters::udp::udp_proxy::v3::UdpProxyConfig\\n324:   accessLogConfig(const std::string& yaml, const std::string& session_access_log_format,\\n325:                   const std::string& proxy_access_log_format) {\\n326:     auto config = readConfig(yaml);\\n327: \\n328:     if (!session_access_log_format.empty()) {\\n329:       envoy::config::accesslog::v3::AccessLog* session_access_log =\\n330:           config.mutable_access_log()->Add();\\n331:       session_access_log->set_name(\\\"envoy.access_loggers.file\\\");\\n332:       envoy::extensions::access_loggers::file::v3::FileAccessLog session_file_access_log;\\n333:       session_file_access_log.set_path(\\\"unused\\\");\\n334:       session_file_access_log.mutable_log_format()->mutable_text_format_source()->set_inline_string(\\n335:           session_access_log_format);\\n336:       session_access_log->mutable_typed_config()->PackFrom(session_file_access_log);\\n337:     }\\n338: \\n339:     if (!proxy_access_log_format.empty()) {\\n340:       envoy::config::accesslog::v3::AccessLog* proxy_access_log =\\n341:           config.mutable_proxy_access_log()->Add();\\n342:       proxy_access_log->set_name(\\\"envoy.access_loggers.file\\\");\\n343:       envoy::extensions::access_loggers::file::v3::FileAccessLog proxy_file_access_log;\\n344:       proxy_file_access_log.set_path(\\\"unused\\\");\\n345:       proxy_file_access_log.mutable_log_format()->mutable_text_format_source()->set_inline_string(\\n346:           proxy_access_log_format);\\n347:       proxy_access_log->mutable_typed_config()->PackFrom(proxy_file_access_log);\\n348:     }\\n349:     return config;\\n350:   }\\n351: \\n352:   envoy::extensions::filters::udp::udp_proxy::v3::UdpProxyConfig\\n353:   readConfig(const std::string& yaml) {\\n354:     envoy::extensions::filters::udp::udp_proxy::v3::UdpProxyConfig config;\\n355:     TestUtility::loadFromYamlAndValidate(yaml, config);\\n356:     return config;\\n357:   }\\n358: \\n359:   bool isTransparentSocketOptionsSupported() {\\n360:     for (const auto& option_name : transparent_options_) {\\n361:       if (!option_name.hasValue()) {\\n362:         return false;\\n363:       }\\n364:     }\\n365: \\n366:     return true;\\n367:   }\\n368: \\n369:   TestThreadsafeSingletonInjector<Api::OsSysCallsImpl> os_calls_;\\n370:   NiceMock<Server::Configuration::MockListenerFactoryContext> factory_context_;\\n371:   UdpProxyFilterConfigSharedPtr config_;\\n372:   Network::MockUdpReadFilterCallbacks callbacks_;\\n373:   Upstream::ClusterUpdateCallbacks* cluster_update_callbacks_{};\\n374:   std::unique_ptr<TestUdpProxyFilter> filter_;\\n375:   std::vector<TestSession> test_sessions_;\\n376:   StringViewSaver access_log_data_;\\n377:   std::vector<std::string> output_;\\n378:   bool expect_gro_{};\\n379:   const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr upstream_address_;\\n380:   const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr peer_address_;\\n381:   const std::vector<Network::SocketOptionName> transparent_options_{ENVOY_SOCKET_IP_TRANSPARENT,\\n382:                                                                     ENVOY_SOCKET_IPV6_TRANSPARENT};\\n383:   inline static const std::string upstream_ip_address_ = \\\"20.0.0.1:443\\\";\\n384:   inline static const std::string peer_ip_address_ = \\\"10.0.0.1:1000\\\";\\n385: };\\n386: \\n387: class UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test : public UdpProxyFilterTest {\\n388: public:\\n389:   UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test()\\n390:       : UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test(\\n391:             Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(upstream_ipv6_address_)) {}\\n392: \\n393:   explicit UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test(Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr&& upstream_address_v6)\\n394:       : UdpProxyFilterTest(Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(peer_ipv6_address_)),\\n395:         upstream_address_v6_(std::move(upstream_address_v6)) {\\n396:     EXPECT_CALL(\\n397:         *factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_.host_,\\n398:         address())\\n399:         .WillRepeatedly(Return(upstream_address_v6_));\\n400:   }\\n401: \\n402:   const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr upstream_address_v6_;\\n403:   inline static const std::string upstream_ipv6_address_ = \\\"[2001:db8:85a3::8a2e:370:7334]:443\\\";\\n404:   inline static const std::string peer_ipv6_address_ = \\\"[2001:db8:85a3::9a2e:370:7334]:1000\\\";\\n405: };\\n406: \\n407: class UdpProxyFilterIpv4Ipv6Test : public UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test {\\n408: public:\\n409:   UdpProxyFilterIpv4Ipv6Test()\\n410:       : UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test(Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(\\n411:             UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test::upstream_ipv6_address_, false)) {}\\n412: \\n413:   void ensureNoIpTransparentSocketOptions() {\\n414:     expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_v6_);\\n415:     test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\\\"hello\\\", 0, nullptr, true);\\n416:     recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"[2001:db8:85a3::9a2e:370:7334]:1000\\\",\\n417:                            \\\"[2001:db8:85a3::9a2e:370:7335]:80\\\", \\\"hello\\\");\\n418: \\n419:     checkSocketOptions(test_sessions_[0], ENVOY_SOCKET_IP_TRANSPARENT, 0,\\n420:                        ENVOY_SOCKET_IPV6_TRANSPARENT, 0);\\n421:     EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\\n422:     EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\\n423:     checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n424: \\n425:     test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\\\"world\\\");\\n426:     checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n427:   }\\n428: };\\n429: \\n430: // Basic UDP proxy flow with two sessions. Also test disabling GRO.\\n431: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, BasicFlow) {\\n432:   InSequence s;\\n433: \\n434:   const std::string session_access_log_format =\\n435:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:bytes_received)% \\\"\\n436:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:datagrams_received)% \\\"\\n437:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:bytes_sent)% \\\"\\n438:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:datagrams_sent)% \\\"\\n439:       \\\"%CONNECTION_ID% \\\"\\n440:       \\\"%DOWNSTREAM_REMOTE_ADDRESS% \\\"\\n441:       \\\"%DOWNSTREAM_LOCAL_ADDRESS% \\\"\\n442:       \\\"%UPSTREAM_HOST% \\\"\\n443:       \\\"%STREAM_ID% \\\"\\n444:       \\\"%ACCESS_LOG_TYPE%\\\";\\n445: \\n446:   const std::string proxy_access_log_format =\\n447:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:bytes_received)% \\\"\\n448:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:datagrams_received)% \\\"\\n449:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:bytes_sent)% \\\"\\n450:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:datagrams_sent)% \\\"\\n451:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:no_route)% \\\"\\n452:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:session_total)% \\\"\\n453:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:idle_timeout)%\\\";\\n454: \\n455:   setup(accessLogConfig(R\\\"EOF(\\n456: stat_prefix: foo\\n457: matcher:\\n458:   on_no_match:\\n459:     action:\\n460:       name: route\\n461:       typed_config:\\n462:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\\n463:         cluster: fake_cluster\\n464: upstream_socket_config:\\n465:   prefer_gro: false\\n466:   )EOF\\\",\\n467:                         session_access_log_format, proxy_access_log_format),\\n468:         true, false);\\n469: \\n470:   // Allow for two sessions.\\n471:   factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.cluster_.info_\\n472:       ->resetResourceManager(2, 0, 0, 0, 0);\\n473: \\n474:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\\n475:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\\\"hello\\\", 0, nullptr, true);\\n476:   recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"10.0.0.1:1000\\\", \\\"10.0.0.2:80\\\", \\\"hello\\\");\\n477:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\\n478:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\\n479:   checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n480:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\\\"world\\\");\\n481:   checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n482: \\n483:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\\\"hello2\\\");\\n484:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\\\"hello3\\\");\\n485:   recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"10.0.0.1:1000\\\", \\\"10.0.0.2:80\\\", \\\"hello2\\\");\\n486:   checkTransferStats(11 /*rx_bytes*/, 2 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n487:   recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"10.0.0.1:1000\\\", \\\"10.0.0.2:80\\\", \\\"hello3\\\");\\n488:   checkTransferStats(17 /*rx_bytes*/, 3 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n489: \\n490:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\\\"world2\\\");\\n491:   checkTransferStats(17 /*rx_bytes*/, 3 /*rx_datagrams*/, 11 /*tx_bytes*/, 2 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n492:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\\\"world3\\\");\\n493:   checkTransferStats(17 /*rx_bytes*/, 3 /*rx_datagrams*/, 17 /*tx_bytes*/, 3 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n494: \\n495:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\\n496:   test_sessions_[1].expectWriteToUpstream(\\\"hello4\\\", 0, nullptr, true);\\n497:   recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"10.0.0.3:1000\\\", \\\"10.0.0.2:80\\\", \\\"hello4\\\");\\n498:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\\n499:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\\n500:   checkTransferStats(23 /*rx_bytes*/, 4 /*rx_datagrams*/, 17 /*tx_bytes*/, 3 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n501: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/envoy--1ae957c1@a0d69a14ad2283d6c8f001dc8b5cccc8cb09078e/-/blob/test/extensions/filters/udp/udp_proxy/udp_proxy_filter_test.cc%3FL1-500\"}",

    "content": "1: #include \"envoy/config/accesslog/v3/accesslog.pb.h\"\n2: #include \"envoy/extensions/access_loggers/file/v3/file.pb.h\"\n3: #include \"envoy/extensions/filters/udp/udp_proxy/v3/udp_proxy.pb.h\"\n4: #include \"envoy/extensions/filters/udp/udp_proxy/v3/udp_proxy.pb.validate.h\"\n5: \n6: #include \"source/common/network/socket_option_impl.h\"\n10: #include \"source/common/router/string_accessor_impl.h\"\n11: #include \"source/common/stream_info/uint32_accessor_impl.h\"\n12: #include \"source/extensions/filters/udp/udp_proxy/config.h\"\n13: #include \"source/extensions/filters/udp/udp_proxy/udp_proxy_filter.h\"\n14: \n15: #include \"test/extensions/filters/udp/udp_proxy/mocks.h\"\n16: #include \"test/extensions/filters/udp/udp_proxy/session_filters/drainer_filter.h\"\n17: #include \"test/extensions/filters/udp/udp_proxy/session_filters/drainer_filter.pb.h\"\n18: #include \"test/mocks/api/mocks.h\"\n19: #include \"test/mocks/http/stream_encoder.h\"\n20: #include \"test/mocks/network/socket.h\"\n21: #include \"test/mocks/server/factory_context.h\"\n22: #include \"test/mocks/server/listener_factory_context.h\"\n23: #include \"test/mocks/upstream/cluster_manager.h\"\n24: #include \"test/mocks/upstream/cluster_update_callbacks.h\"\n25: #include \"test/mocks/upstream/cluster_update_callbacks_handle.h\"\n26: #include \"test/mocks/upstream/host.h\"\n27: #include \"test/mocks/upstream/load_balancer_context.h\"\n28: #include \"test/mocks/upstream/thread_local_cluster.h\"\n29: #include \"test/test_common/threadsafe_singleton_injector.h\"\n30: \n31: #include \"gmock/gmock.h\"\n32: #include \"gtest/gtest.h\"\n33: \n34: using testing::AtLeast;\n35: using testing::ByMove;\n36: using testing::DoAll;\n37: using testing::DoDefault;\n38: using testing::InSequence;\n39: using testing::InvokeWithoutArgs;\n40: using testing::Return;\n41: using testing::ReturnNew;\n42: using testing::ReturnRef;\n43: using testing::SaveArg;\n44: \n45: namespace Envoy {\n46: namespace Extensions {\n47: namespace UdpFilters {\n48: namespace UdpProxy {\n49: namespace {\n50: \n51: class TestUdpProxyFilter : public UdpProxyFilter {\n52: public:\n53:   using UdpProxyFilter::UdpProxyFilter;\n54: \n55:   MOCK_METHOD(Network::SocketPtr, createUdpSocket, (const Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr& host));\n56: };\n57: \n58: Api::IoCallUint64Result makeNoError(uint64_t rc) {\n59:   auto no_error = Api::ioCallUint64ResultNoError();\n60:   no_error.return_value_ = rc;\n61:   return no_error;\n62: }\n63: \n64: Api::IoCallUint64Result makeError(int sys_errno) {\n65:   return {0, Network::IoSocketError::create(sys_errno)};\n66: }\n67: \n68: class UdpProxyFilterBase : public testing::Test {\n69: public:\n70:   UdpProxyFilterBase() {\n71:     EXPECT_CALL(os_sys_calls_, getaddrinfo(_, _, _, _))\n72:         .WillRepeatedly(Invoke([&](const char* node, const char* service,\n73:                                    const struct addrinfo* hints, struct addrinfo** res) {\n74:           Api::OsSysCallsImpl real;\n75:           return real.getaddrinfo(node, service, hints, res);\n76:         }));\n77:   }\n78: \n79: protected:\n80:   Api::MockOsSysCalls os_sys_calls_;\n81: };\n82: \n83: class UdpProxyFilterTest : public UdpProxyFilterBase {\n84: public:\n85:   struct TestSession {\n86:     TestSession(UdpProxyFilterTest& parent,\n87:                 const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& upstream_address)\n88:         : parent_(parent), upstream_address_(upstream_address),\n89:           socket_(new NiceMock<Network::MockSocket>()) {\n90:       ON_CALL(*socket_, ipVersion()).WillByDefault(Return(upstream_address_->ip()->version()));\n91:     }\n92: \n93:     void expectSetIpTransparentSocketOption() {\n94:       EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, setOption(_, _, _, _))\n95:           .WillRepeatedly(Invoke([this](int level, int optname, const void* optval,\n96:                                         socklen_t) -> Api::SysCallIntResult {\n97:             sock_opts_[level][optname] = *reinterpret_cast<const int*>(optval);\n98:             return Api::SysCallIntResult{0, 0};\n99:           }));\n100:     }\n101: \n102:     void expectWriteToUpstream(const std::string& data, int sys_errno = 0,\n103:                                const Network::Address::Ip* local_ip = nullptr,\n104:                                bool expect_connect = false, int connect_sys_errno = 0) {\n105:       EXPECT_CALL(*idle_timer_, enableTimer(parent_.config_->sessionTimeout(), nullptr));\n106:       if (expect_connect) {\n107:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, connect(_))\n108:             .WillOnce(Invoke([connect_sys_errno]() -> Api::SysCallIntResult {\n109:               if (!connect_sys_errno) {\n110:                 return Api::SysCallIntResult{0, 0};\n111:               } else {\n112:                 return Api::SysCallIntResult{-1, connect_sys_errno};\n113:               }\n114:             }));\n115:       } else {\n116:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, connect(_)).Times(0);\n117:       }\n118:       if (!connect_sys_errno) {\n119:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, sendmsg(_, 1, 0, _, _))\n120:             .WillOnce(Invoke(\n121:                 [this, data, local_ip, sys_errno](\n122:                     const Buffer::RawSlice* slices, uint64_t, int,\n123:                     const Network::Address::Ip* self_ip,\n124:                     const Network::Address::Instance& peer_address) -> Api::IoCallUint64Result {\n125:                   EXPECT_EQ(data, absl::string_view(static_cast<const char*>(slices[0].mem_),\n126:                                                     slices[0].len_));\n127:                   EXPECT_EQ(peer_address, *upstream_address_);\n128:                   if (local_ip == nullptr) {\n129:                     EXPECT_EQ(nullptr, self_ip);\n130:                   } else {\n131:                     EXPECT_EQ(self_ip->addressAsString(), local_ip->addressAsString());\n132:                   }\n133:                   // For suppression of clang-tidy NewDeleteLeaks rule, don't use the ternary\n134:                   // operator.\n135:                   if (sys_errno == 0) {\n136:                     return makeNoError(data.size());\n137:                   } else {\n138:                     return makeError(sys_errno);\n139:                   }\n140:                 }));\n141:       }\n142:     }\n143: \n144:     void recvDataFromUpstream(const std::string& data, int recv_sys_errno = 0,\n145:                               int send_sys_errno = 0) {\n146:       EXPECT_CALL(*idle_timer_, enableTimer(parent_.config_->sessionTimeout(), nullptr));\n147: \n148:       if (parent_.expect_gro_) {\n149:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, supportsUdpGro());\n150:       }\n151:       EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, supportsMmsg()).Times(1u);\n152:       // Return the datagram.\n153:       EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, recvmsg(_, 1, _, _))\n154:           .WillOnce(\n155:               Invoke([this, data, recv_sys_errno](\n156:                          Buffer::RawSlice* slices, const uint64_t, uint32_t,\n157:                          Network::IoHandle::RecvMsgOutput& output) -> Api::IoCallUint64Result {\n158:                 if (recv_sys_errno != 0) {\n159:                   return makeError(recv_sys_errno);\n160:                 } else {\n161:                   ASSERT(data.size() <= slices[0].len_);\n162:                   memcpy(slices[0].mem_, data.data(), data.size());\n163:                   output.msg_[0].peer_address_ = upstream_address_;\n164:                   return makeNoError(data.size());\n165:                 }\n166:               }));\n167:       if (recv_sys_errno == 0) {\n168:         // Send the datagram downstream.\n169:         EXPECT_CALL(parent_.callbacks_.udp_listener_, send(_))\n170:             .WillOnce(Invoke([data, send_sys_errno](\n171:                                  const Network::UdpSendData& send_data) -> Api::IoCallUint64Result {\n172:               // TODO(mattklein123): Verify peer/local address.\n173:               EXPECT_EQ(send_data.buffer_.toString(), data);\n174:               if (send_sys_errno == 0) {\n175:                 send_data.buffer_.drain(send_data.buffer_.length());\n176:                 return makeNoError(data.size());\n177:               } else {\n178:                 return makeError(send_sys_errno);\n179:               }\n180:             }));\n181:         // Return an EAGAIN result.\n182:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, recvmsg(_, 1, _, _))\n183:             .WillOnce(Return(ByMove(\n184:                 Api::IoCallUint64Result(0, Network::IoSocketError::getIoSocketEagainError()))));\n185:       }\n186: \n187:       // Kick off the receive.\n188:       file_event_cb_(Event::FileReadyType::Read);\n189:     }\n190: \n191:     UdpProxyFilterTest& parent_;\n192:     const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr upstream_address_;\n193:     Event::MockTimer* idle_timer_{};\n194:     NiceMock<Network::MockSocket>* socket_;\n195:     std::map<int, std::map<int, int>> sock_opts_;\n196:     Event::FileReadyCb file_event_cb_;\n197:   };\n198: \n199:   UdpProxyFilterTest()\n200:       : UdpProxyFilterTest(Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(peer_ip_address_)) {}\n201: \n202:   explicit UdpProxyFilterTest(Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr&& peer_address)\n203:       : os_calls_(&os_sys_calls_),\n204:         upstream_address_(Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(upstream_ip_address_)),\n205:         peer_address_(std::move(peer_address)) {\n206:     // Disable strict mock warnings.\n207:     ON_CALL(*factory_context_.server_factory_context_.access_log_manager_.file_, write(_))\n208:         .WillByDefault(\n209:             Invoke([&](absl::string_view data) { output_.push_back(std::string(data)); }));\n210:     ON_CALL(os_sys_calls_, supportsIpTransparent(_)).WillByDefault(Return(true));\n211:     EXPECT_CALL(os_sys_calls_, supportsUdpGro()).Times(AtLeast(0)).WillRepeatedly(Return(true));\n212:     EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, udpListener()).Times(AtLeast(0));\n213:     EXPECT_CALL(\n214:         *factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_.host_,\n215:         address())\n216:         .WillRepeatedly(Return(upstream_address_));\n217:     EXPECT_CALL(\n218:         *factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_.host_,\n219:         coarseHealth())\n220:         .WillRepeatedly(Return(Upstream::Host::Health::Healthy));\n221:   }\n222: \n223:   ~UdpProxyFilterTest() override { EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_.udp_listener_, onDestroy()); }\n224: \n225:   void setup(const envoy::extensions::filters::udp::udp_proxy::v3::UdpProxyConfig& config,\n226:              bool has_cluster = true, bool expect_gro = true) {\n227:     config_ = std::make_shared<UdpProxyFilterConfigImpl>(factory_context_, config);\n228:     EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_,\n229:                 addThreadLocalClusterUpdateCallbacks_(_))\n230:         .WillOnce(DoAll(SaveArgAddress(&cluster_update_callbacks_),\n231:                         ReturnNew<Upstream::MockClusterUpdateCallbacksHandle>()));\n232:     if (has_cluster) {\n233:       factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.initializeThreadLocalClusters(\n234:           {\"fake_cluster\"});\n235:     }\n236:     EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_,\n237:                 getThreadLocalCluster(\"fake_cluster\"));\n238:     filter_ = std::make_unique<TestUdpProxyFilter>(callbacks_, config_);\n239:     expect_gro_ = expect_gro;\n240:   }\n241: \n242:   void recvDataFromDownstream(const std::string& peer_address, const std::string& local_address,\n243:                               const std::string& buffer) {\n244:     Network::UdpRecvData data;\n245:     data.addresses_.peer_ = Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(peer_address);\n246:     data.addresses_.local_ = Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(local_address);\n247:     data.buffer_ = std::make_unique<Buffer::OwnedImpl>(buffer);\n248:     data.receive_time_ = MonotonicTime(std::chrono::seconds(0));\n249:     filter_->onData(data);\n250:   }\n251: \n252:   void expectSessionCreate(const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& address) {\n253:     test_sessions_.emplace_back(*this, address);\n254:     TestSession& new_session = test_sessions_.back();\n255: ON_CALL(callbacks_.udp_listener_, flush())\n264:         .WillByDefault(\n265:             InvokeWithoutArgs([]() -> Api::IoCallUint64Result { return makeNoError(0); }));\n266:   }\n267: \n268: coarseHealth()).WillByDefault(Return(Upstream::Host::Health::Healthy));\n273:     return host;\n274:   }\n275: \n276:   void checkTransferStats(uint64_t rx_bytes, uint64_t rx_datagrams, uint64_t tx_bytes,\n277:                           uint64_t tx_datagrams) {\n278:     EXPECT_EQ(rx_bytes, config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_bytes_.value());\n279:     EXPECT_EQ(rx_datagrams, session.sock_opts_[ipv4_option.level()][ipv4_option.option()]);\n288:     EXPECT_EQ(ipv6_expect, session.sock_opts_[ipv6_option.level()][ipv6_option.option()]);\n289:   }\n290: \n291:   void\n292: session_access_log_format,\n325:                   const std::string& proxy_access_log_format) {\n326:     auto config = readConfig(yaml);\n327: \n328:     if (!session_access_log_format.empty()) Also test disabling GRO.\n431: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, BasicFlow) {\n432:   InSequence s;\n433: \n434:   const std::string session_access_log_format =\n435:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:bytes_received)% \"\n436:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:datagrams_received)% \"\n437:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:bytes_sent)% \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:idle_timeout)%\";\n454: \n455:   setup(accessLogConfig(R\"EOF(\n456: stat_prefix: foo\n457: matcher:\n458:   on_no_match:\n459:     action:\n460:       name:
