expectWriteToUpstream(const std::string& data, int sys_errno = 0,\n103:                                const Network::Address::Ip* local_ip = nullptr,\n104:                                bool expect_connect = false, int connect_sys_errno = 0) {\n105:       EXPECT_CALL(*idle_timer_, enableTimer(parent_.config_->sessionTimeout(), nullptr));\n106:       if (expect_connect) {\n107:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, connect(_))\n108:             .WillOnce(Invoke([connect_sys_errno]() -> Api::SysCallIntResult {\n109:               if (!connect_sys_errno) {\n110:                 return Api::SysCallIntResult{0, 0};\n111:               } else {\n112:                 return Api::SysCallIntResult{-1, connect_sys_errno};\n113:               }\n114:             }));\n115:       } else {\n116:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, connect(_)).Times(0);\n117:       }\n118:       if (!connect_sys_errno) {\n119:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, sendmsg(_, 1, 0, _, _))\n120:             .WillOnce(Invoke(\n121:                 [this, data, local_ip, sys_errno](\n122:                     const Buffer::RawSlice* slices, uint64_t, int,\n123:                     const Network::Address::Ip* self_ip,\n124:                     const Network::Address::Instance& peer_address) -> Api::IoCallUint64Result {\n125:                   EXPECT_EQ(data, absl::string_view(static_cast<const char*>(slices[0].mem_),\n126:                                                     slices[0].len_));\n127:                   EXPECT_EQ(peer_address, *upstream_address_);\n128:                   if (local_ip == nullptr) {\n129:                     EXPECT_EQ(nullptr, self_ip);\n130:                   } else {\n131:                     EXPECT_EQ(self_ip->addressAsString(), local_ip->addressAsString());\n132:                   }\n133:                   // For suppression of clang-tidy NewDeleteLeaks rule, don't use the ternary\n134:                   // operator.\n135:                   if (sys_errno == 0) {\n136:                     return makeNoError(data.size());\n137:                   } else {\n138:                     return makeError(sys_errno);\n139:                   }\n140:                 }));\n141:       }\n142:     }\n143: \n144:     void recvDataFromUpstream(const std::string& data, int recv_sys_errno = 0,\n145: {\n149:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, supportsUdpGro());\n150:       }\n151:       EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, supportsMmsg()).Times(1u);\n152:       // Return the datagram.\n153:       EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, recvmsg(_, 1, _, _))\n154:           .WillOnce(\n155:               Invoke([this, data, recv_sys_errno](\n156:                          Buffer::RawSlice* slices, const uint64_t, uint32_t,\n157:                          Network::IoHandle::RecvMsgOutput& output) -> Api::IoCallUint64Result {\n158:                 if (recv_sys_errno != 0) {\n159:                   return makeError(recv_sys_errno);\n160:                 } else {\n161:                   ASSERT(data.size() <= slices[0].len_);\n162:                   memcpy(slices[0].mem_, data.data(), data.size());\n163:                   output.msg_[0].peer_address_ = upstream_address_;\n164:                   return makeNoError(data.size());\n165:                 }\n166:               }));\n167:       if (recv_sys_errno == 0) {\n168:         // Send the datagram downstream.\n169:         EXPECT_CALL(parent_.callbacks_.udp_listener_, send(_))\n170:             .WillOnce(Invoke([data, send_sys_errno](\n171:                                  const Network::UdpSendData& send_data) -> Api::IoCallUint64Result {\n172:               // TODO(mattklein123): Verify peer/local address.\n173:               EXPECT_EQ(send_data.buffer_.toString(), data);\n174:               if (send_sys_errno == 0) {\n175:                 send_data.buffer_.drain(send_data.buffer_.length());\n176:                 return makeNoError(data.size());\n177:               } else {\n178:                 return makeError(send_sys_errno);\n179:               }\n180:             }));\n181:         // Return an EAGAIN result.\n182:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, recvmsg(_, 1, _, _))\n183:             .WillOnce(Return(ByMove(\n184:                 Api::IoCallUint64Result(0, Network::IoSocketError::getIoSocketEagainError()))));\n185:       }\n186: \n187:       // Kick off the receive.\n188:       file_event_cb_(Event::FileReadyType::Read);\n189:     }\n190: \n191:     UdpProxyFilterTest& parent_;\n192:     const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr upstream_address_;\n193:     Event::MockTimer* idle_timer_{};\n194:     NiceMock<Network::MockSocket>* socket_;\n195:     std::map<int, std::map<int, int>> sock_opts_;\n196:     Event::FileReadyCb file_event_cb_;\n197:   };\n198: \n199:   UdpProxyFilterTest()\n200:       : UdpProxyFilterTest(Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(peer_ip_address_)) {}\n201: \n202:   explicit UdpProxyFilterTest(Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr&& peer_address)\n203:       : os_calls_(&os_sys_calls_),\n204:         upstream_address_(Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(upstream_ip_address_)),\n205:         peer_address_(std::move(peer_address)) {\n206:     // Disable strict mock warnings.\n207:     ON_CALL(*factory_context_.server_factory_context_.access_log_manager_.file_, write(_))\n208:         .WillByDefault(\n209:             Invoke([&](absl::string_view data) { output_.push_back(std::string(data)); }));\n210:     ON_CALL(os_sys_calls_, supportsIpTransparent(_)).WillByDefault(Return(true));\n211:     EXPECT_CALL(os_sys_calls_, supportsUdpGro()).Times(AtLeast(0)).WillRepeatedly(Return(true));\n212:     EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, udpListener()).Times(AtLeast(0));\n213:     EXPECT_CALL(\n214:         *factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_.host_,\n215:         address())\n216:         .WillRepeatedly(Return(upstream_address_));\n217:     EXPECT_CALL(\n218:         *factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_.host_,\n219:         coarseHealth())\n220:         .WillRepeatedly(Return(Upstream::Host::Health::Healthy));\n221:   }\n222: \n223:   ~UdpProxyFilterTest() override { EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_.udp_listener_, onDestroy()); }\n224: \n225:   void setup(const envoy::extensions::filters::udp::udp_proxy::v3::UdpProxyConfig& config,\n226:              bool has_cluster = true, bool expect_gro = true) {\n227:     config_ = std::make_shared<UdpProxyFilterConfigImpl>(factory_context_, config);\n228:     EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_,\n229:                 addThreadLocalClusterUpdateCallbacks_(_))\n230:         .WillOnce(DoAll(SaveArgAddress(&cluster_update_callbacks_),\n231:                         ReturnNew<Upstream::MockClusterUpdateCallbacksHandle>()));\n232:     if (has_cluster) {\n233:       factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.initializeThreadLocalClusters(\n234:           {\"fake_cluster\"});\n235:     }\n236:     EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_,\n237:                 getThreadLocalCluster(\"fake_cluster\"));\n238:     filter_ = std::make_unique<TestUdpProxyFilter>(callbacks_, config_);\n239:     expect_gro_ = expect_gro;\n240:   }\n241: \n242:   void recvDataFromDownstream(const std::string& peer_address, const std::string& local_address,\n243:                               const std::string& buffer) {\n244:     Network::UdpRecvData data;\n245:     data.addresses_.peer_ = Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(peer_address);\n246:     data.addresses_.local_ = Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(local_address);\n247:     data.buffer_ = std::make_unique<Buffer::OwnedImpl>(buffer);\n248:     data.receive_time_ = MonotonicTime(std::chrono::seconds(0));\n249:     filter_->onData(data);\n250:   }\n251: \n252:   void expectSessionCreate(const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& address) {\n253:     test_sessions_.emplace_back(*this, address);\n254:     TestSession& new_session = test_sessions_.back();\n255:     new_session.idle_timer_ = new Event::MockTimer(&callbacks_.udp_listener_.dispatcher_);\n256:     EXPECT_CALL(*filter_, createUdpSocket(_))\n257:         .WillOnce(Return(ByMove(Network::SocketPtr{test_sessions_.back().socket_})));\n258:     EXPECT_CALL(\n259:         *new_session.socket_->io_handle_,\n260:         createFileEvent_(_, _, Event::PlatformDefaultTriggerType, Event::FileReadyType::Read))\n261:         .WillOnce(SaveArg<1>(&new_session.file_event_cb_));\n262:     // Internal Buffer is Empty, flush will be a no-op\n263:     ON_CALL(callbacks_.udp_listener_, flush())\n264:         .WillByDefault(\n265:             InvokeWithoutArgs([]() -> Api::IoCallUint64Result { return makeNoError(0); }));\n266:   }\n267: \n268:   std::shared_ptr<NiceMock<Upstream::MockHost>>\n269:   createHost(const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& host_address) {\n270:     auto host = std::make_shared<NiceMock<Upstream::MockHost>>();\n271:     ON_CALL(*host, address()).WillByDefault(Return(host_address));\n272:     ON_CALL(*host, coarseHealth()).WillByDefault(Return(Upstream::Host::Health::Healthy));\n273:     return host;\n274:   }\n275: \n276:   void checkTransferStats(uint64_t rx_bytes, uint64_t rx_datagrams, uint64_t tx_bytes,\n277:                           uint64_t tx_datagrams) {\n278:     EXPECT_EQ(rx_bytes, config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_bytes_.value());\n279:     EXPECT_EQ(rx_datagrams, config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_datagrams_.value());\n280:     EXPECT_EQ(tx_bytes, config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_bytes_.value());\n281:     EXPECT_EQ(tx_datagrams, config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_datagrams_.value());\n282:   }\n283: \n284:   void checkSocketOptions(TestSession& session, const Network::SocketOptionName& ipv4_option,\n285:                           int ipv4_expect, const Network::SocketOptionName& ipv6_option,\n286:                           int ipv6_expect) {\n287:     EXPECT_EQ(ipv4_expect, session.sock_opts_[ipv4_option.level()][ipv4_option.option()]);\n288:     EXPECT_EQ(ipv6_expect, session.sock_opts_[ipv6_option.level()][ipv6_option.option()]);\n289:   }\n290: \n291:   void\n292:   ensureIpTransparentSocketOptions(const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& upstream_address,\n293:                                    const std::string& local_address, int ipv4_expect,\n294:                                    int ipv6_expect) {\n295:     setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n296: stat_prefix: foo\n297: matcher:\n298:   on_no_match:\n299:     action:\n300:       name: route\n301:       typed_config:\n302:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n303:         cluster: fake_cluster\n304: use_original_src_ip: true\n305:     )EOF\"));\n306: \n307:     expectSessionCreate(upstream_address);\n308:     test_sessions_[0].expectSetIpTransparentSocketOption();\n309:     test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, peer_address_->ip());\n310:     recvDataFromDownstream(peer_address_->asString(), local_address, \"hello\");\n311: \n312:     checkSocketOptions(test_sessions_[0], ENVOY_SOCKET_IP_TRANSPARENT, ipv4_expect,\n313:                        ENVOY_SOCKET_IPV6_TRANSPARENT, ipv6_expect);\n314:     EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n315:     EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n316:     checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n317: \n318:     test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world\");\n319:     checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n320:   }\n321: \n322:   // Return the config from yaml, plus one file access log with the specified format\n323:   envoy::extensions::filters::udp::udp_proxy::v3::UdpProxyConfig\n324:   accessLogConfig(const std::string& yaml, const std::string& session_access_log_format,\n325:                   const std::string& proxy_access_log_format) {\n326:     auto config = readConfig(yaml);\n327: \n328:     if (!session_access_log_format.empty()) {\n329:       envoy::config::accesslog::v3::AccessLog* session_access_log =\n330:           config.mutable_access_log()->Add();\n331:       session_access_log->set_name(\"envoy.access_loggers.file\");\n332:       envoy::extensions::access_loggers::file::v3::FileAccessLog session_file_access_log;\n333:       session_file_access_log.set_path(\"unused\");\n334:       session_file_access_log.mutable_log_format()->mutable_text_format_source()->set_inline_string(\n335:           session_access_log_format);\n336:       session_access_log->mutable_typed_config()->PackFrom(session_file_access_log);\n337:     }\n338: \n339:     if (!proxy_access_log_format.empty()) {\n340:       envoy::config::accesslog::v3::AccessLog* proxy_access_log =\n341:           config.mutable_proxy_access_log()->Add();\n342:       proxy_access_log->set_name(\"envoy.access_loggers.file\");\n343:       envoy::extensions::access_loggers::file::v3::FileAccessLog proxy_file_access_log;\n344:       proxy_file_access_log.set_path(\"unused\");\n345:       proxy_file_access_log.mutable_log_format()->mutable_text_format_source()->set_inline_string(\n346:           proxy_access_log_format);\n347:       proxy_access_log->mutable_typed_config()->PackFrom(proxy_file_access_log);\n348:     }\n349:     return config;\n350:   }\n351: \n352:   envoy::extensions::filters::udp::udp_proxy::v3::UdpProxyConfig\n353:   readConfig(const std::string& yaml) {\n354:     envoy::extensions::filters::udp::udp_proxy::v3::UdpProxyConfig config;\n355:     TestUtility::loadFromYamlAndValidate(yaml, config);\n356:     return config;\n357:   }\n358: \n359:   bool isTransparentSocketOptionsSupported() {\n360:     for (const auto& option_name : transparent_options_) {\n361:       if (!option_name.hasValue()) {\n362:         return false;\n363:       }\n364:     }\n365: \n366:     return true;\n367:   }\n368: \n369:   TestThreadsafeSingletonInjector<Api::OsSysCallsImpl> os_calls_;\n370:   NiceMock<Server::Configuration::MockListenerFactoryContext> factory_context_;\n371:   UdpProxyFilterConfigSharedPtr config_;\n372:   Network::MockUdpReadFilterCallbacks callbacks_;\n373:   Upstream::ClusterUpdateCallbacks* cluster_update_callbacks_{};\n374:   std::unique_ptr<TestUdpProxyFilter> filter_;\n375:   std::vector<TestSession> test_sessions_;\n376:   StringViewSaver access_log_data_;\n377:   std::vector<std::string> output_;\n378:   bool expect_gro_{};\n379:   const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr upstream_address_;\n380:   const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr peer_address_;\n381:   const std::vector<Network::SocketOptionName> transparent_options_{ENVOY_SOCKET_IP_TRANSPARENT,\n382:                                                                     ENVOY_SOCKET_IPV6_TRANSPARENT};\n383:   inline static const std::string upstream_ip_address_ = \"20.0.0.1:443\";\n384:   inline static const std::string peer_ip_address_ = \"10.0.0.1:1000\";\n385: };\n386: \n387: class UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test : public UdpProxyFilterTest {\n388: public:\n389:   UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test()\n390:       : UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test(\n391:             Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(upstream_ipv6_address_)) {}\n392: \n393:   explicit UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test(Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr&& upstream_address_v6)\n394:       : UdpProxyFilterTest(Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(peer_ipv6_address_)),\n395:         upstream_address_v6_(std::move(upstream_address_v6)) {\n396:     EXPECT_CALL(\n397:         *factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_.host_,\n398:         address())\n399:         .WillRepeatedly(Return(upstream_address_v6_));\n400:   }\n401: \n402:   const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr upstream_address_v6_;\n403:   inline static const std::string upstream_ipv6_address_ = \"[2001:db8:85a3::8a2e:370:7334]:443\";\n404:   inline static const std::string peer_ipv6_address_ = \"[2001:db8:85a3::9a2e:370:7334]:1000\";\n405: };\n406: \n407: class UdpProxyFilterIpv4Ipv6Test : public UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test {\n408: public:\n409:   UdpProxyFilterIpv4Ipv6Test()\n410:       : UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test(Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(\n411:             UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test::upstream_ipv6_address_, false)) {}\n412: \n413:   void ensureNoIpTransparentSocketOptions() {\n414:     expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_v6_);\n415:     test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n416:     recvDataFromDownstream(\"[2001:db8:85a3::9a2e:370:7334]:1000\",\n417:                            \"[2001:db8:85a3::9a2e:370:7335]:80\", \"hello\");\n418: \n419:     checkSocketOptions(test_sessions_[0], ENVOY_SOCKET_IP_TRANSPARENT, 0,\n420:                        ENVOY_SOCKET_IPV6_TRANSPARENT, 0);\n421:     EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n422:     EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n423:     checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n424: \n425:     test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world\");\n426:     checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n427:   }\n428: };\n429: \n430: // Basic UDP proxy flow with two sessions. Also test disabling GRO.\n431: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, BasicFlow) {\n432:   InSequence s;\n433: \n434:   const std::string session_access_log_format =\n435:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:bytes_received)% \"\n436:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:datagrams_received)% \"\n437:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:bytes_sent)% \"\n438:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:datagrams_sent)% \"\n439:       \"%CONNECTION_ID% \"\n440:       \"%DOWNSTREAM_REMOTE_ADDRESS% \"\n441:       \"%DOWNSTREAM_LOCAL_ADDRESS% \"\n442:       \"%UPSTREAM_HOST% \"\n443:       \"%STREAM_ID% \"\n444:       \"%ACCESS_LOG_TYPE%\";\n445: \n446:   const std::string proxy_access_log_format =\n447:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:bytes_received)% \"\n448:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:datagrams_received)% \"\n449:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:bytes_sent)% \"\n450:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:datagrams_sent)% \"\n451:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:no_route)% \"\n452:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:session_total)% \"\n453:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:idle_timeout)%\";\n454: \n455:   setup(accessLogConfig(R\"EOF(\n456: stat_prefix: foo\n457: matcher:\n458:   on_no_match:\n459:     action:\n460:       name: route\n461:       typed_config:\n462:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n463:         cluster: fake_cluster\n464: upstream_socket_config:\n465:   prefer_gro: false\n466:   )EOF\",\n467:                         session_access_log_format, proxy_access_log_format),\n468:         true, false);\n469: \n470:   // Allow for two sessions.\n471:   factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.cluster_.info_\n472:       ->resetResourceManager(2, 0, 0, 0, 0);\n473: \n474:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n475:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n476:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n477:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n478:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n479:   checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n480:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world\");\n481:   checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n482: \n483:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello2\");\n484:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello3\");\n485:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello2\");\n486:   checkTransferStats(11 /*rx_bytes*/, 2 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n487:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello3\");\n488:   checkTransferStats(17 /*rx_bytes*/, 3 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n489: \n490:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world2\");\n491:   checkTransferStats(17 /*rx_bytes*/, 3 /*rx_datagrams*/, 11 /*tx_bytes*/, 2 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n492:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world3\");\n493:   checkTransferStats(17 /*rx_bytes*/, 3 /*rx_datagrams*/, 17 /*tx_bytes*/, 3 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n494: \n495:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n496:   test_sessions_[1].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello4\", 0, nullptr, true);\n497:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.3:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello4\");\n498:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n499:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n500:   checkTransferStats(23 /*rx_bytes*/, 4 /*rx_datagrams*/, 17 /*tx_bytes*/, 3 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n501:   test_sessions_[1].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world4\");\n502:   checkTransferStats(23 /*rx_bytes*/, 4 /*rx_datagrams*/, 23 /*tx_bytes*/, 4 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n503: \n504:   filter_.reset();\n505:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.size(), 3);\n506:   EXPECT_EQ(output_[0], \"23 4 23 4 0 2 0\");\n507: \n508:   const std::string session_access_log_regex =\n509:       \"(17 3 17 3 0|6 1 6 1 1) 10.0.0.(1|3):1000 10.0.0.2:80 20.0.0.1:443 \"\n510:       \"[0-9a-fA-F]{8}-([0-9a-fA-F]{4}-){3}[0-9a-fA-F]{12} \" +\n511:       AccessLogType_Name(AccessLog::AccessLogType::UdpSessionEnd);\n512: \n513:   EXPECT_TRUE(std::regex_match(output_[1], std::regex(session_access_log_regex)));\n514:   EXPECT_TRUE(std::regex_match(output_[2], std::regex(session_access_log_regex)));\n515: }\n516: \n517: // Route with source IP.\n518: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, Router) {\n519:   InSequence s;\n520: \n521:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n522: stat_prefix: foo\n523: matcher:\n524:   matcher_tree:\n525:     input:\n526:       name: envoy.matching.inputs.source_ip\n527:       typed_config:\n528:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.SourceIPInput\n529:     exact_match_map:\n530:       map:\n531:         \"10.0.0.1\":\n532:           action:\n533:             name: route\n534:             typed_config:\n535:               '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n536:               cluster: fake_cluster\n537:   )EOF\"));\n538: \n539:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n540:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n541:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n542:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n543:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n544: \n545:   test_sessions_[0].idle_timer_->invokeCallback();\n546:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n547:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n548: \n549:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n550:   test_sessions_[1].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n551:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n552:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n553:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n554: \n555:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.3:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n556:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n557:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n558: }\n559: \n560: // Idle timeout flow.\n561: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, IdleTimeout) {\n562:   InSequence s;\n563: \n564:   const std::string session_access_log_format = \"\";\n565: \n566:   const std::string proxy_access_log_format = \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:session_total)% \"\n567:                                               \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:idle_timeout)%\";\n568: \n569:   setup(accessLogConfig(R\"EOF(\n570: stat_prefix: foo\n571: matcher:\n572:   on_no_match:\n573:     action:\n574:       name: route\n575:       typed_config:\n576:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n577:         cluster: fake_cluster\n578:   )EOF\",\n579:                         session_access_log_format, proxy_access_log_format));\n580: \n581:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n582:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n583:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n584:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n585:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n586: \n587:   test_sessions_[0].idle_timer_->invokeCallback();\n588:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n589:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n590: \n591:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n592:   test_sessions_[1].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n593:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n594:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n595:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n596: \n597:   filter_.reset();\n598:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.size(), 1);\n599:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.front(), \"2 1\");\n600: }\n601: \n602: // Verify downstream send and receive error handling.\n603: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, SendReceiveErrorHandling) {\n604:   InSequence s;\n605: \n606:   const std::string session_access_log_format =\n607:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:cluster_name)% \"\n608:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:bytes_sent)% \"\n609:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:bytes_received)% \"\n610:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:errors_sent)% \"\n611:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:datagrams_sent)% \"\n612:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:datagrams_received)%\";\n613: \n614:   const std::string proxy_access_log_format = \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:errors_received)% \"\n615:                                               \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:no_route)% \"\n616:                                               \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:session_total)% \"\n617:                                               \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:idle_timeout)%\";\n618: \n619:   setup(accessLogConfig(R\"EOF(\n620: stat_prefix: foo\n621: matcher:\n622:   on_no_match:\n623:     action:\n624:       name: route\n625:       typed_config:\n626:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n627:         cluster: fake_cluster\n628:   )EOF\",\n629:                         session_access_log_format, proxy_access_log_format));\n630: \n631:   filter_->onReceiveError(Api::IoError::IoErrorCode::UnknownError);\n632:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_errors_.value());\n633: \n634:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n635:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n636:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n637:   checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n638:   EXPECT_EQ(5, factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_\n639:                    .cluster_.info_->traffic_stats_->upstream_cx_tx_bytes_total_.value());\n640: \n641:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world2\", 0, SOCKET_ERROR_MSG_SIZE);\n642:   checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n643:   EXPECT_EQ(6, factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_\n644:                    .cluster_.info_->traffic_stats_->upstream_cx_rx_bytes_total_.value());\n645:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_errors_.value());\n646: \n647:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world2\", SOCKET_ERROR_MSG_SIZE, 0);\n648:   checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n649:   EXPECT_EQ(6, factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_\n650:                    .cluster_.info_->traffic_stats_->upstream_cx_rx_bytes_total_.value());\n651:   EXPECT_EQ(1, TestUtility::findCounter(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_\n652:                                             .thread_local_cluster_.cluster_.info_->stats_store_,\n653:                                         \"udp.sess_rx_errors\")\n654:                    ->value());\n655: \n656:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", SOCKET_ERROR_MSG_SIZE);\n657:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n658:   checkTransferStats(10 /*rx_bytes*/, 2 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n659:   EXPECT_EQ(5, factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_\n660:                    .cluster_.info_->traffic_stats_->upstream_cx_tx_bytes_total_.value());\n661:   EXPECT_EQ(1, TestUtility::findCounter(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_\n662:                                             .thread_local_cluster_.cluster_.info_->stats_store_,\n663:                                         \"udp.sess_tx_errors\")\n664:                    ->value());\n665: \n666:   filter_.reset();\n667:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.size(), 2);\n668:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.front(), \"1 0 1 0\");\n669:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.back(), \"fake_cluster 0 10 1 0 2\");\n670: }\n671: \n672: // Verify upstream connect error handling.\n673: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, ConnectErrorHandling) {\n674:   InSequence s;\n675: \n676:   const std::string session_access_log_format =\n677:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:cluster_name)% \"\n678:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:bytes_sent)% \"\n679:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:bytes_received)% \"\n680:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:errors_sent)% \"\n681:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:datagrams_sent)% \"\n682:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:datagrams_received)%\";\n683: \n684:   const std::string proxy_access_log_format = \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:errors_received)% \"\n685:                                               \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:session_total)%\";\n686: \n687:   setup(accessLogConfig(R\"EOF(\n688: stat_prefix: foo\n689: matcher:\n690:   on_no_match:\n691:     action:\n692:       name: route\n693:       typed_config:\n694:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n695:         cluster: fake_cluster\n696:   )EOF\",\n697:                         session_access_log_format, proxy_access_log_format));\n698: \n699:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n700:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true, 1);\n701:   EXPECT_LOG_CONTAINS(\"debug\", \"cannot connect\",\n702:                       recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\"));\n703:   checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n704:   EXPECT_EQ(1, TestUtility::findCounter(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_\n705:                                             .thread_local_cluster_.cluster_.info_->stats_store_,\n706:                                         \"udp.sess_tx_errors\")\n707:                    ->value());\n708: \n709:   filter_.reset();\n710:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.size(), 2);\n711:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.front(), \"0 1\");\n712:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.back(), \"fake_cluster 0 5 0 0 1\");\n713: }\n714: \n715: // No upstream host handling.\n716: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, NoUpstreamHost) {\n717:   InSequence s;\n718: \n719:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n720: stat_prefix: foo\n721: matcher:\n722:   on_no_match:\n723:     action:\n724:       name: route\n725:       typed_config:\n726:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n727:         cluster: fake_cluster\n728:   )EOF\"));\n729: \n730:   EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_,\n731:               chooseHost(_))\n732:       .WillOnce(Return(nullptr));\n733:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n734:   EXPECT_EQ(1, factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_\n735:                    .cluster_.info_->traffic_stats_->upstream_cx_none_healthy_.value());\n736: }\n737: \n738: // No cluster at filter creation.\n739: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, NoUpstreamClusterAtCreation) {\n740:   InSequence s;\n741: \n742:   const std::string session_access_log_format = \"\";\n743: \n744:   const std::string proxy_access_log_format = \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:no_route)%\";\n745: \n746:   setup(accessLogConfig(R\"EOF(\n747: stat_prefix: foo\n748: matcher:\n749:   on_no_match:\n750:     action:\n751:       name: route\n752:       typed_config:\n753:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n754:         cluster: fake_cluster\n755:   )EOF\",\n756:                         session_access_log_format, proxy_access_log_format),\n757:         false);\n758: \n759:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n760:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_no_route_.value());\n761: \n762:   filter_.reset();\n763:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.size(), 1);\n764:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.front(), \"1\");\n765: }\n766: \n767: // Dynamic cluster addition and removal handling.\n768: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, ClusterDynamicAddAndRemoval) {\n769:   InSequence s;\n770: \n771:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n772: stat_prefix: foo\n773: matcher:\n774:   on_no_match:\n775:     action:\n776:       name: route\n777:       typed_config:\n778:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n779:         cluster: fake_cluster\n780:   )EOF\"),\n781:         false);\n782: \n783:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n784:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_no_route_.value());\n785:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n786:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n787: \n788:   // Add a cluster that we don't care about.\n789:   NiceMock<Upstream::MockThreadLocalCluster> other_thread_local_cluster;\n790:   other_thread_local_cluster.cluster_.info_->name_ = \"other_cluster\";\n791:   {\n792:     Upstream::ThreadLocalClusterCommand command =\n793:         [&other_thread_local_cluster]() -> Upstream::ThreadLocalCluster& {\n794:       return other_thread_local_cluster;\n795:     };\n796:     cluster_update_callbacks_->onClusterAddOrUpdate(other_thread_local_cluster.info()->name(),\n797:                                                     command);\n798:   }\n799:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n800:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_no_route_.value());\n801:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n802:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n803: \n804:   // Now add the cluster we care about.\n805:   {\n806:     Upstream::ThreadLocalClusterCommand command = [this]() -> Upstream::ThreadLocalCluster& {\n807:       return factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_;\n808:     };\n809:     cluster_update_callbacks_->onClusterAddOrUpdate(\n810:         factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.info()\n811:             ->name(),\n812:         command);\n813:   }\n814:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n815:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n816:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n817:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n818:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n819: \n820:   // Remove a cluster we don't care about.\n821:   cluster_update_callbacks_->onClusterRemoval(\"other_cluster\");\n822:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n823: \n824:   // Remove the cluster we do care about. This should purge all sessions.\n825:   cluster_update_callbacks_->onClusterRemoval(\"fake_cluster\");\n826:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n827: }\n828: \n829: // Hitting the maximum per-cluster connection/session circuit breaker.\n830: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, MaxSessionsCircuitBreaker) {\n831:   InSequence s;\n832: \n833:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n834: stat_prefix: foo\n835: matcher:\n836:   on_no_match:\n837:     action:\n838:       name: route\n839:       typed_config:\n840:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n841:         cluster: fake_cluster\n842:   )EOF\"));\n843: \n844:   // Allow only a single session.\n845:   factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.cluster_.info_\n846:       ->resetResourceManager(1, 0, 0, 0, 0);\n847: \n848:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n849:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n850:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n851:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n852:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n853: \n854:   // This should hit the session circuit breaker.\n855:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.2:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n856:   EXPECT_EQ(1, factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_\n857:                    .cluster_.info_->traffic_stats_->upstream_cx_overflow_.value());\n858:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n859:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n860: \n861:   // Timing out the 1st session should allow us to create another.\n862:   test_sessions_[0].idle_timer_->invokeCallback();\n863:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n864:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n865:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n866:   test_sessions_[1].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n867:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.2:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n868:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n869:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n870: }\n871: \n872: // Verify that all sessions for a host are removed when a host is removed.\n873: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, RemoveHostSessions) {\n874:   InSequence s;\n875: \n876:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n877: stat_prefix: foo\n878: matcher:\n879:   on_no_match:\n880:     action:\n881:       name: route\n882:       typed_config:\n883:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n884:         cluster: fake_cluster\n885:   )EOF\"));\n886: \n887:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n888:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n889:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n890:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n891:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n892: \n893:   factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.cluster_\n894:       .priority_set_.runUpdateCallbacks(0, {},\n895:                                         {factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_\n896:                                              .thread_local_cluster_.lb_.host_});\n897:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n898:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n899: \n900:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n901:   test_sessions_[1].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n902:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n903:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n904:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n905: }\n906: \n907: // In this case the host becomes unhealthy, but we get the same host back, so just keep using the\n908: // current session.\n909: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, HostUnhealthyPickSameHost) {\n910:   InSequence s;\n911: \n912:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n913: stat_prefix: foo\n914: matcher:\n915:   on_no_match:\n916:     action:\n917:       name: route\n918:       typed_config:\n919:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n920:         cluster: fake_cluster\n921:   )EOF\"));\n922: \n923:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n924:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n925:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n926:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n927:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n928: \n929:   EXPECT_CALL(\n930:       *factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_.host_,\n931:       coarseHealth())\n932:       .WillRepeatedly(Return(Upstream::Host::Health::Unhealthy));\n933:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\");\n934:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n935: }\n936: \n937: // Make sure that we are able to create a new session if there is an available healthy host and\n938: // our current host is unhealthy.\n939: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, HostUnhealthyPickDifferentHost) {\n940:   InSequence s;\n941: \n942:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n943: stat_prefix: foo\n944: matcher:\n945:   on_no_match:\n946:     action:\n947:       name: route\n948:       typed_config:\n949:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n950:         cluster: fake_cluster\n951:   )EOF\"));\n952: \n953:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n954:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n955:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n956:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n957:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n958: \n959:   EXPECT_CALL(\n960:       *factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_.host_,\n961:       coarseHealth())\n962:       .WillRepeatedly(Return(Upstream::Host::Health::Unhealthy));\n963:   auto new_host_address = Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(\"20.0.0.2:443\");\n964:   auto new_host = createHost(new_host_address);\n965:   EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_,\n966:               chooseHost(_))\n967:       .WillOnce(Return(new_host));\n968:   expectSessionCreate(new_host_address);\n969:   test_sessions_[1].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n970:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n971:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n972:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n973: }\n974: \n975: // Make sure socket option is set correctly if use_original_src_ip is set.\n976: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, SocketOptionForUseOriginalSrcIp) {\n977:   if (!isTransparentSocketOptionsSupported()) {\n978:     // The option is not supported on this platform. Just skip the test.\n979:     GTEST_SKIP();\n980:   }\n981:   EXPECT_CALL(os_sys_calls_, supportsIpTransparent(_));\n982: \n983:   InSequence s;\n984: \n985:   ensureIpTransparentSocketOptions(upstream_address_, \"10.0.0.2:80\", 1, 0);\n986: }\n987: \n988: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, MutualExcludePerPacketLoadBalancingAndSessionFilters) {\n989:   auto config = R\"EOF(\n990: stat_prefix: foo\n991: matcher:\n992:   on_no_match:\n993:     action:\n994:       name: route\n995:       typed_config:\n996:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n997:         cluster: fake_cluster\n998: use_per_packet_load_balancing: true\n999: session_filters:\n1000: - name: foo\n1001:   typed_config:\n1002:     '@type': type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.Struct\n1003:   )EOF\";\n1004: \n1005:   EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(\n1006:       setup(readConfig(config)), EnvoyException,\n1007:       \"Only one of use_per_packet_load_balancing or session_filters can be used.\");\n1008: }\n1009: \n1010: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, MutualExcludePerPacketLoadBalancingAndTunneling) {\n1011:   auto config = R\"EOF(\n1012: stat_prefix: foo\n1013: matcher:\n1014:   on_no_match:\n1015:     action:\n1016:       name: route\n1017:       typed_config:\n1018:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1019:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1020: use_per_packet_load_balancing: true\n1021: tunneling_config:\n1022:   proxy_host: host.com\n1023:   target_host: host.com\n1024:   default_target_port: 30\n1025:   )EOF\";\n1026: \n1027:   EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(\n1028:       setup(readConfig(config)), EnvoyException,\n1029:       \"Only one of use_per_packet_load_balancing or tunneling_config can be used.\");\n1030: }\n1031: \n1032: // Verify that on second data packet sent from the client, another upstream host is selected.\n1033: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, PerPacketLoadBalancingBasicFlow) {\n1034:   InSequence s;\n1035: \n1036:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n1037: stat_prefix: foo\n1038: matcher:\n1039:   on_no_match:\n1040:     action:\n1041:       name: route\n1042:       typed_config:\n1043:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1044:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1045: use_per_packet_load_balancing: true\n1046:   )EOF\"));\n1047: \n1048:   // Allow for two sessions.\n1049:   factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.cluster_.info_\n1050:       ->resetResourceManager(2, 0, 0, 0, 0);\n1051: \n1052:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n1053:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n1054:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n1055:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n1056:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n1057:   checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n1058:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world\");\n1059:   checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n1060: \n1061:   auto new_host_address = Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(\"20.0.0.2:443\");\n1062:   auto new_host = createHost(new_host_address);\n1063:   EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_,\n1064:               chooseHost(_))\n1065:       .WillOnce(Return(new_host));\n1066:   expectSessionCreate(new_host_address);\n1067:   test_sessions_[1].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello2\", 0, nullptr, true);\n1068:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello2\");\n1069:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n1070:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n1071:   checkTransferStats(11 /*rx_bytes*/, 2 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n1072: \n1073:   // On next datagram, first session should be used\n1074:   EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_,\n1075:               chooseHost(_))\n1076:       .WillRepeatedly(DoDefault());\n1077:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello3\");\n1078:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello3\");\n1079:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n1080:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n1081:   checkTransferStats(17 /*rx_bytes*/, 3 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n1082: }\n1083: \n1084: // Verify that when no host is available, message is dropped.\n1085: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, PerPacketLoadBalancingFirstInvalidHost) {\n1086:   InSequence s;\n1087: \n1088:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n1089: stat_prefix: foo\n1090: matcher:\n1091:   on_no_match:\n1092:     action:\n1093:       name: route\n1094:       typed_config:\n1095:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1096:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1097: use_per_packet_load_balancing: true\n1098:   )EOF\"));\n1099: \n1100:   EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_,\n1101:               chooseHost(_))\n1102:       .WillOnce(Return(nullptr));\n1103:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n1104:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n1105:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n1106:   EXPECT_EQ(1, factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_\n1107:                    .cluster_.info_->traffic_stats_->upstream_cx_none_healthy_.value());\n1108: }\n1109: \n1110: // Verify that when on second packet no host is available, message is dropped.\n1111: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, PerPacketLoadBalancingSecondInvalidHost) {\n1112:   InSequence s;\n1113: \n1114:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n1115: stat_prefix: foo\n1116: matcher:\n1117:   on_no_match:\n1118:     action:\n1119:       name: route\n1120:       typed_config:\n1121:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1122:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1123: use_per_packet_load_balancing: true\n1124:   )EOF\"));\n1125: \n1126:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n1127:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n1128:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n1129:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n1130:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n1131:   EXPECT_EQ(0, factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_\n1132:                    .cluster_.info_->traffic_stats_->upstream_cx_none_healthy_.value());\n1133: \n1134:   EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_,\n1135:               chooseHost(_))\n1136:       .WillOnce(Return(nullptr));\n1137:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello2\");\n1138:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n1139:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n1140:   EXPECT_EQ(1, factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_\n1141:                    .cluster_.info_->traffic_stats_->upstream_cx_none_healthy_.value());\n1142: }\n1143: \n1144: // Verify that all sessions for a host are removed when a host is removed.\n1145: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, PerPacketLoadBalancingRemoveHostSessions) {\n1146:   InSequence s;\n1147: \n1148:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n1149: stat_prefix: foo\n1150: matcher:\n1151:   on_no_match:\n1152:     action:\n1153:       name: route\n1154:       typed_config:\n1155:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1156:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1157: use_per_packet_load_balancing: true\n1158:   )EOF\"));\n1159: \n1160:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n1161:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n1162:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n1163:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n1164:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n1165: \n1166:   factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.cluster_\n1167:       .priority_set_.runUpdateCallbacks(0, {},\n1168:                                         {factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_\n1169:                                              .thread_local_cluster_.lb_.host_});\n1170:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n1171:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n1172: \n1173:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n1174:   test_sessions_[1].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello2\", 0, nullptr, true);\n1175:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello2\");\n1176:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n1177:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n1178: }\n1179: \n1180: // Verify that all sessions for hosts in cluster are removed when a cluster is removed.\n1181: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, PerPacketLoadBalancingRemoveCluster) {\n1182:   InSequence s;\n1183: \n1184:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n1185: stat_prefix: foo\n1186: matcher:\n1187:   on_no_match:\n1188:     action:\n1189:       name: route\n1190:       typed_config:\n1191:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1192:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1193: use_per_packet_load_balancing: true\n1194:   )EOF\"));\n1195: \n1196:   // Allow for two sessions.\n1197:   factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.cluster_.info_\n1198:       ->resetResourceManager(2, 0, 0, 0, 0);\n1199: \n1200:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n1201:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n1202:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n1203:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n1204:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n1205: \n1206:   auto new_host_address = Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(\"20.0.0.2:443\");\n1207:   auto new_host = createHost(new_host_address);\n1208:   EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_,\n1209:               chooseHost(_))\n1210:       .WillOnce(Return(new_host));\n1211:   expectSessionCreate(new_host_address);\n1212:   test_sessions_[1].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello2\", 0, nullptr, true);\n1213:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello2\");\n1214:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n1215:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n1216: \n1217:   // Remove a cluster we don't care about.\n1218:   cluster_update_callbacks_->onClusterRemoval(\"other_cluster\");\n1219:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n1220: \n1221:   // Remove the cluster we do care about. This should purge all sessions.\n1222:   cluster_update_callbacks_->onClusterRemoval(\"fake_cluster\");\n1223:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n1224: }\n1225: \n1226: // Verify that specific stat is included when connection limit is hit.\n1227: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, PerPacketLoadBalancingCannotCreateConnection) {\n1228:   InSequence s;\n1229: \n1230:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n1231: stat_prefix: foo\n1232: matcher:\n1233:   on_no_match:\n1234:     action:\n1235:       name: route\n1236:       typed_config:\n1237:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1238:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1239: use_per_packet_load_balancing: true\n1240:   )EOF\"));\n1241: \n1242:   // Don't allow for any session.\n1243:   factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.cluster_.info_\n1244:       ->resetResourceManager(0, 0, 0, 0, 0);\n1245: \n1246:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n1247:   EXPECT_EQ(1, factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_\n1248:                    .cluster_.info_->traffic_stats_->upstream_cx_overflow_.value());\n1249: }\n1250: \n1251: // Make sure socket option is set correctly if use_original_src_ip is set in case of ipv6.\n1252: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test, SocketOptionForUseOriginalSrcIpInCaseOfIpv6) {\n1253:   if (!isTransparentSocketOptionsSupported()) {\n1254:     // The option is not supported on this platform. Just skip the test.\n1255:     GTEST_SKIP();\n1256:   }\n1257:   EXPECT_CALL(os_sys_calls_, supportsIpTransparent(_));\n1258: \n1259:   InSequence s;\n1260: \n1261:   ensureIpTransparentSocketOptions(upstream_address_v6_, \"[2001:db8:85a3::9a2e:370:7335]:80\", 0, 1);\n1262: }\n1263: \n1264: // Make sure socket options should not be set if use_original_src_ip is not set.\n1265: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterIpv4Ipv6Test, NoSocketOptionIfUseOriginalSrcIpIsNotSet) {\n1266:   if (!isTransparentSocketOptionsSupported()) {\n1267:     // The option is not supported on this platform. Just skip the test.\n1268:     GTEST_SKIP();\n1269:   }\n1270: \n1271:   InSequence s;\n1272: \n1273:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n1274: stat_prefix: foo\n1275: matcher:\n1276:   on_no_match:\n1277:     action:\n1278:       name: route\n1279:       typed_config:\n1280:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1281:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1282: use_original_src_ip: false\n1283:   )EOF\"));\n1284: \n1285:   ensureNoIpTransparentSocketOptions();\n1286: }\n1287: \n1288: // Make sure socket options should not be set if use_original_src_ip is not mentioned.\n1289: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterIpv4Ipv6Test, NoSocketOptionIfUseOriginalSrcIpIsNotMentioned) {\n1290:   if (!isTransparentSocketOptionsSupported()) {\n1291:     // The option is not supported on this platform. Just skip the test.\n1292:     GTEST_SKIP();\n1293:   }\n1294: \n1295:   InSequence s;\n1296: \n1297:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n1298: stat_prefix: foo\n1299: matcher:\n1300:   on_no_match:\n1301:     action:\n1302:       name: route\n1303:       typed_config:\n1304:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1305:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1306:   )EOF\"));\n1307: \n1308:   ensureNoIpTransparentSocketOptions();\n1309: }\n1310: \n1311: // Make sure exit when use the use_original_src_ip but platform does not support ip\n1312: // transparent option.\n1313: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, ExitIpTransparentNoPlatformSupport) {\n1314:   EXPECT_CALL(os_sys_calls_, supportsIpTransparent(_)).WillOnce(Return(false));\n1315: \n1316:   InSequence s;\n1317: \n1318:   auto config = R\"EOF(\n1319: stat_prefix: foo\n1320: matcher:\n1321:   on_no_match:\n1322:     action:\n1323:       name: route\n1324:       typed_config:\n1325:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1326:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1327: use_original_src_ip: true\n1328:   )EOF\";\n1329: \n1330:   EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(\n1331:       setup(readConfig(config)), EnvoyException,\n1332:       \"The platform does not support either IP_TRANSPARENT or IPV6_TRANSPARENT. Or the envoy is \"\n1333:       \"not running with the CAP_NET_ADMIN capability.\");\n1334: }\n1335: \n1336: // Make sure hash policy with source_ip is created.\n1337: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, HashPolicyWithSourceIp) {\n1338:   InSequence s;\n1339: \n1340:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n1341: stat_prefix: foo\n1342: matcher:\n1343:   on_no_match:\n1344:     action:\n1345:       name: route\n1346:       typed_config:\n1347:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1348:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1349: hash_policies:\n1350: - source_ip: true\n1351:   )EOF\"));\n1352: \n1353:   EXPECT_NE(nullptr, config_->hashPolicy());\n1354: }\n1355: \n1356: // Make sure validation fails if source_ip is false.\n1357: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, ValidateHashPolicyWithSourceIp) {\n1358:   InSequence s;\n1359:   auto config = R\"EOF(\n1360: stat_prefix: foo\n1361: matcher:\n1362:   on_no_match:\n1363:     action:\n1364:       name: route\n1365:       typed_config:\n1366:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1367:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1368: hash_policies:\n1369: - source_ip: false\n1370:   )EOF\";\n1371: \n1372:   EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(setup(readConfig(config)), EnvoyException,\n1373:                           \"caused by HashPolicyValidationError\\\\.SourceIp\");\n1374: }\n1375: \n1376: // Make sure hash policy is null if it is not mentioned.\n1377: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, NoHashPolicy) {\n1378:   InSequence s;\n1379: \n1380:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n1381: stat_prefix: foo\n1382: matcher:\n1383:   on_no_match:\n1384:     action:\n1385:       name: route\n1386:       typed_config:\n1387:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1388:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1389:   )EOF\"));\n1390: \n1391:   EXPECT_EQ(nullptr, config_->hashPolicy());\n1392: }\n1393: \n1394: // Expect correct hash is created if hash_policy with source_ip is mentioned.\n1395: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, HashWithSourceIp) {\n1396:   InSequence s;\n1397: \n1398:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n1399: stat_prefix: foo\n1400: matcher:\n1401:   on_no_match:\n1402:     action:\n1403:       name: route\n1404:       typed_config:\n1405:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1406:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1407: hash_policies:\n1408: - source_ip: true\n1409:   )EOF\"));\n1410: \n1411:   auto host = createHost(upstream_address_);\n1412:   auto generated_hash = HashUtil::xxHash64(\"10.0.0.1\");\n1413:   EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_,\n1414:               chooseHost(_))\n1415:       .WillOnce(Invoke([host, generated_hash](\n1416:                            Upstream::LoadBalancerContext* context) -> Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr {\n1417:         auto hash = context->computeHashKey();\n1418:         EXPECT_TRUE(hash.has_value());\n1419:         EXPECT_EQ(generated_hash, hash.value());\n1420:         return host;\n1421:       }));\n1422:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n1423:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n1424:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n1425:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world\");\n1426: }\n1427: \n1428: // Expect null hash value if hash_policy is not mentioned.\n1429: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, NullHashWithoutHashPolicy) {\n1430:   InSequence s;\n1431: \n1432:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n1433: stat_prefix: foo\n1434: matcher:\n1435:   on_no_match:\n1436:     action:\n1437:       name: route\n1438:       typed_config:\n1439:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1440:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1441:   )EOF\"));\n1442: \n1443:   auto host = createHost(upstream_address_);\n1444:   EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_,\n1445:               chooseHost(_))\n1446:       .WillOnce(\n1447:           Invoke([host](Upstream::LoadBalancerContext* context) -> Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr {\n1448:             auto hash = context->computeHashKey();\n1449:             EXPECT_FALSE(hash.has_value());\n1450:             return host;\n1451:           }));\n1452:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n1453:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n1454:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n1455:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world\");\n1456: }\n1457: \n1458: // Make sure hash policy with key is created.\n1459: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, HashPolicyWithKey) {\n1460:   InSequence s;\n1461: \n1462:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n1463: stat_prefix: foo\n1464: matcher:\n1465:   on_no_match:\n1466:     action:\n1467:       name: route\n1468:       typed_config:\n1469:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1470:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1471: hash_policies:\n1472: - key: \"key\"\n1473:   )EOF\"));\n1474: \n1475:   EXPECT_NE(nullptr, config_->hashPolicy());\n1476: }\n1477: \n1478: // Make sure validation fails if key is an empty string.\n1479: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, ValidateHashPolicyWithKey) {\n1480:   InSequence s;\n1481:   auto config = R\"EOF(\n1482: stat_prefix: foo\n1483: matcher:\n1484:  on_no_match:\n1485:     action:\n1486:       name: route\n1487:       typed_config:\n1488:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1489:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1490: hash_policies:\n1491: - key: \"\"\n1492:   )EOF\";\n1493: \n1494:   EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(setup(readConfig(config)), EnvoyException,\n1495:                           \"caused by HashPolicyValidationError\\\\.Key\");\n1496: }\n1497: \n1498: // Expect correct hash is created if hash_policy with key is mentioned.\n1499: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, HashWithKey) {\n1500:   InSequence s;\n1501: \n1502:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n1503: stat_prefix: foo\n1504: matcher:\n1505:   on_no_match:\n1506:     action:\n1507:       name: route\n1508:       typed_config:\n1509:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1510:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1511: hash_policies:\n1512: - key: \"key\"\n1513:   )EOF\"));\n1514: \n1515:   auto host = createHost(upstream_address_);\n1516:   auto generated_hash = HashUtil::xxHash64(\"key\");\n1517:   EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_,\n1518:               chooseHost(_))\n1519:       .WillOnce(Invoke([host, generated_hash](\n1520:                            Upstream::LoadBalancerContext* context) -> Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr {\n1521:         auto hash = context->computeHashKey();\n1522:         EXPECT_TRUE(hash.has_value());\n1523:         EXPECT_EQ(generated_hash, hash.value());\n1524:         return host;\n1525:       }));\n1526:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n1527:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n1528:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n1529:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world\");\n1530: }\n1531: \n1532: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, EnrichAccessLogOnSessionComplete) {\n1533:   InSequence s;\n1534: \n1535:   const std::string session_access_log_format =\n1536:       \"%FILTER_STATE(test.udp_session.drainer.on_session_complete)%\";\n1537: \n1538:   setup(accessLogConfig(R\"EOF(\n1539: stat_prefix: foo\n1540: matcher:\n1541:   on_no_match:\n1542:     action:\n1543:       name: route\n1544:       typed_config:\n1545:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n1546:         cluster: fake_cluster\n1547: session_filters:\n1548: - name: foo\n1549:   typed_config:\n1550:     '@type': type.googleapis.com/test.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.session_filters.DrainerUdpSessionReadFilterConfig\n1551:     downstream_bytes_to_drain: 0\n1552:     stop_iteration_on_new_session: false\n1553:     stop_iteration_on_first_read: false\n1554:     continue_filter_chain: false\n1555:   )EOF\",\n1556:                         session_access_log_format, \"\"));\n1557: \n1558:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n1559:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n1560:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n1561:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n1562:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n1563: \n1564:   test_sessions_[0].idle_timer_->invokeCallback();\n1565:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n1566:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n1567: \n1568:   filter_.reset();\n1569:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.size(), 1);\n1570:   EXPECT_THAT(output_.front(), testing::HasSubstr(\"session_complete\"));\n1571: }\n1572: \n1573: class HttpUpstreamImplTest : public testing::Test {\n1574: public:\n1575:   struct HeaderToAdd {\n1576:     std::string key_;\n1577:     std::string value_;\n1578:   };\n1579: \n1580:   Http::TestRequestHeaderMapImpl\n1581:   expectedHeaders(bool is_ssl = false, bool use_post = false,\n1582:                   absl::optional<std::string> opt_authority = absl::nullopt,\n1583:                   absl::optional<std::string> opt_path = absl::nullopt,\n1584:                   absl::optional<HeaderToAdd> header_to_add = absl::nullopt) {\n1585:     // In case connect-udp is used, Envoy expect the H2 headers to be normalized with H1,\n1586:     // so expect that the request headers here match H1 headers, even though\n1587:     // eventually H2 headers will be sent. When the headers are normalized to H1, the method\n1588:     // is replaced with GET, a header with the 'upgrade' key is added with 'connect-udp'\n1589:     // value and a header with the 'connection' key is added with 'Upgrade' value.\n1590:     std::string scheme = is_ssl ? \"https\" : \"http\";\n1591:     std::string authority =\n1592:         opt_authority.has_value() ? opt_authority.value() : \"default.host.com:10\";\n1593:     std::string method = use_post ? \"POST\" : \"GET\";\n1594:     std::string path =\n1595:         opt_path.has_value() ? opt_path.value() : \"/.well-known/masque/udp/default.target.host/20/\";\n1596: \n1597:     auto headers = Http::TestRequestHeaderMapImpl{\n1598:         {\":scheme\", scheme}, {\":authority\", authority}, {\":method\", method}, {\":path\", path}};\n1599: \n1600:     if (!use_post) {\n1601:       headers.addCopy(\"capsule-protocol\", \"?1\");\n1602:       headers.addCopy(\"upgrade\", \"connect-udp\");\n1603:       headers.addCopy(\"connection\", \"Upgrade\");\n1604:     }\n1605: \n1606:     if (header_to_add) {\n1607:       headers.addCopy(header_to_add.value().key_, header_to_add.value().value_);\n1608:     }\n1609: \n1610:     return headers;\n1611:   }\n1612: \n1613:   void setAndExpectRequestEncoder(Http::TestRequestHeaderMapImpl expected_headers,\n1614:                                   bool is_ssl = false) {\n1615:     EXPECT_CALL(request_encoder_.stream_, addCallbacks(_));\n1616:     EXPECT_CALL(request_encoder_, encodeHeaders(_, _))\n1617:         .WillOnce(Invoke([expected_headers](const Http::RequestHeaderMap& headers,\n1618:                                             bool end_stream) -> Http::Status {\n1619:           EXPECT_THAT(&headers, HeaderMapEqualIgnoreOrder(&expected_headers));\n1620:           EXPECT_FALSE(end_stream);\n1621:           return absl::OkStatus();\n1622:         }));\n1623: \n1624:     upstream_->setRequestEncoder(request_encoder_, is_ssl);\n1625: \n1626:     // Verify that resetEncoder is called only once.\n1627:     EXPECT_CALL(request_encoder_.stream_, removeCallbacks(_));\n1628:   }\n1629: \n1630:   void filterStateOverride(absl::optional<uint32_t> proxy_port = absl::nullopt,\n1631:                            absl::optional<uint32_t> target_port = absl::nullopt) {\n1632:     if (proxy_port) {\n1633:       stream_info_.filterState()->setData(\n1634:           \"udp.connect.proxy_port\",\n1635:           std::make_shared<StreamInfo::UInt32AccessorImpl>(proxy_port.value()),\n1636:           Envoy::StreamInfo::FilterState::StateType::Mutable);\n1637:     }\n1638: \n1639:     if (target_port) {\n1640:       stream_info_.filterState()->setData(\n1641:           \"udp.connect.target_port\",\n1642:           std::make_shared<StreamInfo::UInt32AccessorImpl>(target_port.value()),\n1643:           Envoy::StreamInfo::FilterState::StateType::Mutable);\n1644:     }\n1645:   }\n1646: \n1647:   void setup(absl::optional<HeaderToAdd> header_to_add = absl::nullopt) {\n1648:     Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::core::v3::HeaderValueOption> headers_to_add;\n1649:     if (header_to_add) {\n1650:       envoy::config::core::v3::HeaderValueOption* header = headers_to_add.Add();\n1651:       header->mutable_header()->set_key(header_to_add.value().key_);\n1652:       header->mutable_header()->set_value(header_to_add.value().value_);\n1653:     }\n1654: \n1655:     header_evaluator_ = Envoy::Router::HeaderParser::configure(headers_to_add);\n1656:     config_ = std::make_unique<NiceMock<MockUdpTunnelingConfig>>(*header_evaluator_);\n1657:     upstream_ = std::make_unique<HttpUpstreamImpl>(callbacks_, *config_, stream_info_);\n1658:     upstream_->setTunnelCreationCallbacks(creation_callbacks_);\n1659:   }\n1660: \n1661:   NiceMock<MockUpstreamTunnelCallbacks> callbacks_;\n1662:   NiceMock<StreamInfo::MockStreamInfo> stream_info_;\n1663:   NiceMock<Http::MockRequestEncoder> request_encoder_;\n1664:   NiceMock<MockTunnelCreationCallbacks> creation_callbacks_;\n1665:   std::unique_ptr<NiceMock<MockUdpTunnelingConfig>> config_;\n1666:   std::unique_ptr<Http::HeaderEvaluator> header_evaluator_;\n1667:   std::unique_ptr<HttpUpstreamImpl> upstream_;\n1668: };\n1669: \n1670: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, EncodeData) {\n1671:   setup();\n1672:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n1673: \n1674:   EXPECT_CALL(request_encoder_, encodeData(_, false));\n1675:   Buffer::OwnedImpl data;\n1676:   upstream_->encodeData(data);\n1677: }\n1678: \n1679: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, WatermarksCallBack) {\n1680:   setup();\n1681: \n1682:   EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, onAboveWriteBufferHighWatermark());\n1683:   upstream_->onAboveWriteBufferHighWatermark();\n1684:   EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, onBelowWriteBufferLowWatermark());\n1685:   upstream_->onBelowWriteBufferLowWatermark();\n1686: }\n1687: \n1688: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, OnResetStream) {\n1689:   setup();\n1690:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n1691: \n1692:   // If the creation callbacks are active will resetting the stream, it means that response\n1693:   // headers were not received, so it's expected to be a failure.\n1694:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamFailure());\n1695:   upstream_->onResetStream(Http::StreamResetReason::ConnectionTimeout, \"reason\");\n1696: }\n1697: \n1698: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, LocalCloseByDownstreamResetsStream) {\n1699:   setup();\n1700:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n1701: \n1702:   // If the creation callbacks are active will resetting the stream, it means that response\n1703:   // headers were not received, so it's expected to be a failure.\n1704:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamFailure());\n1705:   EXPECT_CALL(request_encoder_.stream_, resetStream(Http::StreamResetReason::LocalReset));\n1706:   upstream_->onDownstreamEvent(Network::ConnectionEvent::LocalClose);\n1707: }\n1708: \n1709: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, RemoteCloseByDownstreamResetsStream) {\n1710:   setup();\n1711:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n1712: \n1713:   // If the creation callbacks are active will resetting the stream, it means that response\n1714:   // headers were not received, so it's expected to be a failure.\n1715:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamFailure());\n1716:   EXPECT_CALL(request_encoder_.stream_, resetStream(Http::StreamResetReason::LocalReset));\n1717:   upstream_->onDownstreamEvent(Network::ConnectionEvent::RemoteClose);\n1718: }\n1719: \n1720: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, NullOperationFunctions) {\n1721:   setup();\n1722: \n1723:   // Calling functions that implemented by no-op for coverage.\n1724:   upstream_->responseDecoder().decodeMetadata(nullptr);\n1725:   upstream_->responseDecoder().decode1xxHeaders(nullptr);\n1726:   std::array<char, 1024> buffer;\n1727:   OutputBufferStream ostream{buffer.data(), buffer.size()};\n1728:   upstream_->responseDecoder().dumpState(ostream, 1);\n1729: }\n1730: \n1731: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, FailureResponseHeadersNot200Status) {\n1732:   setup();\n1733:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n1734: \n1735:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamFailure());\n1736: \n1737:   Http::ResponseHeaderMapPtr response_headers(\n1738:       new Http::TestResponseHeaderMapImpl{{\":status\", \"500\"}, {\"Capsule-Protocol\", \"?1\"}});\n1739:   upstream_->responseDecoder().decodeHeaders(std::move(response_headers), /*end_stream=*/false);\n1740: }\n1741: \n1742: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, FailureResponseHeadersEndStream) {\n1743:   setup();\n1744:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n1745: \n1746:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamFailure());\n1747: \n1748:   Http::ResponseHeaderMapPtr response_headers(\n1749:       new Http::TestResponseHeaderMapImpl{{\":status\", \"101\"}, {\"upgrade\", \"connect-udp\"}});\n1750:   upstream_->responseDecoder().decodeHeaders(std::move(response_headers), /*end_stream=*/true);\n1751: }\n1752: \n1753: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, SuccessResponseHeaders) {\n1754:   setup();\n1755:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n1756: \n1757:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamFailure()).Times(0);\n1758:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamSuccess(_));\n1759: \n1760:   Http::ResponseHeaderMapPtr response_headers(\n1761:       new Http::TestResponseHeaderMapImpl{{\":status\", \"101\"}, {\"upgrade\", \"connect-udp\"}});\n1762:   upstream_->responseDecoder().decodeHeaders(std::move(response_headers), /*end_stream=*/false);\n1763: }\n1764: \n1765: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, DecodeData) {\n1766:   setup();\n1767:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n1768: \n1769:   Buffer::OwnedImpl data;\n1770: \n1771:   // Second decodeData call will reset the stream, because it is end of stream.\n1772:   // Since response headers were not received it's considered as a failure.\n1773:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamFailure());\n1774:   EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, onUpstreamData(_, _))\n1775:       .WillOnce(Invoke([](Buffer::Instance&, bool end_stream) { EXPECT_FALSE(end_stream); }))\n1776:       .WillOnce(Invoke([](Buffer::Instance&, bool end_stream) { EXPECT_TRUE(end_stream); }));\n1777: \n1778:   upstream_->responseDecoder().decodeData(data, /*end_stream=*/false);\n1779:   upstream_->responseDecoder().decodeData(data, /*end_stream=*/true);\n1780: }\n1781: \n1782: TEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, DecodeDataAfterSuccessHeaders) {\n1783:   setup();\n1784:   setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n1785: \n1786:   Buffer::OwnedImpl data;\n1787:   Http::ResponseHeaderMapPtr response_headers(\n1788:       new Http::TestResponseHeaderMapImpl{{\":status\", \"101\"}, {\"upgrade\", \"connect-udp\"}});\n1789: \n1790:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamFailure()).Times(0);\n1791:   EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamSuccess(_));\n1792:   EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, onUpstreamData(_, _))\n1793:       .WillOnce(Invoke([](Buffer::Instance&, bool end_stream) { EXPECT_FALSE(end_stream); }))\n1794:       .WillOnce(Invoke([](Buffer::Instance&, bool end_stream) { EXPECT_TRUE(end_stream); }));\n1795: \n1796:   upstream_->responseDecoder().decodeHeaders(std::move(response_headers), /*end_stream=*/false);\n1797:   upstream_->responseDecoder().decodeData(data, /*end_stream=*/false);\n1798:
