testing::ReturnNew;\\n42: using testing::ReturnRef;\\n43: using testing::SaveArg;\\n44: \\n45: namespace Envoy {\\n46: namespace Extensions {\\n47: namespace UdpFilters {\\n48: namespace UdpProxy {\\n49: namespace {\\n50: \\n51: class TestUdpProxyFilter : public UdpProxyFilter {\\n52: public:\\n53:   using UdpProxyFilter::UdpProxyFilter;\\n54: \\n55:   MOCK_METHOD(Network::SocketPtr, createUdpSocket, (const Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr& host));\\n56: };\\n57: \\n58: Api::IoCallUint64Result makeNoError(uint64_t rc) {\\n59:   auto no_error = Api::ioCallUint64ResultNoError();\\n60:   no_error.return_value_ = rc;\\n61:   return no_error;\\n62: }\\n63: \\n64: Api::IoCallUint64Result makeError(int sys_errno) {\\n65:   return {0, Network::IoSocketError::create(sys_errno)};\\n66: }\\n67: \\n68: class UdpProxyFilterBase : public testing::Test {\\n69: public:\\n70:   UdpProxyFilterBase() {\\n71:     EXPECT_CALL(os_sys_calls_, getaddrinfo(_, _, _, _))\\n72:         .WillRepeatedly(Invoke([&](const char* node, const char* service,\\n73:                                    const struct addrinfo* hints, struct addrinfo** res) {\\n74:           Api::OsSysCallsImpl real;\\n75:           return real.getaddrinfo(node, service, hints, res);\\n76:         }));\\n77:   }\\n78: \\n79: protected:\\n80:   Api::MockOsSysCalls os_sys_calls_;\\n81: };\\n82: \\n83: class UdpProxyFilterTest : public UdpProxyFilterBase {\\n84: public:\\n85:   struct TestSession {\\n86:     TestSession(UdpProxyFilterTest& parent,\\n87:                 const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& upstream_address)\\n88:         : parent_(parent), upstream_address_(upstream_address),\\n89:           socket_(new NiceMock<Network::MockSocket>()) {\\n90:       ON_CALL(*socket_, ipVersion()).WillByDefault(Return(upstream_address_->ip()->version()));\\n91:     }\\n92: \\n93:     void expectSetIpTransparentSocketOption() {\\n94:       EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, setOption(_, _, _, _))\\n95:           .WillRepeatedly(Invoke([this](int level, int optname, const void* optval,\\n96:                                         socklen_t) -> Api::SysCallIntResult {\\n97:             sock_opts_[level][optname] = *reinterpret_cast<const int*>(optval);\\n98:             return Api::SysCallIntResult{0, 0};\\n99:           }));\\n100:     }\\n101: \\n102:     void expectWriteToUpstream(const std::string& data, int sys_errno = 0,\\n103:                                const Network::Address::Ip* local_ip = nullptr,\\n104:                                bool expect_connect = false, int connect_sys_errno = 0) {\\n105:       EXPECT_CALL(*idle_timer_, enableTimer(parent_.config_->sessionTimeout(), nullptr));\\n106:       if (expect_connect) {\\n107:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, connect(_))\\n108:             .WillOnce(Invoke([connect_sys_errno]() -> Api::SysCallIntResult {\\n109:               if (!connect_sys_errno) {\\n110:                 return Api::SysCallIntResult{0, 0};\\n111:               } else {\\n112:                 return Api::SysCallIntResult{-1, connect_sys_errno};\\n113:               }\\n114:             }));\\n115:       } else {\\n116:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, connect(_)).Times(0);\\n117:       }\\n118:       if (!connect_sys_errno) {\\n119:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, sendmsg(_, 1, 0, _, _))\\n120:             .WillOnce(Invoke(\\n121:                 [this, data, local_ip, sys_errno](\\n122:                     const Buffer::RawSlice* slices, uint64_t, int,\\n123:                     const Network::Address::Ip* self_ip,\\n124:                     const Network::Address::Instance& peer_address) -> Api::IoCallUint64Result {\\n125:                   EXPECT_EQ(data, absl::string_view(static_cast<const char*>(slices[0].mem_),\\n126:                                                     slices[0].len_));\\n127:                   EXPECT_EQ(peer_address, *upstream_address_);\\n128:                   if (local_ip == nullptr) {\\n129:                     EXPECT_EQ(nullptr, self_ip);\\n130:                   } else {\\n131:                     EXPECT_EQ(self_ip->addressAsString(), local_ip->addressAsString());\\n132:                   }\\n133:                   // For suppression of clang-tidy NewDeleteLeaks rule, don't use the ternary\\n134:                   // operator.\\n135:                   if (sys_errno == 0) {\\n136:                     return makeNoError(data.size());\\n137:                   } else {\\n138:                     return makeError(sys_errno);\\n139:                   }\\n140:                 }));\\n141:       }\\n142:     }\\n143: \\n144:     void recvDataFromUpstream(const std::string& data, int recv_sys_errno = 0,\\n145:                               int send_sys_errno = 0) {\\n146:       EXPECT_CALL(*idle_timer_, enableTimer(parent_.config_->sessionTimeout(), nullptr));\\n147: \\n148:       if (parent_.expect_gro_) {\\n149:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, supportsUdpGro());\\n150:       }\\n151:       EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, supportsMmsg()).Times(1u);\\n152:       // Return the datagram.\\n153:       EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, recvmsg(_, 1, _, _))\\n154:           .WillOnce(\\n155:               Invoke([this, data, recv_sys_errno](\\n156:                          Buffer::RawSlice* slices, const uint64_t, uint32_t,\\n157:                          Network::IoHandle::RecvMsgOutput& output) -> Api::IoCallUint64Result {\\n158:                 if (recv_sys_errno != 0) {\\n159:                   return makeError(recv_sys_errno);\\n160:                 } else {\\n161:                   ASSERT(data.size() <= slices[0].len_);\\n162:                   memcpy(slices[0].mem_, data.data(), data.size());\\n163:                   output.msg_[0].peer_address_ = upstream_address_;\\n164:                   return makeNoError(data.size());\\n165:                 }\\n166:               }));\\n167:       if (recv_sys_errno == 0) {\\n168:         // Send the datagram downstream.\\n169:         EXPECT_CALL(parent_.callbacks_.udp_listener_, send(_))\\n170:             .WillOnce(Invoke([data, send_sys_errno](\\n171:                                  const Network::UdpSendData& send_data) -> Api::IoCallUint64Result {\\n172:               // TODO(mattklein123): Verify peer/local address.\\n173:               EXPECT_EQ(send_data.buffer_.toString(), data);\\n174:               if (send_sys_errno == 0) {\\n175:                 send_data.buffer_.drain(send_data.buffer_.length());\\n176:                 return makeNoError(data.size());\\n177:               } else {\\n178:                 return makeError(send_sys_errno);\\n179:               }\\n180:             }));\\n181:         // Return an EAGAIN result.\\n182:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, recvmsg(_, 1, _, _))\\n183:             .WillOnce(Return(ByMove(\\n184:                 Api::IoCallUint64Result(0, Network::IoSocketError::getIoSocketEagainError()))));\\n185:       }\\n186: \\n187:       // Kick off the receive.\\n188:       file_event_cb_(Event::FileReadyType::Read);\\n189:     }\\n190: \\n191:     UdpProxyFilterTest& parent_;\\n192:     const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr upstream_address_;\\n193:     Event::MockTimer* idle_timer_{};\\n194:     NiceMock<Network::MockSocket>* socket_;\\n195:     std::map<int, std::map<int, int>> sock_opts_;\\n196:     Event::FileReadyCb file_event_cb_;\\n197:   };\\n198: \\n199:   UdpProxyFilterTest()\\n200:       : UdpProxyFilterTest(Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(peer_ip_address_)) {}\\n201: \\n202:   explicit UdpProxyFilterTest(Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr&& peer_address)\\n203:       : os_calls_(&os_sys_calls_),\\n204:         upstream_address_(Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(upstream_ip_address_)),\\n205:         peer_address_(std::move(peer_address)) {\\n206:     // Disable strict mock warnings.\\n207:     ON_CALL(*factory_context_.server_factory_context_.access_log_manager_.file_, write(_))\\n208:         .WillByDefault(\\n209:             Invoke([&](absl::string_view data) { output_.push_back(std::string(data)); }));\\n210:     ON_CALL(os_sys_calls_, supportsIpTransparent(_)).WillByDefault(Return(true));\\n211:     EXPECT_CALL(os_sys_calls_, supportsUdpGro()).Times(AtLeast(0)).WillRepeatedly(Return(true));\\n212:     EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, udpListener()).Times(AtLeast(0));\\n213:     EXPECT_CALL(\\n214:         *factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_.host_,\\n215:         address())\\n216:         .WillRepeatedly(Return(upstream_address_));\\n217:     EXPECT_CALL(\\n218:         *factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_.host_,\\n219:         coarseHealth())\\n220:         .WillRepeatedly(Return(Upstream::Host::Health::Healthy));\\n221:   }\\n222: \\n223:   ~UdpProxyFilterTest() override { EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_.udp_listener_, onDestroy()); }\\n224: \\n225:   void setup(const envoy::extensions::filters::udp::udp_proxy::v3::UdpProxyConfig& config,\\n226:              bool has_cluster = true, bool expect_gro = true) {\\n227:     config_ = std::make_shared<UdpProxyFilterConfigImpl>(factory_context_, config);\\n228:     EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_,\\n229:                 addThreadLocalClusterUpdateCallbacks_(_))\\n230:         .WillOnce(DoAll(SaveArgAddress(&cluster_update_callbacks_),\\n231:                         ReturnNew<Upstream::MockClusterUpdateCallbacksHandle>()));\\n232:     if (has_cluster) {\\n233:       factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.initializeThreadLocalClusters(\\n234:           {\\\"fake_cluster\\\"});\\n235:     }\\n236:     EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_,\\n237:                 getThreadLocalCluster(\\\"fake_cluster\\\"));\\n238:     filter_ = std::make_unique<TestUdpProxyFilter>(callbacks_, config_);\\n239:     expect_gro_ = expect_gro;\\n240:   }\\n241: \\n242:   void recvDataFromDownstream(const std::string& peer_address, const std::string& local_address,\\n243:                               const std::string& buffer) {\\n244:     Network::UdpRecvData data;\\n245:     data.addresses_.peer_ = Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(peer_address);\\n246:     data.addresses_.local_ = Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(local_address);\\n247:     data.buffer_ = std::make_unique<Buffer::OwnedImpl>(buffer);\\n248:     data.receive_time_ = MonotonicTime(std::chrono::seconds(0));\\n249:     filter_->onData(data);\\n250:   }\\n251: \\n252:   void expectSessionCreate(const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& address) {\\n253:     test_sessions_.emplace_back(*this, address);\\n254:     TestSession& new_session = test_sessions_.back();\\n255:     new_session.idle_timer_ = new Event::MockTimer(&callbacks_.udp_listener_.dispatcher_);\\n256:     EXPECT_CALL(*filter_, createUdpSocket(_))\\n257:         .WillOnce(Return(ByMove(Network::SocketPtr{test_sessions_.back().socket_})));\\n258:     EXPECT_CALL(\\n259:         *new_session.socket_->io_handle_,\\n260:         createFileEvent_(_, _, Event::PlatformDefaultTriggerType, Event::FileReadyType::Read))\\n261:         .WillOnce(SaveArg<1>(&new_session.file_event_cb_));\\n262:     // Internal Buffer is Empty, flush will be a no-op\\n263:     ON_CALL(callbacks_.udp_listener_, flush())\\n264:         .WillByDefault(\\n265:             InvokeWithoutArgs([]() -> Api::IoCallUint64Result { return makeNoError(0); }));\\n266:   }\\n267: \\n268:   std::shared_ptr<NiceMock<Upstream::MockHost>>\\n269:   createHost(const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& host_address) {\\n270:     auto host = std::make_shared<NiceMock<Upstream::MockHost>>();\\n271:     ON_CALL(*host, address()).WillByDefault(Return(host_address));\\n272:     ON_CALL(*host, coarseHealth()).WillByDefault(Return(Upstream::Host::Health::Healthy));\\n273:     return host;\\n274:   }\\n275: \\n276:   void checkTransferStats(uint64_t rx_bytes, uint64_t rx_datagrams, uint64_t tx_bytes,\\n277:                           uint64_t tx_datagrams) {\\n278:     EXPECT_EQ(rx_bytes, config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_bytes_.value());\\n279:     EXPECT_EQ(rx_datagrams, config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_datagrams_.value());\\n280:     EXPECT_EQ(tx_bytes, config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_bytes_.value());\\n281:     EXPECT_EQ(tx_datagrams, config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_datagrams_.value());\\n282:   }\\n283: \\n284:   void checkSocketOptions(TestSession& session, const Network::SocketOptionName& ipv4_option,\\n285:                           int ipv4_expect, const Network::SocketOptionName& ipv6_option,\\n286:                           int ipv6_expect) {\\n287:     EXPECT_EQ(ipv4_expect, session.sock_opts_[ipv4_option.level()][ipv4_option.option()]);\\n288:     EXPECT_EQ(ipv6_expect, session.sock_opts_[ipv6_option.level()][ipv6_option.option()]);\\n289:   }\\n290: \\n291:   void\\n292:   ensureIpTransparentSocketOptions(const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& upstream_address,\\n293:                                    const std::string& local_address, int ipv4_expect,\\n294:                                    int ipv6_expect) {\\n295:     setup(readConfig(R\\\"EOF(\\n296: stat_prefix: foo\\n297: matcher:\\n298:   on_no_match:\\n299:     action:\\n300:       name: route\\n301:       typed_config:\\n302:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\\n303:         cluster: fake_cluster\\n304: use_original_src_ip: true\\n305:     )EOF\\\"));\\n306: \\n307:     expectSessionCreate(upstream_address);\\n308:     test_sessions_[0].expectSetIpTransparentSocketOption();\\n309:     test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\\\"hello\\\", 0, peer_address_->ip());\\n310:     recvDataFromDownstream(peer_address_->asString(), local_address, \\\"hello\\\");\\n311: \\n312:     checkSocketOptions(test_sessions_[0], ENVOY_SOCKET_IP_TRANSPARENT, ipv4_expect,\\n313:                        ENVOY_SOCKET_IPV6_TRANSPARENT, ipv6_expect);\\n314:     EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\\n315:     EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\\n316:     checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n317: \\n318:     test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\\\"world\\\");\\n319:     checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n320:   }\\n321: \\n322:   // Return the config from yaml, plus one file access log with the specified format\\n323:   envoy::extensions::filters::udp::udp_proxy::v3::UdpProxyConfig\\n324:   accessLogConfig(const std::string& yaml, const std::string& session_access_log_format,\\n325:                   const std::string& proxy_access_log_format) {\\n326:     auto config = readConfig(yaml);\\n327: \\n328:     if (!session_access_log_format.empty()) {\\n329:       envoy::config::accesslog::v3::AccessLog* session_access_log =\\n330:           config.mutable_access_log()->Add();\\n331:       session_access_log->set_name(\\\"envoy.access_loggers.file\\\");\\n332:       envoy::extensions::access_loggers::file::v3::FileAccessLog session_file_access_log;\\n333:       session_file_access_log.set_path(\\\"unused\\\");\\n334:       session_file_access_log.mutable_log_format()->mutable_text_format_source()->set_inline_string(\\n335:           session_access_log_format);\\n336:       session_access_log->mutable_typed_config()->PackFrom(session_file_access_log);\\n337:     }\\n338: \\n339:     if (!proxy_access_log_format.empty()) {\\n340:       envoy::config::accesslog::v3::AccessLog* proxy_access_log =\\n341:           config.mutable_proxy_access_log()->Add();\\n342:       proxy_access_log->set_name(\\\"envoy.access_loggers.file\\\");\\n343:       envoy::extensions::access_loggers::file::v3::FileAccessLog proxy_file_access_log;\\n344:       proxy_file_access_log.set_path(\\\"unused\\\");\\n345:       proxy_file_access_log.mutable_log_format()->mutable_text_format_source()->set_inline_string(\\n346:           proxy_access_log_format);\\n347:       proxy_access_log->mutable_typed_config()->PackFrom(proxy_file_access_log);\\n348:     }\\n349:     return config;\\n350:   }\\n351: \\n352:   envoy::extensions::filters::udp::udp_proxy::v3::UdpProxyConfig\\n353:   readConfig(const std::string& yaml) {\\n354:     envoy::extensions::filters::udp::udp_proxy::v3::UdpProxyConfig config;\\n355:     TestUtility::loadFromYamlAndValidate(yaml, config);\\n356:     return config;\\n357:   }\\n358: \\n359:   bool isTransparentSocketOptionsSupported() {\\n360:     for (const auto& option_name : transparent_options_) {\\n361:       if (!option_name.hasValue()) {\\n362:         return false;\\n363:       }\\n364:     }\\n365: \\n366:     return true;\\n367:   }\\n368: \\n369:   TestThreadsafeSingletonInjector<Api::OsSysCallsImpl> os_calls_;\\n370:   NiceMock<Server::Configuration::MockListenerFactoryContext> factory_context_;\\n371:   UdpProxyFilterConfigSharedPtr config_;\\n372:   Network::MockUdpReadFilterCallbacks callbacks_;\\n373:   Upstream::ClusterUpdateCallbacks* cluster_update_callbacks_{};\\n374:   std::unique_ptr<TestUdpProxyFilter> filter_;\\n375:   std::vector<TestSession> test_sessions_;\\n376:   StringViewSaver access_log_data_;\\n377:   std::vector<std::string> output_;\\n378:   bool expect_gro_{};\\n379:   const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr upstream_address_;\\n380:   const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr peer_address_;\\n381:   const std::vector<Network::SocketOptionName> transparent_options_{ENVOY_SOCKET_IP_TRANSPARENT,\\n382:                                                                     ENVOY_SOCKET_IPV6_TRANSPARENT};\\n383:   inline static const std::string upstream_ip_address_ = \\\"20.0.0.1:443\\\";\\n384:   inline static const std::string peer_ip_address_ = \\\"10.0.0.1:1000\\\";\\n385: };\\n386: \\n387: class UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test : public UdpProxyFilterTest {\\n388: public:\\n389:   UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test()\\n390:       : UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test(\\n391:             Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(upstream_ipv6_address_)) {}\\n392: \\n393:   explicit UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test(Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr&& upstream_address_v6)\\n394:       : UdpProxyFilterTest(Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(peer_ipv6_address_)),\\n395:         upstream_address_v6_(std::move(upstream_address_v6)) {\\n396:     EXPECT_CALL(\\n397:         *factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_.host_,\\n398:         address())\\n399:         .WillRepeatedly(Return(upstream_address_v6_));\\n400:   }\\n401: \\n402:   const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr upstream_address_v6_;\\n403:   inline static const std::string upstream_ipv6_address_ = \\\"[2001:db8:85a3::8a2e:370:7334]:443\\\";\\n404:   inline static const std::string peer_ipv6_address_ = \\\"[2001:db8:85a3::9a2e:370:7334]:1000\\\";\\n405: };\\n406: \\n407: class UdpProxyFilterIpv4Ipv6Test : public UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test {\\n408: public:\\n409:   UdpProxyFilterIpv4Ipv6Test()\\n410:       : UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test(Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(\\n411:             UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test::upstream_ipv6_address_, false)) {}\\n412: \\n413:   void ensureNoIpTransparentSocketOptions() {\\n414:     expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_v6_);\\n415:     test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\\\"hello\\\", 0, nullptr, true);\\n416:     recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"[2001:db8:85a3::9a2e:370:7334]:1000\\\",\\n417:                            \\\"[2001:db8:85a3::9a2e:370:7335]:80\\\", \\\"hello\\\");\\n418: \\n419:     checkSocketOptions(test_sessions_[0], ENVOY_SOCKET_IP_TRANSPARENT, 0,\\n420:                        ENVOY_SOCKET_IPV6_TRANSPARENT, 0);\\n421:     EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\\n422:     EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\\n423:     checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n424: \\n425:     test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\\\"world\\\");\\n426:     checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n427:   }\\n428: };\\n429: \\n430: // Basic UDP proxy flow with two sessions. Also test disabling GRO.\\n431: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, BasicFlow) {\\n432:   InSequence s;\\n433: \\n434:   const std::string session_access_log_format =\\n435:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:bytes_received)% \\\"\\n436:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:datagrams_received)% \\\"\\n437:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:bytes_sent)% \\\"\\n438:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:datagrams_sent)% \\\"\\n439:       \\\"%CONNECTION_ID% \\\"\\n440:       \\\"%DOWNSTREAM_REMOTE_ADDRESS% \\\"\\n441:       \\\"%DOWNSTREAM_LOCAL_ADDRESS% \\\"\\n442:       \\\"%UPSTREAM_HOST% \\\"\\n443:       \\\"%STREAM_ID% \\\"\\n444:       \\\"%ACCESS_LOG_TYPE%\\\";\\n445: \\n446:   const std::string proxy_access_log_format =\\n447:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:bytes_received)% \\\"\\n448:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:datagrams_received)% \\\"\\n449:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:bytes_sent)% \\\"\\n450:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:datagrams_sent)% \\\"\\n451:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:no_route)% \\\"\\n452:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:session_total)% \\\"\\n453:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:idle_timeout)%\\\";\\n454: \\n455:   setup(accessLogConfig(R\\\"EOF(\\n456: stat_prefix: foo\\n457: matcher:\\n458:   on_no_match:\\n459:     action:\\n460:       name: route\\n461:       typed_config:\\n462:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\\n463:         cluster: fake_cluster\\n464: upstream_socket_config:\\n465:   prefer_gro: false\\n466:   )EOF\\\",\\n467:                         session_access_log_format, proxy_access_log_format),\\n468:         true, false);\\n469: \\n470:   // Allow for two sessions.\\n471:   factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.cluster_.info_\\n472:       ->resetResourceManager(2, 0, 0, 0, 0);\\n473: \\n474:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\\n475:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\\\"hello\\\", 0, nullptr, true);\\n476:   recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"10.0.0.1:1000\\\", \\\"10.0.0.2:80\\\", \\\"hello\\\");\\n477:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\\n478:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\\n479:   checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n480:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\\\"world\\\");\\n481:   checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n482: \\n483:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\\\"hello2\\\");\\n484:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\\\"hello3\\\");\\n485:   recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"10.0.0.1:1000\\\", \\\"10.0.0.2:80\\\", \\\"hello2\\\");\\n486:   checkTransferStats(11 /*rx_bytes*/, 2 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n487:   recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"10.0.0.1:1000\\\", \\\"10.0.0.2:80\\\", \\\"hello3\\\");\\n488:   checkTransferStats(17 /*rx_bytes*/, 3 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n489: \\n490:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\\\"world2\\\");\\n491:   checkTransferStats(17 /*rx_bytes*/, 3 /*rx_datagrams*/, 11 /*tx_bytes*/, 2 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n492:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\\\"world3\\\");\\n493:   checkTransferStats(17 /*rx_bytes*/, 3 /*rx_datagrams*/, 17 /*tx_bytes*/, 3 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n494: \\n495:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\\n496:   test_sessions_[1].expectWriteToUpstream(\\\"hello4\\\", 0, nullptr, true);\\n497:   recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"10.0.0.3:1000\\\", \\\"10.0.0.2:80\\\", \\\"hello4\\\");\\n498:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\\n499:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\\n500:   checkTransferStats(23 /*rx_bytes*/, 4 /*rx_datagrams*/, 17 /*tx_bytes*/, 3 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n501:   test_sessions_[1].recvDataFromUpstream(\\\"world4\\\");\\n502:   checkTransferStats(23 /*rx_bytes*/, 4 /*rx_datagrams*/, 23 /*tx_bytes*/, 4 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n503: \\n504:   filter_.reset();\\n505:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.size(), 3);\\n506:   EXPECT_EQ(output_[0], \\\"23 4 23 4 0 2 0\\\");\\n507: \\n508:   const std::string session_access_log_regex =\\n509:       \\\"(17 3 17 3 0|6 1 6 1 1) 10.0.0.(1|3):1000 10.0.0.2:80 20.0.0.1:443 \\\"\\n510:       \\\"[0-9a-fA-F]{8}-([0-9a-fA-F]{4}-){3}[0-9a-fA-F]{12} \\\" +\\n511:       AccessLogType_Name(AccessLog::AccessLogType::UdpSessionEnd);\\n512: \\n513:   EXPECT_TRUE(std::regex_match(output_[1], std::regex(session_access_log_regex)));\\n514:   EXPECT_TRUE(std::regex_match(output_[2], std::regex(session_access_log_regex)));\\n515: }\\n516: \\n517: // Route with source IP.\\n518: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, Router) {\\n519:   InSequence s;\\n520: \\n521:   setup(readConfig(R\\\"EOF(\\n522: stat_prefix: foo\\n523: matcher:\\n524:   matcher_tree:\\n525:     input:\\n526:       name: envoy.matching.inputs.source_ip\\n527:       typed_config:\\n528:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.SourceIPInput\\n529:     exact_match_map:\\n530:       map:\\n531:         \\\"10.0.0.1\\\":\\n532:           action:\\n533:             name: route\\n534:             typed_config:\\n535:               '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\\n536:               cluster: fake_cluster\\n537:   )EOF\\\"));\\n538: \\n539:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\\n540:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\\\"hello\\\", 0, nullptr, true);\\n541:   recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"10.0.0.1:1000\\\", \\\"10.0.0.2:80\\\", \\\"hello\\\");\\n542:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\\n543:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\\n544: \\n545:   test_sessions_[0].idle_timer_->invokeCallback();\\n546:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\\n547:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\\n548: \\n549:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\\n550:   test_sessions_[1].expectWriteToUpstream(\\\"hello\\\", 0, nullptr, true);\\n551:   recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"10.0.0.1:1000\\\", \\\"10.0.0.2:80\\\", \\\"hello\\\");\\n552:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\\n553:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\\n554: \\n555:   recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"10.0.0.3:1000\\\", \\\"10.0.0.2:80\\\", \\\"hello\\\");\\n556:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\\n557:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\\n558: }\\n559: \\n560: // Idle timeout flow.\\n561: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, IdleTimeout) {\\n562:   InSequence s;\\n563: \\n564:   const std::string session_access_log_format = \\\"\\\";\\n565: \\n566:   const std::string proxy_access_log_format = \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:session_total)% \\\"\\n567:                                               \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:idle_timeout)%\\\";\\n568: \\n569:   setup(accessLogConfig(R\\\"EOF(\\n570: stat_prefix: foo\\n571: matcher:\\n572:   on_no_match:\\n573:     action:\\n574:       name: route\\n575:       typed_config:\\n576:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\\n577:         cluster: fake_cluster\\n578:   )EOF\\\",\\n579:                         session_access_log_format, proxy_access_log_format));\\n580: \\n581:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\\n582:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\\\"hello\\\", 0, nullptr, true);\\n583:   recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"10.0.0.1:1000\\\", \\\"10.0.0.2:80\\\", \\\"hello\\\");\\n584:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\\n585:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\\n586: \\n587:   test_sessions_[0].idle_timer_->invokeCallback();\\n588:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\\n589:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\\n590: \\n591:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\\n592:   test_sessions_[1].expectWriteToUpstream(\\\"hello\\\", 0, nullptr, true);\\n593:   recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"10.0.0.1:1000\\\", \\\"10.0.0.2:80\\\", \\\"hello\\\");\\n594:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\\n595:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\\n596: \\n597:   filter_.reset();\\n598:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.size(), 1);\\n599:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.front(), \\\"2 1\\\");\\n600: }\\n601: \\n602: // Verify downstream send and receive error handling.\\n603: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, SendReceiveErrorHandling) {\\n604:   InSequence s;\\n605: \\n606:   const std::string session_access_log_format =\\n607:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:cluster_name)% \\\"\\n608:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:bytes_sent)% \\\"\\n609:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:bytes_received)% \\\"\\n610:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:errors_sent)% \\\"\\n611:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:datagrams_sent)% \\\"\\n612:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:datagrams_received)%\\\";\\n613: \\n614:   const std::string proxy_access_log_format = \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:errors_received)% \\\"\\n615:                                               \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:no_route)% \\\"\\n616:                                               \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:session_total)% \\\"\\n617:                                               \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:idle_timeout)%\\\";\\n618: \\n619:   setup(accessLogConfig(R\\\"EOF(\\n620: stat_prefix: foo\\n621: matcher:\\n622:   on_no_match:\\n623:     action:\\n624:       name: route\\n625:       typed_config:\\n626:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\\n627:         cluster: fake_cluster\\n628:   )EOF\\\",\\n629:                         session_access_log_format, proxy_access_log_format));\\n630: \\n631:   filter_->onReceiveError(Api::IoError::IoErrorCode::UnknownError);\\n632:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_errors_.value());\\n633: \\n634:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\\n635:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\\\"hello\\\", 0, nullptr, true);\\n636:   recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"10.0.0.1:1000\\\", \\\"10.0.0.2:80\\\", \\\"hello\\\");\\n637:   checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n638:   EXPECT_EQ(5, factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_\\n639:                    .cluster_.info_->traffic_stats_->upstream_cx_tx_bytes_total_.value());\\n640: \\n641:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\\\"world2\\\", 0, SOCKET_ERROR_MSG_SIZE);\\n642:   checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n643:   EXPECT_EQ(6, factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_\\n644:                    .cluster_.info_->traffic_stats_->upstream_cx_rx_bytes_total_.value());\\n645:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_errors_.value());\\n646: \\n647:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\\\"world2\\\", SOCKET_ERROR_MSG_SIZE, 0);\\n648:   checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n649:   EXPECT_EQ(6, factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_\\n650:                    .cluster_.info_->traffic_stats_->upstream_cx_rx_bytes_total_.value());\\n651:   EXPECT_EQ(1, TestUtility::findCounter(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_\\n652:                                             .thread_local_cluster_.cluster_.info_->stats_store_,\\n653:                                         \\\"udp.sess_rx_errors\\\")\\n654:                    ->value());\\n655: \\n656:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\\\"hello\\\", SOCKET_ERROR_MSG_SIZE);\\n657:   recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"10.0.0.1:1000\\\", \\\"10.0.0.2:80\\\", \\\"hello\\\");\\n658:   checkTransferStats(10 /*rx_bytes*/, 2 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n659:   EXPECT_EQ(5, factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_\\n660:                    .cluster_.info_->traffic_stats_->upstream_cx_tx_bytes_total_.value());\\n661:   EXPECT_EQ(1, TestUtility::findCounter(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_\\n662:                                             .thread_local_cluster_.cluster_.info_->stats_store_,\\n663:                                         \\\"udp.sess_tx_errors\\\")\\n664:                    ->value());\\n665: \\n666:   filter_.reset();\\n667:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.size(), 2);\\n668:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.front(), \\\"1 0 1 0\\\");\\n669:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.back(), \\\"fake_cluster 0 10 1 0 2\\\");\\n670: }\\n671: \\n672: // Verify upstream connect error handling.\\n673: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, ConnectErrorHandling) {\\n674:   InSequence s;\\n675: \\n676:   const std::string session_access_log_format =\\n677:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:cluster_name)% \\\"\\n678:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:bytes_sent)% \\\"\\n679:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:bytes_received)% \\\"\\n680:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:errors_sent)% \\\"\\n681:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:datagrams_sent)% \\\"\\n682:       \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:datagrams_received)%\\\";\\n683: \\n684:   const std::string proxy_access_log_format = \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:errors_received)% \\\"\\n685:                                               \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:session_total)%\\\";\\n686: \\n687:   setup(accessLogConfig(R\\\"EOF(\\n688: stat_prefix: foo\\n689: matcher:\\n690:   on_no_match:\\n691:     action:\\n692:       name: route\\n693:       typed_config:\\n694:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\\n695:         cluster: fake_cluster\\n696:   )EOF\\\",\\n697:                         session_access_log_format, proxy_access_log_format));\\n698: \\n699:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\\n700:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\\\"hello\\\", 0, nullptr, true, 1);\\n701:   EXPECT_LOG_CONTAINS(\\\"debug\\\", \\\"cannot connect\\\",\\n702:                       recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"10.0.0.1:1000\\\", \\\"10.0.0.2:80\\\", \\\"hello\\\"));\\n703:   checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\\n704:   EXPECT_EQ(1, TestUtility::findCounter(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_\\n705:                                             .thread_local_cluster_.cluster_.info_->stats_store_,\\n706:                                         \\\"udp.sess_tx_errors\\\")\\n707:                    ->value());\\n708: \\n709:   filter_.reset();\\n710:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.size(), 2);\\n711:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.front(), \\\"0 1\\\");\\n712:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.back(), \\\"fake_cluster 0 5 0 0 1\\\");\\n713: }\\n714: \\n715: // No upstream host handling.\\n716: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, NoUpstreamHost) {\\n717:   InSequence s;\\n718: \\n719:   setup(readConfig(R\\\"EOF(\\n720: stat_prefix: foo\\n721: matcher:\\n722:   on_no_match:\\n723:     action:\\n724:       name: route\\n725:       typed_config:\\n726:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\\n727:         cluster: fake_cluster\\n728:   )EOF\\\"));\\n729: \\n730:   EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_,\\n731:               chooseHost(_))\\n732:       .WillOnce(Return(nullptr));\\n733:   recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"10.0.0.1:1000\\\", \\\"10.0.0.2:80\\\", \\\"hello\\\");\\n734:   EXPECT_EQ(1, factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_\\n735:                    .cluster_.info_->traffic_stats_->upstream_cx_none_healthy_.value());\\n736: }\\n737: \\n738: // No cluster at filter creation.\\n739: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, NoUpstreamClusterAtCreation) {\\n740:   InSequence s;\\n741: \\n742:   const std::string session_access_log_format = \\\"\\\";\\n743: \\n744:   const std::string proxy_access_log_format = \\\"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:no_route)%\\\";\\n745: \\n746:   setup(accessLogConfig(R\\\"EOF(\\n747: stat_prefix: foo\\n748: matcher:\\n749:   on_no_match:\\n750:     action:\\n751:       name: route\\n752:       typed_config:\\n753:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\\n754:         cluster: fake_cluster\\n755:   )EOF\\\",\\n756:                         session_access_log_format, proxy_access_log_format),\\n757:         false);\\n758: \\n759:   recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"10.0.0.1:1000\\\", \\\"10.0.0.2:80\\\", \\\"hello\\\");\\n760:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_no_route_.value());\\n761: \\n762:   filter_.reset();\\n763:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.size(), 1);\\n764:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.front(), \\\"1\\\");\\n765: }\\n766: \\n767: // Dynamic cluster addition and removal handling.\\n768: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, ClusterDynamicAddAndRemoval) {\\n769:   InSequence s;\\n770: \\n771:   setup(readConfig(R\\\"EOF(\\n772: stat_prefix: foo\\n773: matcher:\\n774:   on_no_match:\\n775:     action:\\n776:       name: route\\n777:       typed_config:\\n778:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\\n779:         cluster: fake_cluster\\n780:   )EOF\\\"),\\n781:         false);\\n782: \\n783:   recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"10.0.0.1:1000\\\", \\\"10.0.0.2:80\\\", \\\"hello\\\");\\n784:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_no_route_.value());\\n785:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\\n786:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\\n787: \\n788:   // Add a cluster that we don't care about.\\n789:   NiceMock<Upstream::MockThreadLocalCluster> other_thread_local_cluster;\\n790:   other_thread_local_cluster.cluster_.info_->name_ = \\\"other_cluster\\\";\\n791:   {\\n792:     Upstream::ThreadLocalClusterCommand command =\\n793:         [&other_thread_local_cluster]() -> Upstream::ThreadLocalCluster& {\\n794:       return other_thread_local_cluster;\\n795:     };\\n796:     cluster_update_callbacks_->onClusterAddOrUpdate(other_thread_local_cluster.info()->name(),\\n797:                                                     command);\\n798:   }\\n799:   recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"10.0.0.1:1000\\\", \\\"10.0.0.2:80\\\", \\\"hello\\\");\\n800:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_no_route_.value());\\n801:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\\n802:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\\n803: \\n804:   // Now add the cluster we care about.\\n805:   {\\n806:     Upstream::ThreadLocalClusterCommand command = [this]() -> Upstream::ThreadLocalCluster& {\\n807:       return factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_;\\n808:     };\\n809:     cluster_update_callbacks_->onClusterAddOrUpdate(\\n810:         factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.info()\\n811:             ->name(),\\n812:         command);\\n813:   }\\n814:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\\n815:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\\\"hello\\\", 0, nullptr, true);\\n816:   recvDataFromDownstream(\\\"10.0.0.1:1000\\\", \\\"10.0.0.2:80\\\", \\\"hello\\\");\\n817:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\\n818:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\\n819: \\n820:   // Remove a cluster we don't care about.\\n821:   cluster_update_callbacks_->onClusterRemoval(\\\"other_cluster\\\");\\n822:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\\n823: \\n824:   // Remove the cluster we do care about. This should purge all sessions.\\n825:   cluster_update_callbacks_->onClusterRemoval(\\\"fake_cluster\\\");\\n826:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\\n827: }\\n828: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/envoy--1ae957c1@a0d69a14ad2283d6c8f001dc8b5cccc8cb09078e/-/blob/test/extensions/filters/udp/udp_proxy/udp_proxy_filter_test.cc%3FL1-827\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: #include \"envoy/config/accesslog/v3/accesslog.pb.h\"\n2: #include \"envoy/extensions/access_loggers/file/v3/file.pb.h\"\n3: #include \"envoy/extensions/filters/udp/udp_proxy/v3/udp_proxy.pb.h\"\n4: #include \"envoy/extensions/filters/udp/udp_proxy/v3/udp_proxy.pb.validate.h\"\n5: \n6: #include \"source/common/api/os_sys_calls_impl.h\"\n7: #include \"source/common/common/hash.h\"\n8: #include \"source/common/network/socket_impl.h\"\n9: #include \"source/common/network/socket_option_impl.h\"\n10: #include \"source/common/router/string_accessor_impl.h\"\n11: #include \"source/common/stream_info/uint32_accessor_impl.h\"\n12: #include \"source/extensions/filters/udp/udp_proxy/config.h\"\n13: #include \"source/extensions/filters/udp/udp_proxy/udp_proxy_filter.h\"\n14: \n15: #include \"test/extensions/filters/udp/udp_proxy/mocks.h\"\n16: #include \"test/extensions/filters/udp/udp_proxy/session_filters/drainer_filter.h\"\n17: #include \"test/extensions/filters/udp/udp_proxy/session_filters/drainer_filter.pb.h\"\n18: #include \"test/mocks/api/mocks.h\"\n19: #include \"test/mocks/http/stream_encoder.h\"\n20: #include \"test/mocks/network/socket.h\"\n21: #include \"test/mocks/server/factory_context.h\"\n22: #include \"test/mocks/server/listener_factory_context.h\"\n23: #include \"test/mocks/upstream/cluster_manager.h\"\n24: #include \"test/mocks/upstream/cluster_update_callbacks.h\"\n25: #include \"test/mocks/upstream/cluster_update_callbacks_handle.h\"\n26: #include \"test/mocks/upstream/host.h\"\n27: #include \"test/mocks/upstream/load_balancer_context.h\"\n28: #include \"test/mocks/upstream/thread_local_cluster.h\"\n29: #include \"test/test_common/threadsafe_singleton_injector.h\"\n30: \n31: #include \"gmock/gmock.h\"\n32: #include \"gtest/gtest.h\"\n33: \n34: using testing::AtLeast;\n35: using testing::ByMove;\n36: using testing::DoAll;\n37: using testing::DoDefault;\n38: using testing::InSequence;\n39: using testing::InvokeWithoutArgs;\n40: using testing::Return;\n41: using testing::ReturnNew;\n42: using testing::ReturnRef;\n43: using testing::SaveArg;\n44: \n45: namespace Envoy {\n46: namespace Extensions {\n47: namespace UdpFilters {\n48: namespace UdpProxy {\n49: namespace {\n50: \n51: class TestUdpProxyFilter : public UdpProxyFilter {\n52: public:\n53:   using UdpProxyFilter::UdpProxyFilter;\n54: \n55:   MOCK_METHOD(Network::SocketPtr, createUdpSocket, (const Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr& host));\n56: };\n57: \n58: Api::IoCallUint64Result makeNoError(uint64_t rc) {\n59:   auto no_error = Api::ioCallUint64ResultNoError();\n60:   no_error.return_value_ = rc;\n61:   return no_error;\n62: }\n63: \n64: Api::IoCallUint64Result makeError(int sys_errno) {\n65:   return {0, Network::IoSocketError::create(sys_errno)};\n66: }\n67: \n68: class UdpProxyFilterBase : public testing::Test {\n69: public:\n70:   UdpProxyFilterBase() {\n71:     EXPECT_CALL(os_sys_calls_, getaddrinfo(_, _, _, _))\n72:         .WillRepeatedly(Invoke([&](const char* node, const char* service,\n73:                                    const struct addrinfo* hints, struct addrinfo** res) {\n74:           Api::OsSysCallsImpl real;\n75:           return real.getaddrinfo(node, service, hints, res);\n76:         }));\n77:   }\n78: \n79: protected:\n80:   Api::MockOsSysCalls os_sys_calls_;\n81: };\n82: \n83: class UdpProxyFilterTest : public UdpProxyFilterBase {\n84: public:\n85:   struct TestSession {\n86:     TestSession(UdpProxyFilterTest& parent,\n87:                 const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& upstream_address)\n88:         : parent_(parent), upstream_address_(upstream_address),\n89:           socket_(new NiceMock<Network::MockSocket>()) {\n90:       ON_CALL(*socket_, ipVersion()).WillByDefault(Return(upstream_address_->ip()->version()));\n91:     }\n92: \n93:     void expectSetIpTransparentSocketOption() {\n94:       EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, setOption(_, _, _, _))\n95:           .WillRepeatedly(Invoke([this](int level, int optname, const void* optval,\n96:                                         socklen_t) -> Api::SysCallIntResult {\n97:             sock_opts_[level][optname] = *reinterpret_cast<const int*>(optval);\n98:             return Api::SysCallIntResult{0, 0};\n99:           }));\n100:     }\n101: \n102:     void expectWriteToUpstream(const std::string& data, int sys_errno = 0,\n103:                                const Network::Address::Ip* local_ip = nullptr,\n104:                                bool expect_connect = false, int connect_sys_errno = 0) {\n105:       EXPECT_CALL(*idle_timer_, enableTimer(parent_.config_->sessionTimeout(), nullptr));\n106:       if (expect_connect) {\n107:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, connect(_))\n108:             .WillOnce(Invoke([connect_sys_errno]() -> Api::SysCallIntResult {\n109:               if (!connect_sys_errno) {\n110:                 return Api::SysCallIntResult{0, 0};\n111:               } else {\n112:                 return Api::SysCallIntResult{-1, connect_sys_errno};\n113:               }\n114:             }));\n115:       } else {\n116:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, connect(_)).Times(0);\n117:       }\n118:       if (!connect_sys_errno) {\n119:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, sendmsg(_, 1, 0, _, _))\n120:             .WillOnce(Invoke(\n121:                 [this, data, local_ip, sys_errno](\n122:                     const Buffer::RawSlice* slices, uint64_t, int,\n123:                     const Network::Address::Ip* self_ip,\n124:                     const Network::Address::Instance& peer_address) -> Api::IoCallUint64Result {\n125:                   EXPECT_EQ(data, absl::string_view(static_cast<const char*>(slices[0].mem_),\n126:                                                     slices[0].len_));\n127:                   EXPECT_EQ(peer_address, *upstream_address_);\n128:                   if (local_ip == nullptr) {\n129:                     EXPECT_EQ(nullptr, self_ip);\n130:                   } else {\n131:                     EXPECT_EQ(self_ip->addressAsString(), local_ip->addressAsString());\n132:                   }\n133:                   // For suppression of clang-tidy NewDeleteLeaks rule, don't use the ternary\n134:                   // operator.\n135:                   if (sys_errno == 0) {\n136:                     return makeNoError(data.size());\n137:                   } else {\n138:                     return makeError(sys_errno);\n139:                   }\n140:                 }));\n141:       }\n142:     }\n143: \n144:     void recvDataFromUpstream(const std::string& data, int recv_sys_errno = 0,\n145:                               int send_sys_errno = 0) {\n146:       EXPECT_CALL(*idle_timer_, enableTimer(parent_.config_->sessionTimeout(), nullptr));\n147: \n148:       if (parent_.expect_gro_) {\n149:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, supportsUdpGro());\n150:       }\n151:       EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, supportsMmsg()).Times(1u);\n152:       // Return the datagram.\n153:       EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, recvmsg(_, 1, _, _))\n154:           .WillOnce(\n155:               Invoke([this, data, recv_sys_errno](\n156:                          Buffer::RawSlice* slices, const uint64_t, uint32_t,\n157:                          Network::IoHandle::RecvMsgOutput& output) -> Api::IoCallUint64Result {\n158:                 if (recv_sys_errno != 0) {\n159:                   return makeError(recv_sys_errno);\n160:                 } else {\n161:                   ASSERT(data.size() <= slices[0].len_);\n162:                   memcpy(slices[0].mem_, data.data(), data.size());\n163:                   output.msg_[0].peer_address_ = upstream_address_;\n164:                   return makeNoError(data.size());\n165:                 }\n166:               }));\n167:       if (recv_sys_errno == 0) {\n168:         // Send the datagram downstream.\n169:         EXPECT_CALL(parent_.callbacks_.udp_listener_, send(_))\n170:             .WillOnce(Invoke([data, send_sys_errno](\n171:                                  const Network::UdpSendData& send_data) -> Api::IoCallUint64Result {\n172:               // TODO(mattklein123): Verify peer/local address.\n173:               EXPECT_EQ(send_data.buffer_.toString(), data);\n174:               if (send_sys_errno == 0) {\n175:                 send_data.buffer_.drain(send_data.buffer_.length());\n176:                 return makeNoError(data.size());\n177:               } else {\n178:                 return makeError(send_sys_errno);\n179:               }\n180:             }));\n181:         // Return an EAGAIN result.\n182:         EXPECT_CALL(*socket_->io_handle_, recvmsg(_, 1, _, _))\n183:             .WillOnce(Return(ByMove(\n184:                 Api::IoCallUint64Result(0, Network::IoSocketError::getIoSocketEagainError()))));\n185:       }\n186: \n187:       // Kick off the receive.\n188:       file_event_cb_(Event::FileReadyType::Read);\n189:     }\n190: \n191:     UdpProxyFilterTest& parent_;\n192:     const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr upstream_address_;\n193:     Event::MockTimer* idle_timer_{};\n194:     NiceMock<Network::MockSocket>* socket_;\n195:     std::map<int, std::map<int, int>> sock_opts_;\n196:     Event::FileReadyCb file_event_cb_;\n197:   };\n198: \n199:   UdpProxyFilterTest()\n200:       : UdpProxyFilterTest(Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(peer_ip_address_)) {}\n201: \n202:   explicit UdpProxyFilterTest(Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr&& peer_address)\n203:       : os_calls_(&os_sys_calls_),\n204:         upstream_address_(Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(upstream_ip_address_)),\n205:         peer_address_(std::move(peer_address)) {\n206:     // Disable strict mock warnings.\n207:     ON_CALL(*factory_context_.server_factory_context_.access_log_manager_.file_, write(_))\n208:         .WillByDefault(\n209:             Invoke([&](absl::string_view data) { output_.push_back(std::string(data)); }));\n210:     ON_CALL(os_sys_calls_, supportsIpTransparent(_)).WillByDefault(Return(true));\n211:     EXPECT_CALL(os_sys_calls_, supportsUdpGro()).Times(AtLeast(0)).WillRepeatedly(Return(true));\n212:     EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, udpListener()).Times(AtLeast(0));\n213:     EXPECT_CALL(\n214:         *factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_.host_,\n215:         address())\n216:         .WillRepeatedly(Return(upstream_address_));\n217:     EXPECT_CALL(\n218:         *factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_.host_,\n219:         coarseHealth())\n220:         .WillRepeatedly(Return(Upstream::Host::Health::Healthy));\n221:   }\n222: \n223:   ~UdpProxyFilterTest() override { EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_.udp_listener_, onDestroy()); }\n224: \n225:   void setup(const envoy::extensions::filters::udp::udp_proxy::v3::UdpProxyConfig& config,\n226:              bool has_cluster = true, bool expect_gro = true) {\n227:     config_ = std::make_shared<UdpProxyFilterConfigImpl>(factory_context_, config);\n228:     EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_,\n229:                 addThreadLocalClusterUpdateCallbacks_(_))\n230:         .WillOnce(DoAll(SaveArgAddress(&cluster_update_callbacks_),\n231:                         ReturnNew<Upstream::MockClusterUpdateCallbacksHandle>()));\n232:     if (has_cluster) {\n233:       factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.initializeThreadLocalClusters(\n234:           {\"fake_cluster\"});\n235:     }\n236:     EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_,\n237:                 getThreadLocalCluster(\"fake_cluster\"));\n238:     filter_ = std::make_unique<TestUdpProxyFilter>(callbacks_, config_);\n239:     expect_gro_ = expect_gro;\n240:   }\n241: \n242:   void recvDataFromDownstream(const std::string& peer_address, const std::string& local_address,\n243:                               const std::string& buffer) {\n244:     Network::UdpRecvData data;\n245:     data.addresses_.peer_ = Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(peer_address);\n246:     data.addresses_.local_ = Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(local_address);\n247:     data.buffer_ = std::make_unique<Buffer::OwnedImpl>(buffer);\n248:     data.receive_time_ = MonotonicTime(std::chrono::seconds(0));\n249:     filter_->onData(data);\n250:   }\n251: \n252:   void expectSessionCreate(const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& address) {\n253:     test_sessions_.emplace_back(*this, address);\n254:     TestSession& new_session = test_sessions_.back();\n255:     new_session.idle_timer_ = new Event::MockTimer(&callbacks_.udp_listener_.dispatcher_);\n256:     EXPECT_CALL(*filter_, createUdpSocket(_))\n257:         .WillOnce(Return(ByMove(Network::SocketPtr{test_sessions_.back().socket_})));\n258:     EXPECT_CALL(\n259:         *new_session.socket_->io_handle_,\n260:         createFileEvent_(_, _, Event::PlatformDefaultTriggerType, Event::FileReadyType::Read))\n261:         .WillOnce(SaveArg<1>(&new_session.file_event_cb_));\n262:     // Internal Buffer is Empty, flush will be a no-op\n263:     ON_CALL(callbacks_.udp_listener_, flush())\n264:         .WillByDefault(\n265:             InvokeWithoutArgs([]() -> Api::IoCallUint64Result { return makeNoError(0); }));\n266:   }\n267: \n268:   std::shared_ptr<NiceMock<Upstream::MockHost>>\n269:   createHost(const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& host_address) {\n270:     auto host = std::make_shared<NiceMock<Upstream::MockHost>>();\n271:     ON_CALL(*host, address()).WillByDefault(Return(host_address));\n272:     ON_CALL(*host, coarseHealth()).WillByDefault(Return(Upstream::Host::Health::Healthy));\n273:     return host;\n274:   }\n275: \n276:   void checkTransferStats(uint64_t rx_bytes, uint64_t rx_datagrams, uint64_t tx_bytes,\n277:                           uint64_t tx_datagrams) {\n278:     EXPECT_EQ(rx_bytes, config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_bytes_.value());\n279:     EXPECT_EQ(rx_datagrams, config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_datagrams_.value());\n280:     EXPECT_EQ(tx_bytes, config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_bytes_.value());\n281:     EXPECT_EQ(tx_datagrams, config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_datagrams_.value());\n282:   }\n283: \n284:   void checkSocketOptions(TestSession& session, const Network::SocketOptionName& ipv4_option,\n285:                           int ipv4_expect, const Network::SocketOptionName& ipv6_option,\n286:                           int ipv6_expect) {\n287:     EXPECT_EQ(ipv4_expect, session.sock_opts_[ipv4_option.level()][ipv4_option.option()]);\n288:     EXPECT_EQ(ipv6_expect, session.sock_opts_[ipv6_option.level()][ipv6_option.option()]);\n289:   }\n290: \n291:   void\n292:   ensureIpTransparentSocketOptions(const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& upstream_address,\n293:                                    const std::string& local_address, int ipv4_expect,\n294:                                    int ipv6_expect) {\n295:     setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n296: stat_prefix: foo\n297: matcher:\n298:   on_no_match:\n299:     action:\n300:       name: route\n301:       typed_config:\n302:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n303:         cluster: fake_cluster\n304: use_original_src_ip: true\n305:     )EOF\"));\n306: \n307:     expectSessionCreate(upstream_address);\n308:     test_sessions_[0].expectSetIpTransparentSocketOption();\n309:     test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, peer_address_->ip());\n310:     recvDataFromDownstream(peer_address_->asString(), local_address, \"hello\");\n311: \n312:     checkSocketOptions(test_sessions_[0], ENVOY_SOCKET_IP_TRANSPARENT, ipv4_expect,\n313:                        ENVOY_SOCKET_IPV6_TRANSPARENT, ipv6_expect);\n314:     EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n315:     EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n316:     checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n317: \n318:     test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world\");\n319:     checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n320:   }\n321: \n322:   // Return the config from yaml, plus one file access log with the specified format\n323:   envoy::extensions::filters::udp::udp_proxy::v3::UdpProxyConfig\n324:   accessLogConfig(const std::string& yaml, const std::string& session_access_log_format,\n325:                   const std::string& proxy_access_log_format) {\n326:     auto config = readConfig(yaml);\n327: \n328:     if (!session_access_log_format.empty()) {\n329:       envoy::config::accesslog::v3::AccessLog* session_access_log =\n330:           config.mutable_access_log()->Add();\n331:       session_access_log->set_name(\"envoy.access_loggers.file\");\n332:       envoy::extensions::access_loggers::file::v3::FileAccessLog session_file_access_log;\n333:       session_file_access_log.set_path(\"unused\");\n334:       session_file_access_log.mutable_log_format()->mutable_text_format_source()->set_inline_string(\n335:           session_access_log_format);\n336:       session_access_log->mutable_typed_config()->PackFrom(session_file_access_log);\n337:     }\n338: \n339:     if (!proxy_access_log_format.empty()) {\n340:       envoy::config::accesslog::v3::AccessLog* proxy_access_log =\n341:           config.mutable_proxy_access_log()->Add();\n342:       proxy_access_log->set_name(\"envoy.access_loggers.file\");\n343:       envoy::extensions::access_loggers::file::v3::FileAccessLog proxy_file_access_log;\n344:       proxy_file_access_log.set_path(\"unused\");\n345:       proxy_file_access_log.mutable_log_format()->mutable_text_format_source()->set_inline_string(\n346:           proxy_access_log_format);\n347:       proxy_access_log->mutable_typed_config()->PackFrom(proxy_file_access_log);\n348:     }\n349:     return config;\n350:   }\n351: \n352:   envoy::extensions::filters::udp::udp_proxy::v3::UdpProxyConfig\n353:   readConfig(const std::string& yaml) {\n354:     envoy::extensions::filters::udp::udp_proxy::v3::UdpProxyConfig config;\n355:     TestUtility::loadFromYamlAndValidate(yaml, config);\n356:     return config;\n357:   }\n358: \n359:   bool isTransparentSocketOptionsSupported() {\n360:     for (const auto& option_name : transparent_options_) {\n361:       if (!option_name.hasValue()) {\n362:         return false;\n363:       }\n364:     }\n365: \n366:     return true;\n367:   }\n368: \n369:   TestThreadsafeSingletonInjector<Api::OsSysCallsImpl> os_calls_;\n370:   NiceMock<Server::Configuration::MockListenerFactoryContext> factory_context_;\n371:   UdpProxyFilterConfigSharedPtr config_;\n372:   Network::MockUdpReadFilterCallbacks callbacks_;\n373:   Upstream::ClusterUpdateCallbacks* cluster_update_callbacks_{};\n374:   std::unique_ptr<TestUdpProxyFilter> filter_;\n375:   std::vector<TestSession> test_sessions_;\n376:   StringViewSaver access_log_data_;\n377:   std::vector<std::string> output_;\n378:   bool expect_gro_{};\n379:   const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr upstream_address_;\n380:   const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr peer_address_;\n381:   const std::vector<Network::SocketOptionName> transparent_options_{ENVOY_SOCKET_IP_TRANSPARENT,\n382:                                                                     ENVOY_SOCKET_IPV6_TRANSPARENT};\n383:   inline static const std::string upstream_ip_address_ = \"20.0.0.1:443\";\n384:   inline static const std::string peer_ip_address_ = \"10.0.0.1:1000\";\n385: };\n386: \n387: class UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test : public UdpProxyFilterTest {\n388: public:\n389:   UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test()\n390:       : UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test(\n391:             Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(upstream_ipv6_address_)) {}\n392: \n393:   explicit UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test(Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr&& upstream_address_v6)\n394:       : UdpProxyFilterTest(Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(peer_ipv6_address_)),\n395:         upstream_address_v6_(std::move(upstream_address_v6)) {\n396:     EXPECT_CALL(\n397:         *factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_.host_,\n398:         address())\n399:         .WillRepeatedly(Return(upstream_address_v6_));\n400:   }\n401: \n402:   const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr upstream_address_v6_;\n403:   inline static const std::string upstream_ipv6_address_ = \"[2001:db8:85a3::8a2e:370:7334]:443\";\n404:   inline static const std::string peer_ipv6_address_ = \"[2001:db8:85a3::9a2e:370:7334]:1000\";\n405: };\n406: \n407: class UdpProxyFilterIpv4Ipv6Test : public UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test {\n408: public:\n409:   UdpProxyFilterIpv4Ipv6Test()\n410:       : UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test(Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressAndPort(\n411:             UdpProxyFilterIpv6Test::upstream_ipv6_address_, false)) {}\n412: \n413:   void ensureNoIpTransparentSocketOptions() {\n414:     expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_v6_);\n415:     test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n416:     recvDataFromDownstream(\"[2001:db8:85a3::9a2e:370:7334]:1000\",\n417:                            \"[2001:db8:85a3::9a2e:370:7335]:80\", \"hello\");\n418: \n419:     checkSocketOptions(test_sessions_[0], ENVOY_SOCKET_IP_TRANSPARENT, 0,\n420:                        ENVOY_SOCKET_IPV6_TRANSPARENT, 0);\n421:     EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n422:     EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n423:     checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n424: \n425:     test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world\");\n426:     checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n427:   }\n428: };\n429: \n430: // Basic UDP proxy flow with two sessions. Also test disabling GRO.\n431: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, BasicFlow) {\n432:   InSequence s;\n433: \n434:   const std::string session_access_log_format =\n435:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:bytes_received)% \"\n436:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:datagrams_received)% \"\n437:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:bytes_sent)% \"\n438:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:datagrams_sent)% \"\n439:       \"%CONNECTION_ID% \"\n440:       \"%DOWNSTREAM_REMOTE_ADDRESS% \"\n441:       \"%DOWNSTREAM_LOCAL_ADDRESS% \"\n442:       \"%UPSTREAM_HOST% \"\n443:       \"%STREAM_ID% \"\n444:       \"%ACCESS_LOG_TYPE%\";\n445: \n446:   const std::string proxy_access_log_format =\n447:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:bytes_received)% \"\n448:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:datagrams_received)% \"\n449:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:bytes_sent)% \"\n450:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:datagrams_sent)% \"\n451:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:no_route)% \"\n452:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:session_total)% \"\n453:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:idle_timeout)%\";\n454: \n455:   setup(accessLogConfig(R\"EOF(\n456: stat_prefix: foo\n457: matcher:\n458:   on_no_match:\n459:     action:\n460:       name: route\n461:       typed_config:\n462:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n463:         cluster: fake_cluster\n464: upstream_socket_config:\n465:   prefer_gro: false\n466:   )EOF\",\n467:                         session_access_log_format, proxy_access_log_format),\n468:         true, false);\n469: \n470:   // Allow for two sessions.\n471:   factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.cluster_.info_\n472:       ->resetResourceManager(2, 0, 0, 0, 0);\n473: \n474:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n475:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n476:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n477:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n478:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n479:   checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n480:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world\");\n481:   checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n482: \n483:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello2\");\n484:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello3\");\n485:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello2\");\n486:   checkTransferStats(11 /*rx_bytes*/, 2 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n487:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello3\");\n488:   checkTransferStats(17 /*rx_bytes*/, 3 /*rx_datagrams*/, 5 /*tx_bytes*/, 1 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n489: \n490:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world2\");\n491:   checkTransferStats(17 /*rx_bytes*/, 3 /*rx_datagrams*/, 11 /*tx_bytes*/, 2 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n492:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world3\");\n493:   checkTransferStats(17 /*rx_bytes*/, 3 /*rx_datagrams*/, 17 /*tx_bytes*/, 3 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n494: \n495:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n496:   test_sessions_[1].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello4\", 0, nullptr, true);\n497:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.3:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello4\");\n498:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n499:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n500:   checkTransferStats(23 /*rx_bytes*/, 4 /*rx_datagrams*/, 17 /*tx_bytes*/, 3 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n501:   test_sessions_[1].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world4\");\n502:   checkTransferStats(23 /*rx_bytes*/, 4 /*rx_datagrams*/, 23 /*tx_bytes*/, 4 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n503: \n504:   filter_.reset();\n505:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.size(), 3);\n506:   EXPECT_EQ(output_[0], \"23 4 23 4 0 2 0\");\n507: \n508:   const std::string session_access_log_regex =\n509:       \"(17 3 17 3 0|6 1 6 1 1) 10.0.0.(1|3):1000 10.0.0.2:80 20.0.0.1:443 \"\n510:       \"[0-9a-fA-F]{8}-([0-9a-fA-F]{4}-){3}[0-9a-fA-F]{12} \" +\n511:       AccessLogType_Name(AccessLog::AccessLogType::UdpSessionEnd);\n512: \n513:   EXPECT_TRUE(std::regex_match(output_[1], std::regex(session_access_log_regex)));\n514:   EXPECT_TRUE(std::regex_match(output_[2], std::regex(session_access_log_regex)));\n515: }\n516: \n517: // Route with source IP.\n518: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, Router) {\n519:   InSequence s;\n520: \n521:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n522: stat_prefix: foo\n523: matcher:\n524:   matcher_tree:\n525:     input:\n526:       name: envoy.matching.inputs.source_ip\n527:       typed_config:\n528:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.SourceIPInput\n529:     exact_match_map:\n530:       map:\n531:         \"10.0.0.1\":\n532:           action:\n533:             name: route\n534:             typed_config:\n535:               '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n536:               cluster: fake_cluster\n537:   )EOF\"));\n538: \n539:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n540:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n541:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n542:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n543:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n544: \n545:   test_sessions_[0].idle_timer_->invokeCallback();\n546:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n547:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n548: \n549:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n550:   test_sessions_[1].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n551:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n552:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n553:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n554: \n555:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.3:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n556:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n557:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n558: }\n559: \n560: // Idle timeout flow.\n561: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, IdleTimeout) {\n562:   InSequence s;\n563: \n564:   const std::string session_access_log_format = \"\";\n565: \n566:   const std::string proxy_access_log_format = \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:session_total)% \"\n567:                                               \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:idle_timeout)%\";\n568: \n569:   setup(accessLogConfig(R\"EOF(\n570: stat_prefix: foo\n571: matcher:\n572:   on_no_match:\n573:     action:\n574:       name: route\n575:       typed_config:\n576:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n577:         cluster: fake_cluster\n578:   )EOF\",\n579:                         session_access_log_format, proxy_access_log_format));\n580: \n581:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n582:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n583:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n584:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n585:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n586: \n587:   test_sessions_[0].idle_timer_->invokeCallback();\n588:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n589:   EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n590: \n591:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n592:   test_sessions_[1].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n593:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n594:   EXPECT_EQ(2, config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n595:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n596: \n597:   filter_.reset();\n598:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.size(), 1);\n599:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.front(), \"2 1\");\n600: }\n601: \n602: // Verify downstream send and receive error handling.\n603: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, SendReceiveErrorHandling) {\n604:   InSequence s;\n605: \n606:   const std::string session_access_log_format =\n607:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:cluster_name)% \"\n608:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:bytes_sent)% \"\n609:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:bytes_received)% \"\n610:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:errors_sent)% \"\n611:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:datagrams_sent)% \"\n612:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:datagrams_received)%\";\n613: \n614:   const std::string proxy_access_log_format = \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:errors_received)% \"\n615:                                               \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:no_route)% \"\n616:                                               \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:session_total)% \"\n617:                                               \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:idle_timeout)%\";\n618: \n619:   setup(accessLogConfig(R\"EOF(\n620: stat_prefix: foo\n621: matcher:\n622:   on_no_match:\n623:     action:\n624:       name: route\n625:       typed_config:\n626:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n627:         cluster: fake_cluster\n628:   )EOF\",\n629:                         session_access_log_format, proxy_access_log_format));\n630: \n631:   filter_->onReceiveError(Api::IoError::IoErrorCode::UnknownError);\n632:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_rx_errors_.value());\n633: \n634:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n635:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true);\n636:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n637:   checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n638:   EXPECT_EQ(5, factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_\n639:                    .cluster_.info_->traffic_stats_->upstream_cx_tx_bytes_total_.value());\n640: \n641:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world2\", 0, SOCKET_ERROR_MSG_SIZE);\n642:   checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n643:   EXPECT_EQ(6, factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_\n644:                    .cluster_.info_->traffic_stats_->upstream_cx_rx_bytes_total_.value());\n645:   EXPECT_EQ(1, config_->stats().downstream_sess_tx_errors_.value());\n646: \n647:   test_sessions_[0].recvDataFromUpstream(\"world2\", SOCKET_ERROR_MSG_SIZE, 0);\n648:   checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 .cluster_.info_->traffic_stats_->upstream_cx_rx_bytes_total_.value());\n651:   EXPECT_EQ(1, TestUtility::findCounter(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_\n652: test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", SOCKET_ERROR_MSG_SIZE);\n657:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n658:   checkTransferStats(10 /*rx_bytes*/, 2 filter_.reset();\n667:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.size(), 2);\n668:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.front(), \"1 0 1 0\");\n669:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.back(), \"fake_cluster 0 10 1 0 2\");\n670: }\n671: \n672: // Verify upstream connect error handling.\n673: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, ConnectErrorHandling) {\n674:   InSequence s;\n675: \n676:   const std::string session_access_log_format =\n677:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:cluster_name)% \"\n678:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:bytes_sent)% \"\n679:       \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:bytes_received)% \"\n680: \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.session:datagrams_received)%\";\n683: \n684:   const std::string proxy_access_log_format = \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:errors_received)% \"\n685:                                               \"%DYNAMIC_METADATA(udp.proxy.proxy:session_total)%\";\n686: \n687:   setup(accessLogConfig(R\"EOF(\n688: stat_prefix: foo\n689: matcher:\n690:   on_no_match:\n691:     action:\n692:       name: route\n693:       typed_config:\n694:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n695:         cluster: fake_cluster\n696:   )EOF\",\n697:                         session_access_log_format, proxy_access_log_format));\n698: \n699:   expectSessionCreate(upstream_address_);\n700:   test_sessions_[0].expectWriteToUpstream(\"hello\", 0, nullptr, true, 1);\n701:   EXPECT_LOG_CONTAINS(\"debug\", \"cannot connect\",\n702:                       recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\"));\n703:   checkTransferStats(5 /*rx_bytes*/, 1 /*rx_datagrams*/, 0 /*tx_bytes*/, 0 /*tx_datagrams*/);\n704:   EXPECT_EQ(1, 1\");\n712:   EXPECT_EQ(output_.back(), \"fake_cluster 0 5 0 0 1\");\n713: }\n714: \n715: // No upstream host handling.\n716: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, NoUpstreamHost) {\n717:   InSequence s;\n718: \n719:   setup(readConfig(R\"EOF(\n720: stat_prefix: foo\n721: matcher:\n722:   on_no_match:\n723:     action:\n724:       name: route\n725:       typed_config:\n726:         '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.udp.udp_proxy.v3.Route\n727:         cluster: fake_cluster\n728:   )EOF\"));\n729: \n730:   EXPECT_CALL(factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_.lb_,\n731:               chooseHost(_))\n732:       .WillOnce(Return(nullptr));\n733:   recvDataFromDownstream(\"10.0.0.1:1000\", \"10.0.0.2:80\", \"hello\");\n734:   EXPECT_EQ(1, factory_context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.thread_local_cluster_\n735:                    .cluster_.info_->traffic_stats_->upstream_cx_none_healthy_.value());\n736: }\n737: \n738: // No cluster at filter creation.\n739: TEST_F(UdpProxyFilterTest, NoUpstreamClusterAtCreation) {\n740:
